<!doctype html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title>OpenIM 前端联调接口</title>
<style>
body {
margin: 0;
background: #f6f7f9;
color: #1f2933;
font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
}
header {
background: #111827;
color: #fff;
padding: 18px 28px;
}
h1 {
margin: 0 0 8px;
font-size: 22px;
font-weight: 650;
}
.meta {
color: #cbd5e1;
font-size: 13px;
}
main {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 260px minmax(0, 1fr);
gap: 20px;
padding: 20px 28px 36px;
}
aside {
position: sticky;
top: 16px;
align-self: start;
background: #fff;
border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
border-radius: 6px;
padding: 14px;
max-height: calc(100vh - 32px);
overflow-y: auto;
}
.search {
width: 100%;
box-sizing: border-box;
border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
border-radius: 4px;
padding: 9px 10px;
font-size: 14px;
margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.nav-title {
color: #64748b;
font-size: 12px;
margin: 12px 0 8px;
}
.nav-link {
display: block;
color: #2563eb;
text-decoration: none;
font-size: 13px;
line-height: 1.5;
padding: 4px 0;
word-break: break-all;
}
.nav-group {
border-top: 1px solid #eef2f7;
padding-top: 8px;
margin-top: 8px;
}
.nav-group:first-child {
border-top: 0;
margin-top: 0;
padding-top: 0;
}
.nav-group-toggle {
width: 100%;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: space-between;
border: 0;
background: transparent;
color: #0f172a;
font-size: 13px;
font-weight: 600;
padding: 4px 0;
cursor: pointer;
text-align: left;
}
.nav-group-toggle .arrow {
color: #64748b;
font-size: 12px;
transition: transform .15s ease;
margin-right: 6px;
}
.nav-group.collapsed .nav-group-toggle .arrow {
transform: rotate(-90deg);
}
.nav-sub {
margin: 6px 0 0;
padding-left: 10px;
border-left: 2px solid #e2e8f0;
}
.nav-group.collapsed .nav-sub {
display: none;
}
.nav-sub-link {
display: block;
text-decoration: none;
color: #334155;
font-size: 12px;
padding: 4px 0;
word-break: break-all;
}
.nav-sub-link:hover,
.nav-link:hover {
color: #1d4ed8;
}
section {
margin-bottom: 22px;
}
h2 {
font-size: 18px;
margin: 0 0 12px;
}
.op {
background: #fff;
border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
border-left: 5px solid #64748b;
border-radius: 6px;
margin-bottom: 12px;
overflow: hidden;
}
.op.get { border-left-color: #16a34a; }
.op.post { border-left-color: #2563eb; }
.sdk { border-left-color: #7c3aed; }
.op-head {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 10px;
padding: 12px 14px;
border-bottom: 1px solid #eef2f7;
}
.method {
min-width: 54px;
border-radius: 4px;
color: #fff;
text-align: center;
font-size: 12px;
font-weight: 700;
padding: 5px 6px;
background: #64748b;
}
.get .method { background: #16a34a; }
.post .method { background: #2563eb; }
.sdk .method { background: #7c3aed; }
.path {
font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
font-size: 14px;
word-break: break-all;
}
.summary {
color: #475569;
padding: 0 14px 12px;
font-size: 14px;
}
table {
width: 100%;
border-collapse: collapse;
font-size: 13px;
margin-top: 8px;
}
th, td {
border-top: 1px solid #eef2f7;
padding: 8px 10px;
text-align: left;
vertical-align: top;
}
th {
color: #475569;
background: #f8fafc;
font-weight: 600;
}
code {
font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
}
.empty, .error {
background: #fff;
border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
border-radius: 6px;
padding: 16px;
}
.error {
color: #b91c1c;
border-color: #fecaca;
background: #fff1f2;
}
.note {
color: #475569;
background: #fff;
border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
border-radius: 6px;
padding: 12px 14px;
margin-bottom: 12px;
font-size: 14px;
line-height: 1.6;
}
.guide {
background: #ffffff;
border: 1px solid #dbe3ef;
border-left: 5px solid #0f766e;
border-radius: 6px;
padding: 14px 16px;
margin-bottom: 16px;
line-height: 1.65;
font-size: 14px;
}
.guide-title {
color: #0f172a;
font-size: 16px;
font-weight: 700;
margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.guide ul {
margin: 8px 0 0 18px;
padding: 0;
}
.response-fields, .try-box {
margin: 10px 14px 14px;
border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
border-radius: 6px;
overflow: hidden;
}
.block-title {
background: #f8fafc;
color: #0f172a;
font-size: 13px;
font-weight: 700;
padding: 9px 10px;
border-bottom: 1px solid #eef2f7;
}
.try-body {
padding: 10px;
}
.try-row {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 160px minmax(0, 1fr);
gap: 8px;
align-items: center;
margin-bottom: 8px;
font-size: 13px;
}
.try-row label {
color: #475569;
word-break: break-all;
}
.try-input, .try-textarea, .token-input {
box-sizing: border-box;
width: 100%;
border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
border-radius: 4px;
padding: 7px 8px;
font-size: 13px;
font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
background: #fff;
}
.try-textarea {
min-height: 84px;
resize: vertical;
}
.try-actions {
display: flex;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 8px;
align-items: center;
margin-top: 10px;
}
.try-button {
border: 0;
border-radius: 4px;
background: #0f766e;
color: #fff;
cursor: pointer;
font-size: 13px;
font-weight: 700;
padding: 8px 12px;
}
.try-button.secondary {
background: #475569;
}
.try-button:disabled {
cursor: not-allowed;
opacity: .6;
}
.try-hint {
color: #64748b;
font-size: 12px;
line-height: 1.5;
}
.try-result {
margin-top: 10px;
border-top: 1px solid #eef2f7;
padding-top: 10px;
}
.try-url {
color: #334155;
font-size: 12px;
margin-bottom: 8px;
word-break: break-all;
}
pre {
margin: 0;
background: #0f172a;
color: #e2e8f0;
border-radius: 6px;
padding: 10px;
overflow: auto;
font-size: 12px;
line-height: 1.55;
}
.global-token {
margin: 12px 0;
padding-top: 12px;
border-top: 1px solid #eef2f7;
}
.global-token label {
display: block;
color: #475569;
font-size: 12px;
margin-bottom: 6px;
}
@media (max-width: 900px) {
main {
grid-template-columns: 1fr;
padding: 16px;
}
aside {
position: static;
}
.try-row {
grid-template-columns: 1fr;
}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<header>
<h1>OpenIM 前端联调接口</h1>
<div class="meta">
本页为前端联调精选接口，已去除后端专用接口和重复 GET/POST 展示；顶部「OpenIM SDK 联调顺序」含 API 路由区分（Java 业务后端 <code>:8092</code> vs OpenIM <code>:10001/:10002</code>）和推荐调用链。原始 Swagger UI：<code>/swagger-ui.html</code>
</div>
</header>
<main>
<aside>
<input id="search" class="search" placeholder="搜索路径、说明、参数">
<div class="global-token">
<label for="globalAccessToken">业务 access_token（在线调试自动追加）</label>
<input id="globalAccessToken" class="token-input" placeholder="登录后粘贴 access_token">
<div class="try-hint" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:11px;color:#94a3b8">传递方式：URL 查询参数 <code>?access_token=...</code>，GET/POST 均适用，不带 Bearer 前缀，不放在 Header</div>
</div>
<div class="nav-title">接口分组</div>
<div id="nav"></div>
</aside>
<div id="content"></div>
</main>
<script>
const state = { groups: [], operationsById: {} };
const genericResponseFields = [
{ name: "resultCode", type: "int", description: "业务返回码，1 表示成功" },
{ name: "resultMsg", type: "string", description: "错误或提示信息，失败时重点查看" },
{ name: "data", type: "object", description: "业务数据，不同接口结构不同" }
];
const responseFieldDocs = {
"/config/openim/status": [
{ name: "data.enabled", type: "boolean", description: "后端 OpenIM 桥接开关" },
{ name: "data.openimReachable", type: "boolean", description: "后端是否可访问 OpenIM API" },
{ name: "data.adminTokenIssued", type: "boolean", description: "OpenIM admin token 是否可签发" },
{ name: "data.apiURL", type: "string", description: "前端 OpenIM SDK REST 地址" },
{ name: "data.wsURL", type: "string", description: "前端 OpenIM SDK WebSocket 地址" },
{ name: "data.platformID", type: "int", description: "OpenIM SDK 平台 ID" }
],
"/account/login": [
{ name: "data.access_token / data.access_Token", type: "string", description: "业务后端 access_token，调用 Java 后端接口使用" },
{ name: "data.userId", type: "int", description: "当前系统用户 ID" },
{ name: "data.nickname", type: "string", description: "当前用户昵称" },
{ name: "data.openIM.enabled", type: "boolean", description: "OpenIM 登录负载是否可用" },
{ name: "data.openIM.userID", type: "string", description: "OpenIM SDK 登录 userID" },
{ name: "data.openIM.token", type: "string", description: "OpenIM SDK token，不是业务 access_token" },
{ name: "data.openIM.apiURL", type: "string", description: "OpenIM SDK REST 地址" },
{ name: "data.openIM.wsURL", type: "string", description: "OpenIM SDK WebSocket 地址" }
],
"/account/register": [
{ name: "data.access_token / data.access_Token", type: "string", description: "注册成功后的业务 access_token" },
{ name: "data.userId", type: "int", description: "新用户 ID" },
{ name: "data.enterpriseJoined", type: "boolean", description: "是否已通过企业号加入企业" },
{ name: "data.companyId", type: "string", description: "加入的企业 ID" },
{ name: "data.companyName", type: "string", description: "加入的企业名称" },
{ name: "data.companyCode", type: "string", description: "加入的企业号" },
{ name: "data.openIM", type: "object", description: "OpenIM SDK 初始化和登录参数，同 /account/login" }
],
"/account/code/send": [
{ name: "data.areaCode", type: "string", description: "区号" },
{ name: "data.phoneNumber", type: "string", description: "手机号" },
{ name: "data.telephone", type: "string", description: "区号+手机号" },
{ name: "data.code", type: "string", description: "测试环境固定验证码 666666" },
{ name: "data.smsSent", type: "boolean", description: "是否真实发送短信；当前测试环境通常为 false" }
],
"/account/code/verify": [
{ name: "data.verified", type: "boolean", description: "验证码是否校验通过" },
{ name: "data.verifyCode", type: "string", description: "通过校验的验证码" },
{ name: "data.telephone", type: "string", description: "区号+手机号" }
],
"/user/openim/token": [
{ name: "data.enabled", type: "boolean", description: "是否成功生成 OpenIM token" },
{ name: "data.userID", type: "string", description: "OpenIM SDK 登录 userID" },
{ name: "data.token", type: "string", description: "新的 OpenIM SDK token" },
{ name: "data.expireTimeSeconds", type: "long", description: "OpenIM token 有效秒数" },
{ name: "data.apiURL / data.wsURL", type: "string", description: "SDK 连接地址" }
],
"/user/rtc/get_token": [
{ name: "usage", type: "string", description: "语音单呼和视频单呼共用此接口。前端先发 POST /user/rtc/get_token?access_token=xxx&room=yyy&identity=当前用户ID，拿到 data.serverUrl 和 data.token 后，再交给 LiveKit SDK 入会。" },
{ name: "data.serverUrl", type: "string", description: "LiveKit WebSocket 地址，前端 RTC SDK 直接使用" },
{ name: "data.token", type: "string", description: "LiveKit JWT，包含 roomJoin/video grant" },
{ name: "data.roomID", type: "string", description: "本次通话房间ID，需与客户端发起通话时保持一致" }
],
"/agora/info": [
{ name: "data.ownToken / data.appId / data.channel / data.uid", type: "string/string/string/int", description: "历史 Agora RTC 凭证，兼容旧客户端" },
{ name: "data.deprecated", type: "boolean", description: "固定为 true，表示该链路已进入历史兼容阶段" },
{ name: "data.replacementApi / data.replacementProvider", type: "string/string", description: "替代入口和主线提供方，当前为 /user/rtc/get_token + livekit" },
{ name: "data.migrationStage / data.warningMessage", type: "string/string", description: "迁移阶段和弃用提示文案" }
],
"/enterprise/code/validate": [
{ name: "data.valid", type: "boolean", description: "企业号、企业ID、企业名或邀请码是否可用" },
{ name: "data.codeType", type: "string", description: "companyId/companyName/companyCode/inviteCode/unknown" },
{ name: "data.companyCode / data.companyCard", type: "string/object", description: "企业号和前端可直接展示的企业卡片" },
{ name: "data.inviteCard", type: "object", description: "邀请码命中时返回邀请码状态、过期时间和使用次数" },
{ name: "data.reasonText / data.fieldErrors", type: "string/object", description: "无效、过期、禁用或次数用尽时的展示文案" },
{ name: "data.nextStep / data.actionApis / data.pageMetas", type: "string/object", description: "注册或企业入口下一步与相关接口" }
],
"/console/platform/companies/create": [
{ name: "data.companyId / data.companyCode", type: "string", description: "新企业 ID 和唯一企业号" },
{ name: "data.companyCard", type: "object", description: "企业入口展示卡片" },
{ name: "data.successMessage / data.nextActions", type: "string/array", description: "创建成功提示和后续动作" }
],
"/console/platform/companies/profile/update": [
{ name: "data.companyCode / data.logoUrl", type: "string", description: "更新后的企业号和企业 LOGO" },
{ name: "data.contactCards / data.profileCards", type: "array", description: "企业资料和联系人展示卡片" },
{ name: "data.successMessage / data.operationHint", type: "string", description: "保存成功提示" }
],
"/console/platform/companies/invite-codes": [
{ name: "data.items[]", type: "array", description: "平台可按企业筛选的邀请码列表" },
{ name: "data.items[].statusText / rowActions", type: "string/array", description: "有效、已禁用、已过期或次数用尽等展示字段" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / filterMetas / tableMetas", type: "object/array", description: "邀请码管理页元信息" }
],
"/console/platform/companies/invite-codes/enable": [
{ name: "data.code", type: "string", description: "被恢复启用的邀请码" },
{ name: "data.status / statusText", type: "int/string", description: "启用后的邀请码状态" },
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint / nextActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "启用后的操作提示和后续动作" }
],
"/console/enterprise/invite-codes/enable": [
{ name: "data.code", type: "string", description: "被恢复启用的邀请码" },
{ name: "data.status / statusText", type: "int/string", description: "启用后的邀请码状态" },
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint / nextActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "启用后的操作提示和后续动作" }
],
"/console/enterprise/users/custom-fields": [
{ name: "data.items[]", type: "array", description: "当前企业用户资料扩展字段配置" },
{ name: "data.fieldMetas", type: "array", description: "fieldKey/fieldName/type/options/visibleInProfile/enabled 编辑提示" },
{ name: "data.actionApis", type: "object", description: "自定义字段查询和更新入口" }
],
"/user/profile/metas": [
{ name: "data.fieldMetas", type: "array", description: "昵称、签名、手机号、邮箱和企业扩展字段编辑提示" },
{ name: "data.bindStatus", type: "object", description: "手机号和邮箱绑定状态" },
{ name: "data.customFields", type: "array", description: "当前用户所属企业可见的扩展字段" }
],
"/friend/openim/send-before": [
{ name: "data.allowed", type: "boolean", description: "是否允许发送单聊消息，前端必须判断" },
{ name: "data.canSendText / data.reasonText", type: "string", description: "单聊发送前校验结果和可展示原因" },
{ name: "data.relationText", type: "string", description: "好友关系展示文案：好友、非好友、已拉黑、受限等" },
{ name: "data.permissionMetas", type: "array", description: "好友关系、黑名单、企业私聊开关和宵禁策略展示字段" },
{ name: "data.actionApis / data.nextActions", type: "object/array", description: "通讯录、添加好友、黑名单和重试入口" },
{ name: "data.openIMSummary", type: "object", description: "单聊 OpenIM SDK 发送前业务校验摘要" },
{ name: "data.fromUserID", type: "string", description: "发送方 OpenIM userID" },
{ name: "data.toUserID", type: "string", description: "接收方 OpenIM userID" },
{ name: "data.errCode / data.errMsg", type: "int/string", description: "不允许发送时的原因" }
],
"/friends/list": [
{ name: "data[]", type: "array", description: "好友列表，保留旧好友字段" },
{ name: "pageMetas / filterMetas / tableMetas", type: "object/array", description: "通讯录页面、筛选项和表格列元信息" },
{ name: "statusMetas / relationMetas", type: "object/array", description: "friend/attention/blacklist/new_friend/stranger/blocked 展示文案" },
{ name: "data[].displayTitle / displaySubtitle", type: "string", description: "联系人行展示标题和副标题" },
{ name: "data[].statusText / badgeText / timeText", type: "string", description: "关系状态、徽标和时间展示字段" },
{ name: "data[].detailApi / rowActions", type: "string/array", description: "好友详情和备注、拉黑、删除、添加等行操作入口" }
],
"/friends/page": [
{ name: "data.pageData[]", type: "array", description: "分页好友列表，保留旧 PageVO 字段" },
{ name: "data.pageData[].displayTitle / statusText / rowActions", type: "string/array", description: "分页联系人行展示字段" },
{ name: "pageMetas / filterMetas / tableMetas / emptyState", type: "object/array", description: "通讯录分页页展示契约" }
],
"/friends/get": [
{ name: "data", type: "object", description: "好友关系详情，保留旧 Friends 字段" },
{ name: "data.displayTitle / displaySubtitle / statusText / badgeText", type: "string", description: "好友详情展示字段" },
{ name: "data.detailApi / rowActions", type: "string/array", description: "详情页可用操作入口" },
{ name: "pageMetas / relationMetas / actionApis", type: "object/array", description: "好友详情页元信息" }
],
"/friends/newFriend/list": [
{ name: "data[]", type: "array", description: "新朋友申请列表，保留旧 NewFriends 字段" },
{ name: "data[].displayTitle / statusText / rowActions", type: "string/array", description: "新朋友列表展示字段" },
{ name: "pageMetas / filterMetas / emptyState", type: "object/array", description: "新朋友页面展示契约" }
],
"/friends/blacklist": [
{ name: "data[]", type: "array", description: "黑名单列表，保留旧好友字段" },
{ name: "data[].displayTitle / statusText / rowActions", type: "string/array", description: "黑名单联系人展示字段和取消拉黑入口" },
{ name: "pageMetas / relationMetas / actionApis", type: "object/array", description: "黑名单页面展示契约" }
],
"/friendGroup/list": [
{ name: "data[]", type: "array", description: "好友分组列表，保留旧 FriendGroup 字段" },
{ name: "data[].displayTitle / displaySubtitle / statusText / badgeText", type: "string", description: "分组名称、成员数量和状态展示字段" },
{ name: "data[].rowActions", type: "array", description: "重命名、调整成员、删除分组入口" },
{ name: "pageMetas / tableMetas / actionApis / emptyState", type: "object/array", description: "好友分组页面展示契约" }
],
"/user/avatar/get": [
{ name: "data.userId", type: "int", description: "用户ID" },
{ name: "data.avatarUrl", type: "string", description: "头像URL，可直接用于img标签src" }
],
"/user/get": [
{ name: "data", type: "object", description: "用户资料，保留旧 User 字段" },
{ name: "data.displayTitle / displaySubtitle / statusText / badgeText", type: "string", description: "用户资料展示字段" },
{ name: "data.profileCards / rowActions", type: "array", description: "资料卡片和好友关系、发送前校验入口" },
{ name: "pageMetas / actionApis / emptyState", type: "object", description: "用户资料页展示契约" }
],
"/user/offlineOperation": [
{ name: "data[]", type: "array", description: "离线好友/群组操作记录，保留旧字段" },
{ name: "data[].displayTitle / displaySubtitle / statusText / timeText", type: "string", description: "离线操作记录展示字段" },
{ name: "pageMetas / filterMetas / tableMetas / emptyState", type: "object/array", description: "离线同步页面展示契约" }
],
"/room/openim/detail": [
{ name: "data.roomId", type: "string", description: "旧系统群 ID" },
{ name: "data.roomName", type: "string", description: "群名称" },
{ name: "data.myMember", type: "object", description: "当前用户在群内的角色、免打扰、置顶、禁言等设置" },
{ name: "data.permissions", type: "object", description: "群权限开关，如 canSend、showMember、allowUploadFile 等" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / data.sectionMetas", type: "object/array", description: "群详情页标题、分区和展示辅助字段" },
{ name: "data.permissionMetas", type: "array", description: "群权限开关的前端展示文案" },
{ name: "data.actionApis", type: "object", description: "群详情、成员、公告、共享文件、入群审核等推荐调用入口" },
{ name: "data.openIMSummary", type: "object", description: "OpenIM 同步状态摘要，供页面直接展示" },
{ name: "data.openIM.groupID", type: "string", description: "OpenIM 群 ID，前端 SDK 发送群消息使用" },
{ name: "data.openIM.synced", type: "boolean", description: "旧群是否已同步到 OpenIM" }
],
"/room/openim/send-before": [
{ name: "data.canSend", type: "boolean", description: "是否允许发送群消息，前端必须判断" },
{ name: "data.canSendText / data.reasonText", type: "string", description: "发送前校验结果和可展示原因" },
{ name: "data.sensitiveHint / data.rateLimitHint", type: "string", description: "敏感词与频率限制提示" },
{ name: "data.permissionMetas", type: "array", description: "发送权限、@全体成员和消息类型展示字段" },
{ name: "data.actionApis", type: "object", description: "群详情、成员、发送前校验等推荐入口" },
{ name: "data.reason", type: "string", description: "不允许发送时的原因，例如监控人不可发言" },
{ name: "data.role", type: "int", description: "当前用户群角色" },
{ name: "data.openIM.groupID", type: "string", description: "OpenIM 群 ID" }
],
"/room/openim/mapping": [
{ name: "data.oldRoomId", type: "string", description: "旧系统群 ID" },
{ name: "data.groupID", type: "string", description: "OpenIM 群 ID" },
{ name: "data.synced", type: "boolean", description: "是否同步成功" },
{ name: "data.error", type: "string", description: "同步失败原因" }
],
"/room/openim/members": [
{ name: "data.total", type: "long", description: "成员总数" },
{ name: "data.members", type: "array", description: "成员列表；普通成员看不到隐身人/监控人" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / data.tableMetas / data.emptyState", type: "object/array/object", description: "成员页标题、表格列和空态字段" },
{ name: "data.members[].displayTitle / statusText / rowActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "成员行展示标题、状态文案和可用操作" },
{ name: "data.members[].userId", type: "int", description: "成员用户 ID" },
{ name: "data.members[].role", type: "int", description: "成员角色" },
{ name: "data.members[].nickname", type: "string", description: "群内昵称" }
],
"/room/openim/online-members": [
{ name: "data.total", type: "long", description: "在线成员总数" },
{ name: "data.members", type: "array", description: "在线成员列表" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / data.tableMetas / data.emptyState", type: "object/array/object", description: "在线成员页展示辅助字段" },
{ name: "data.members[].displayTitle / statusText", type: "string/string", description: "在线成员行展示标题和在线状态文案" },
{ name: "data.members[].online", type: "boolean", description: "是否在线" },
{ name: "data.members[].platforms", type: "array", description: "在线平台列表" },
{ name: "data.openIMOnline", type: "boolean", description: "是否来自 OpenIM 在线状态" }
],
"/room/openim/message/read-detail": [
{ name: "data.supported", type: "boolean", description: "当前 OpenIM 部署是否支持已读成员明细；目前通常为 false" },
{ name: "data.auditReadState / data.readKnown", type: "object/boolean", description: "审计已读回调可确认的已读状态；不代表完整 OpenIM 成员明细能力" },
{ name: "data.readUserIds / data.allRead / data.allReadTime", type: "array/boolean/long", description: "审计回调记录到的已读用户、是否全部已读和全部已读时间" },
{ name: "data.readSource / data.reasonText", type: "string/string", description: "已读状态来源和不可确认原因" },
{ name: "data.statusText / data.operationHint", type: "string", description: "前端展示的能力状态和不可用提示" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / data.emptyState", type: "object/object", description: "消息已读详情页展示辅助字段" },
{ name: "data.reason", type: "string", description: "不支持原因" }
],
"/room/openim/messages/search": [
{ name: "data.total / items / messages", type: "long/array/array", description: "当前群聊天记录搜索分页结果，items 与 messages 同源" },
{ name: "data.items[].contentSummary / contentTypeText", type: "string/string", description: "前端主展示摘要和消息类型文案" },
{ name: "data.items[].destroyed / destroyedText", type: "boolean/string", description: "消息是否已销毁和状态文案；默认不返回已销毁消息" },
{ name: "data.items[].readState / fileHints / rowActions", type: "object/object/array", description: "审计已读状态、文件提示和可用操作" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / filterMetas / tableMetas / contentTypeMetas", type: "object/array/array/array", description: "搜索页标题、筛选、表格和消息类型元信息" }
],
"/room/openim/message/recall": [
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint", type: "string/string", description: "撤回成功提示和前端操作说明" },
{ name: "data.auditStatus", type: "string", description: "recalled 或 recall_failed，用于前端展示治理状态" },
{ name: "data.openIM / openIMSummary", type: "object/object", description: "OpenIM 撤回结果和摘要；失败路径也返回稳定摘要" },
{ name: "data.reasonText / retryable / nextActions", type: "string/boolean/array", description: "失败原因、是否适合重试和后续动作" }
],
"/friend/openim/messages/search": [
{ name: "data.total / items / messages", type: "long/array/array", description: "当前用户与指定对端的单聊搜索分页结果" },
{ name: "data.peerUserId / peerUserExists", type: "int/boolean", description: "对端用户 ID 和资料是否存在" },
{ name: "data.items[].displayTitle / displaySubtitle", type: "string/string", description: "单聊搜索结果展示标题和副标题" },
{ name: "data.items[].contentSummary / contentTypeText / fileHints", type: "string/string/object", description: "消息摘要、类型文案和文件提示" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / filterMetas / emptyState", type: "object/array/object", description: "搜索页标题、筛选和空态字段" }
],
"/message/favorites/context": [
{ name: "data.favoriteSupported / mergeSupported", type: "boolean/boolean", description: "当前用户端是否支持单条消息收藏和合并收藏" },
{ name: "data.maxMergeCount", type: "int", description: "单次合并收藏最大消息数，当前为 20" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / favoriteTypeMetas / fieldMetas", type: "object/array/array", description: "收藏页标题、收藏类型和表单字段提示" },
{ name: "data.actionApis", type: "object", description: "收藏上下文、列表、详情、添加、合并、更新、删除、恢复和消息搜索入口" }
],
"/message/favorites": [
{ name: "data.total / items / favorites", type: "long/array/array", description: "当前用户消息收藏分页列表，items 与 favorites 同源" },
{ name: "data.items[].favoriteId / favoriteType / conversationType", type: "string/string/string", description: "收藏 ID、收藏类型 single_message/merge 和会话类型 single/group" },
{ name: "data.items[].displayTitle / displaySubtitle / statusText", type: "string/string/string", description: "收藏列表行展示标题、副标题和状态文案" },
{ name: "data.items[].detailApi / rowActions", type: "string/array", description: "未删除收藏继续返回当前详情入口；已删除收藏统一回收藏列表并暴露 restore" },
{ name: "data.filterMetas / tableMetas / emptyState", type: "array/array/object", description: "收藏列表筛选、表格列和空态字段" }
],
"/message/favorites/detail": [
{ name: "data.favoriteId / title / summary", type: "string/string/string", description: "收藏详情基础信息" },
{ name: "data.messageSnapshots / messages", type: "array/array", description: "收藏时保存的消息快照，来自 openim_message_audit 审计数据" },
{ name: "data.auditIds / tags / rowActions", type: "array/array/array", description: "关联审计消息 ID、标签和可用操作" }
],
"/message/favorites/add": [
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint", type: "string/string", description: "收藏成功或已存在时的提示" },
{ name: "data.favoriteId / messageSnapshots", type: "string/array", description: "收藏 ID 和单条消息快照" },
{ name: "data.reasonText / fieldErrors", type: "string/object", description: "无权收藏、消息不存在等失败路径展示字段" }
],
"/message/favorites/merge": [
{ name: "data.favoriteType", type: "string", description: "固定为 merge" },
{ name: "data.messageCount / messageSnapshots", type: "int/array", description: "合并收藏消息数和消息快照，最多 20 条" },
{ name: "data.successMessage / nextActions", type: "string/array", description: "创建成功提示和后续动作" }
],
"/message/favorites/update": [
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint", type: "string/string", description: "标题、备注或标签保存成功提示" },
{ name: "data.title / note / tags", type: "string/string/array", description: "更新后的收藏标题、备注和标签" }
],
"/message/favorites/delete": [
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint / nextActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "删除收藏成功提示和后续动作；删除后 nextActions.detail 不再指向已删除详情，而是仅回收藏列表" },
{ name: "data.deleted / deleteTime", type: "boolean/long", description: "收藏逻辑删除状态和删除时间" }
],
"/message/favorites/restore": [
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint / nextActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "恢复收藏成功提示和后续动作；恢复后 nextActions.detail 继续回当前收藏详情" },
{ name: "data.deleted / deleteTime / updateTime", type: "boolean/long/long", description: "恢复后的删除状态、删除时间和更新时间" }
],
"/message/merge/context": [
{ name: "data.mergeForwardSupported / mergeSaveSupported", type: "boolean/boolean", description: "当前用户端是否支持合并转发 payload 生成和合并消息保存" },
{ name: "data.sdkSendRequired / serverSendsMessage", type: "boolean/boolean", description: "真实发送由前端 OpenIM SDK 完成，后端不代发消息" },
{ name: "data.maxMergeCount / defaultPreviewCount", type: "int/int", description: "单次最多合并消息数和默认摘要预览条数" },
{ name: "data.fieldMetas / actionApis", type: "array/object", description: "合并转发表单字段提示和上下文、预览、转发前、保存、列表、详情、删除、恢复入口" }
],
"/message/merge/preview": [
{ name: "data.saved / valid", type: "boolean/boolean", description: "预览固定 saved=false，校验通过 valid=true" },
{ name: "data.messageSnapshots / previewItems", type: "array/array", description: "基于当前用户可见审计消息生成的完整快照和前几条摘要" },
{ name: "data.mergePayload / sdkPayload", type: "object/object", description: "前端可交给 OpenIM SDK 的合并消息内容；后端不发送" }
],
"/message/merge/forward-before": [
{ name: "data.canForward", type: "boolean", description: "当前所选消息是否可生成合并转发 payload" },
{ name: "data.targetType / targetId", type: "string/string", description: "前端选择的转发目标类型和目标 ID，供 SDK 发送使用" },
{ name: "data.sdkSendRequired / operationHint", type: "boolean/string", description: "提示前端后续调用 OpenIM SDK 发送，后端不代发" }
],
"/message/merge/save": [
{ name: "data.saved / mergeId", type: "boolean/string", description: "保存成功标记和后端保存的合并消息 ID" },
{ name: "data.mergePayload / messageSnapshots", type: "object/array", description: "保存的 SDK payload 和审计消息快照" },
{ name: "data.successMessage / nextActions", type: "string/array", description: "保存成功提示和后续动作" }
],
"/message/merge/saved": [
{ name: "data.total / items / merges", type: "long/array/array", description: "当前用户保存的合并消息分页列表，items 与 merges 同源" },
{ name: "data.items[].mergeId / title / messageCount", type: "string/string/int", description: "合并消息 ID、标题和包含消息数" },
{ name: "data.items[].detailApi / rowActions", type: "string/array", description: "未删除记录继续返回当前详情入口；已删除记录统一回已保存合并消息列表并暴露 restore" },
{ name: "data.filterMetas / tableMetas / emptyState", type: "array/array/object", description: "合并消息列表筛选、表格列和空态字段" }
],
"/message/merge/detail": [
{ name: "data.mergeId / title / summary", type: "string/string/string", description: "保存的合并消息详情基础信息" },
{ name: "data.messageSnapshots / mergePayload", type: "array/object", description: "保存时的消息快照和 SDK payload" },
{ name: "data.sectionMetas / rowActions", type: "array/array", description: "详情页分区和可用操作" }
],
"/message/merge/delete": [
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint / nextActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "删除保存记录成功提示和后续动作；删除后 nextActions.detail 不再指向已删除详情，而是仅回已保存合并消息列表" },
{ name: "data.deleted / deleteTime", type: "boolean/long", description: "保存记录逻辑删除状态和删除时间" }
],
"/message/merge/restore": [
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint / nextActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "恢复已保存合并消息成功提示和后续动作；恢复后 nextActions.detail 继续回当前合并消息详情" },
{ name: "data.deleted / deleteTime / updateTime", type: "boolean/long/long", description: "恢复后的删除状态、删除时间和更新时间" }
],
"/user/notification/settings": [
{ name: "data.items[]", type: "array", description: "始终返回完整通知类型集合；无记录时也会按默认值补齐" },
{ name: "data.items[].type / allowNotification / updateTime", type: "string/boolean/long", description: "通知类型、当前是否允许通知以及该层配置更新时间；默认补齐项 updateTime=0" },
{ name: "data.items[].scope / roomId / effective", type: "string/string/boolean", description: "当前返回作用域、群ID和是否作为最终生效项" },
{ name: "data.items[].source / sourceText", type: "string/string", description: "当前值来源：default/global/room，对应默认开启、全局设置、单群覆盖" },
{ name: "data.supportedTypes / typeMetas / defaultAllowAll", type: "array/array/boolean", description: "支持的通知类型、类型说明和默认是否全部开启" }
],
"/user/notification/settings/update": [
{ name: "data.updatedTypes / updateTime", type: "array/long", description: "本次成功写入的通知类型和更新时间；写入后读取结果按 room > global > default 收口" }
],
"/user/notification/settings/defaults": [
{ name: "data.items[] / defaultAllowAll", type: "array/boolean", description: "默认通知类型样板；仅描述默认值，真实读取以 /user/notification/settings 的完整合并结果为准" }
],
"/room/openim/member/detail": [
{ name: "data.member / userId / roomId / roomName", type: "object/int/string/string", description: "当前成员详情、目标成员用户 ID、所属群 ID 和群名称" },
{ name: "data.member.displayTitle / detailApi / rowActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "当前成员展示标题、当前成员详情入口和可继续执行动作；详情页继续沿用当前成员而不是回成员列表" },
{ name: "data.permissions", type: "object", description: "当前用户是否可备注该成员、是否具备群管理权限、是否查看自己" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / data.sectionMetas", type: "object/array", description: "成员详情页展示辅助字段" }
],
"/room/openim/notices": [
{ name: "data.total", type: "long", description: "公告总数" },
{ name: "data.notices", type: "array", description: "公告列表" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / data.tableMetas / data.emptyState", type: "object/array/object", description: "群公告页展示辅助字段" },
{ name: "data.notices[].displayTitle / detailApi / rowActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "公告行展示标题、当前公告详情入口和可用操作；仅群主或管理员返回 update/delete" },
{ name: "data.notices[].noticeId", type: "string", description: "公告 ID，由服务端生成的 MongoDB ObjectId" },
{ name: "data.notices[].text", type: "string", description: "公告内容" }
],
"/room/openim/notice/detail": [
{ name: "data.noticeId / roomId / roomName", type: "string/string/string", description: "当前公告 ID、所属群 ID 和群名称" },
{ name: "data.text / nickname / time / modifyTime", type: "string/string/long/long", description: "公告内容、发布人和发布时间信息" },
{ name: "data.permissions / rowActions", type: "object/array", description: "当前用户是否可管理公告，以及详情页可继续执行的动作" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / data.sectionMetas", type: "object/array", description: "公告详情页展示辅助字段" }
],
"/room/openim/shares": [
{ name: "data.shares", type: "array", description: "群共享文件列表" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / data.tableMetas / data.emptyState", type: "object/array/object", description: "群共享文件页展示辅助字段" },
{ name: "data.shares[].displayTitle / sizeText / rowActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "共享文件行标题、大小文案和可用操作；仅群主/管理员或上传者本人返回 delete" },
{ name: "data.shares[].shareId", type: "string", description: "共享文件 ID" },
{ name: "data.shares[].fileId", type: "string", description: "本地文件服务文件 ID，旧 URL 共享为空" },
{ name: "data.shares[].downloadUrl / previewUrl", type: "string", description: "可直接使用的限时签名下载/预览地址" },
{ name: "data.shares[].previewSupported", type: "boolean", description: "是否支持内联预览" },
{ name: "data.shares[].fileSource / fileStatus", type: "string", description: "文件来源 local/external 与文件状态 available/deleted" },
{ name: "data.shares[].url", type: "string", description: "文件地址" },
{ name: "data.shares[].name", type: "string", description: "文件名" },
{ name: "data.shares[].size", type: "long", description: "文件大小，字节" }
],
"/file/upload/context": [
{ name: "data.canUpload / uploadDisabled", type: "boolean", description: "当前场景是否允许上传，群文件会结合群成员和企业文件开关判断" },
{ name: "data.reason / reasonText", type: "string", description: "不可上传时可直接展示的原因" },
{ name: "data.uploadMode / storage", type: "string", description: "当前存储模式 local 或 minio，由 APPCONFIG_FILEUPLOADMODE 环境变量控制" },
{ name: "data.maxSizeBytes / maxSizeText", type: "long/string", description: "单文件大小限制，默认 50MB" },
{ name: "data.quota / usedSizeBytes / remainingSizeBytes", type: "object/long/long", description: "当前用户容量、已用空间和剩余空间；默认用户容量 2GB" },
{ name: "data.storageOverviewApi / resourcesApi", type: "string", description: "容量概览和文件列表接口入口" },
{ name: "data.supportedTypes / blockedExtensions", type: "array", description: "支持类型说明和禁止上传扩展名" },
{ name: "data.previewCapabilities", type: "object", description: "图片、文本和 PDF 内联预览能力说明，不做转码" },
{ name: "data.actionApis", type: "object", description: "upload/sign/download/preview/delete 与群共享联动入口" }
],
"/file/storage/overview": [
{ name: "data.totalSizeBytes / fileCount", type: "long/int", description: "当前用户未删除文件总大小和文件数量" },
{ name: "data.quota", type: "object", description: "容量上限、已用、剩余、是否可继续上传和可展示原因" },
{ name: "data.roomShareReferenceCount", type: "int", description: "当前用户文件中被群共享引用的文件数量" },
{ name: "data.messageReferenceSupported / messageReferenceCount / messageReferenceInvalidCount", type: "boolean/int/int", description: "消息文件引用生命周期状态；支持识别 referenceInvalid 失效标记，不伪造活跃消息引用" },
{ name: "data.recentUploads", type: "array", description: "最近上传文件，复用文件列表项展示字段" },
{ name: "data.cleanupSuggestion", type: "object", description: "已删除文件清理建议和清理入口说明" }
],
"/file/storage/enterprise-overview": [
{ name: "data.scope / companyId / companyName", type: "string", description: "企业维度文件空间范围" },
{ name: "data.totalSizeBytes / fileCount / ownerCount / roomCount", type: "long/int/int/int", description: "企业未删除文件总量、文件数、上传用户数和涉及群数" },
{ name: "data.quota", type: "object", description: "企业总容量上限、已用、剩余和是否可继续上传" },
{ name: "data.topOwners / topRooms / recentUploads", type: "array", description: "企业空间占用排行和最近上传" },
{ name: "data.messageReferenceSupported / messageReferenceInvalidCount / messageReferenceHint", type: "boolean/int/string", description: "消息文件引用生命周期状态；撤回/销毁后失效文件不再作为删除保护依据" }
],
"/file/storage/room-overview": [
{ name: "data.scope / roomId / roomName / roomJid", type: "string", description: "群维度文件空间范围" },
{ name: "data.totalSizeBytes / fileCount / ownerCount", type: "long/int/int", description: "群共享文件总量、文件数和上传用户数" },
{ name: "data.quota", type: "object", description: "群文件容量上限、已用、剩余和是否可继续上传" },
{ name: "data.topOwners / recentUploads", type: "array", description: "群文件上传用户排行和最近上传" },
{ name: "data.messageReferenceSupported / messageReferenceInvalidCount / messageReferenceHint", type: "boolean/int/string", description: "消息文件引用生命周期状态；撤回/销毁后失效文件不再作为删除保护依据" }
],
"/file/resources": [
{ name: "data.total / items / files", type: "long/array/array", description: "当前用户上传文件分页结果，items 与 files 兼容同源" },
{ name: "data.items[].fileId / name / sizeText", type: "string/string/string", description: "文件 ID、文件名和大小文案" },
{ name: "data.items[].referenced / referenceCount / canDelete", type: "boolean/int/boolean", description: "是否被引用、引用数量和是否可删除" },
{ name: "data.items[].detailApi / rowActions", type: "string/array", description: "未删除文件继续返回当前详情；已删除文件改为列表承接，并暴露 references + restore" },
{ name: "data.filterMetas / tableMetas / statusMetas", type: "array", description: "文件管理页面筛选、表格和状态元信息" },
{ name: "data.emptyState / actionApis", type: "object", description: "空态和文件管理操作入口" }
],
"/file/resources/detail": [
{ name: "data.fileId / name / fileStatus", type: "string/string/string", description: "文件基础信息和状态" },
{ name: "data.downloadUrl / previewUrl / previewSupported", type: "string/string/boolean", description: "未删除文件的签名访问地址和预览能力" },
{ name: "data.referenced / referenceCount / references", type: "boolean/int/array", description: "引用状态和引用明细；真实删除保护统计群共享引用" },
{ name: "data.referenceInvalid / referenceInvalidReason / referenceInvalidTime", type: "boolean/string/long", description: "消息撤回或销毁后的文件引用失效标记；失效后若无群共享引用则可删除" },
{ name: "data.canDelete / reasonText", type: "boolean/string", description: "是否可删除和不可删除原因" },
{ name: "data.sectionMetas / operationActions", type: "array", description: "详情页区块和可用操作" }
],
"/file/resources/references": [
{ name: "data.fileId", type: "string", description: "文件 ID" },
{ name: "data.referenced / referenceCount / canDelete", type: "boolean/int/boolean", description: "是否被引用、引用数量和是否可删除" },
{ name: "data.references[]", type: "array", description: "引用列表；首期 type=room_share，包含 shareId、roomId、roomName、time" },
{ name: "data.referenceTypes", type: "array", description: "引用来源能力说明：room_share 为真实引用，message_file 为 fileId 生命周期失效状态" },
{ name: "data.messageReferences / messageReferenceInvalidCount / messageReferenceHint", type: "array/int/string", description: "消息文件引用失效状态；只展示 referenceInvalid，不伪造活跃消息引用" },
{ name: "data.reasonText", type: "string", description: "不可删除时可直接展示的原因" }
],
"/file/upload": [
{ name: "data.fileId", type: "string", description: "上传文件 ID，后续签名、下载、预览、群共享挂接都使用它" },
{ name: "data.url / downloadUrl / previewUrl", type: "string", description: "限时签名访问地址，previewUrl 仅支持可预览类型" },
{ name: "data.name / size / contentType / ext", type: "string/long/string/string", description: "文件名、大小、内容类型和扩展名" },
{ name: "data.signature / expiresAt", type: "string/long", description: "本次返回签名和过期时间" },
{ name: "data.scene / roomId / companyId", type: "string", description: "上传场景、群 ID 和企业 ID" },
{ name: "data.previewSupported / fileSource / fileStatus", type: "boolean/string/string", description: "预览能力、来源 local 和可访问状态" },
{ name: "data.referenced / referenceCount / canDelete", type: "boolean/int/boolean", description: "新上传文件默认未引用，可直接删除" }
],
"/file/sign": [
{ name: "data.fileId", type: "string", description: "文件 ID" },
{ name: "data.mode", type: "string", description: "download 或 preview" },
{ name: "data.signedUrl", type: "string", description: "本次指定 mode 的限时访问地址" },
{ name: "data.downloadUrl / previewUrl", type: "string", description: "下载和预览签名地址" },
{ name: "data.expiresAt / signature", type: "long/string", description: "签名过期时间和签名值" }
],
"/file/download": [
{ name: "binary", type: "stream", description: "签名有效时返回文件流，Content-Disposition=attachment" },
{ name: "resultCode/resultMsg", type: "json", description: "签名过期、篡改或文件删除时返回 JSON 错误" }
],
"/file/preview": [
{ name: "binary", type: "stream", description: "图片、文本、PDF 等可预览类型签名有效时返回 inline 文件流" },
{ name: "resultCode/resultMsg", type: "json", description: "不支持预览、签名过期、篡改或文件删除时返回 JSON 错误" }
],
"/file/delete": [
{ name: "data.deleted", type: "boolean", description: "是否已逻辑删除" },
{ name: "data.referenced / referenceCount / references", type: "boolean/int/array", description: "引用状态；被群共享引用时删除失败也会返回引用明细，已失效消息引用不阻止删除" },
{ name: "data.canDelete / reasonText", type: "boolean/string", description: "是否可删除和失败提示" },
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint", type: "string", description: "删除成功提示和说明" },
{ name: "data.nextActions / actionApis", type: "array/object", description: "删除成功后回到文件列表承接，并继续暴露查看引用与恢复入口" }
],
"/file/restore": [
{ name: "data.restored / deleted", type: "boolean/boolean", description: "是否恢复成功，以及恢复后的删除状态" },
{ name: "data.fileId / name / fileStatus / fileStatusText", type: "string/string/string/string", description: "恢复后的文件基础信息和状态" },
{ name: "data.referenced / referenceCount / references", type: "boolean/int/array", description: "恢复后的引用状态；仍返回群共享引用明细" },
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint", type: "string", description: "恢复成功提示和说明" },
{ name: "data.nextActions / actionApis", type: "array/object", description: "恢复成功后继续回当前文件详情，并保留重新签名和查看引用" }
],
"/file/reference/status": [
{ name: "data.fileId", type: "string", description: "文件 ID" },
{ name: "data.referenceInvalid", type: "boolean", description: "文件引用是否已失效（消息撤回/销毁后标记为 true）" },
{ name: "data.referenceInvalidReason", type: "string", description: "失效原因：message_withdraw / message_destroy" },
{ name: "data.referenceInvalidTime", type: "long", description: "引用失效时间（秒级时间戳）" },
{ name: "data.canDelete", type: "boolean", description: "引用失效后若无群共享引用则可删除" }
],
"/file/reference/invalidate": [
{ name: "data.fileId", type: "string", description: "文件 ID" },
{ name: "data.invalidated", type: "boolean", description: "是否成功标记为失效" },
{ name: "data.reason", type: "string", description: "失效原因：message_withdraw / message_destroy" },
{ name: "data.canDelete", type: "boolean", description: "失效后是否可删除（需同时无群共享引用）" },
{ name: "data.previousState", type: "string", description: "标记前状态：active / already_invalid" }
],
"/file/cleanup/run": [
{ name: "data.cleanupId / createTime", type: "string/long", description: "清理任务 ID 和执行时间，可用于查询日志详情" },
{ name: "data.scannedCount / deletedCount", type: "int/int", description: "本次扫描和清理的已逻辑删除文件数量" },
{ name: "data.skippedReferencedCount", type: "int", description: "仍存在引用而跳过的文件数量" },
{ name: "data.freedBytes / freedSizeText", type: "long/string", description: "本次释放的空间大小" },
{ name: "data.items[]", type: "array", description: "逐文件清理结果，包含 fileId、sizeText、cleaned、physicalDeleted、statusText、reasonText、referenceInvalid" },
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint", type: "string", description: "清理执行结果和说明" }
],
"/file/cleanup/logs": [
{ name: "data.total / items / logs", type: "long/array/array", description: "清理日志分页结果，items 与 logs 兼容同源" },
{ name: "data.items[].cleanupId / statusText", type: "string/string", description: "清理任务 ID 和状态文案" },
{ name: "data.items[].scannedCount / deletedCount / freedSizeText", type: "int/int/string", description: "清理统计摘要" },
{ name: "data.tableMetas / emptyState / actionApis", type: "array/object/object", description: "清理日志列表页展示辅助字段" }
],
"/file/cleanup/logs/detail": [
{ name: "data.cleanupId / operatorUserId / createTime", type: "string/int/long", description: "清理任务基础信息" },
{ name: "data.scannedCount / deletedCount / skippedReferencedCount", type: "int/int/int", description: "清理任务汇总统计" },
{ name: "data.items[]", type: "array", description: "逐文件清理结果，包含是否物理删除、清理状态、跳过原因和引用失效状态" },
{ name: "data.sectionMetas / actionApis", type: "array/object", description: "详情页区块和操作入口" }
],
"/file/cleanup/config": [
{ name: "data.retentionDays / autoCleanupEnabled / maxFilesPerRun", type: "int/boolean/int", description: "清理策略：保留天数/自动开关/单次清理上限" },
{ name: "data.lastRunTime / updateTime", type: "long/long", description: "上次自动清理时间和配置更新时间" }
],
"/file/cleanup/preview": [
{ name: "data.cleanupId", type: "string", description: "固定为 \"preview\"，不执行实际删除" },
{ name: "data.scannedCount / wouldDeleteCount / skippedReferencedCount", type: "int/int/int", description: "预览统计：扫描/将删除/有引用跳过" },
{ name: "data.wouldFreeBytes / wouldFreeSizeText", type: "long/string", description: "预计释放空间" },
{ name: "data.items[].status / statusText", type: "string/string", description: "would_delete=将被清理，skipped=有引用将跳过" }
],
"/file/cleanup/fixture/expire": [
{ name: "data.fixture", type: "boolean", description: "固定 true，仅用于测试环境 HTTP-only 回归夹具" },
{ name: "data.fileId", type: "string", description: "已逻辑删除且被老化的文件 ID" },
{ name: "data.oldDeleteTime / deleteTime", type: "long/long", description: "老化前/后的删除时间" },
{ name: "data.cleanupReady", type: "boolean", description: "是否已满足后续 /file/cleanup/run 验证条件" }
],
"/file/compress": [
{ name: "data.fileId / ext", type: "string/string", description: "文件 ID 和类型" },
{ name: "data.originalSize / originalSizeText", type: "long/string", description: "压缩前文件大小" },
{ name: "data.compressedSize / compressedSizeText / compressionRatio", type: "long/string/double", description: "压缩后大小和压缩率（1.0=未压缩）" },
{ name: "data.compressed", type: "boolean", description: "是否实际压缩（false=工具不可用或已是最优）" },
{ name: "data.maxWidth", type: "int", description: "最大宽度像素，默认 1920" },
{ name: "data.storageUpdated", type: "boolean", description: "存储文件是否已更新" },
{ name: "data.skipReason", type: "string", description: "未压缩原因（仅 storageUpdated=false 时返回）" }
],
"/file/compress/async": [
{ name: "data.accepted", type: "boolean", description: "异步任务提交成功，后台执行压缩，通过 detail 查看状态" },
{ name: "data.maxWidth", type: "int", description: "最大宽度像素，默认 1920" }
],
"/file/convert": [
{ name: "data.fileId / originalExt / targetFormat", type: "string/string/string", description: "文件 ID、原始扩展名、目标格式（mp4）" },
{ name: "data.originalSize / originalSizeText", type: "long/string", description: "转码前文件大小" },
{ name: "data.convertedSize / convertedSizeText", type: "long/string", description: "转码后文件大小" },
{ name: "data.converted", type: "boolean", description: "是否实际转码（false=工具不可用或已是 MP4）" },
{ name: "data.storageUpdated", type: "boolean", description: "存储文件是否已更新为 MP4" }
],
"/file/convert/async": [
{ name: "data.accepted", type: "boolean", description: "异步任务提交成功，后台执行转码，通过 detail 查看状态" },
{ name: "data.targetFormat", type: "string", description: "目标格式 mp4" }
],
"/file/thumbnail": [
{ name: "data.accepted", type: "boolean", description: "异步任务提交成功，后台生成缩略图" },
{ name: "data.thumbnailUrl", type: "string", description: "缩略图访问地址（/file/thumbnail/{fileId}）" }
],
"/room/openim/qr/create": [
{ name: "data.code", type: "string", description: "二维码短码" },
{ name: "data.qrText", type: "string", description: "前端用于渲染二维码的文本" },
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint / nextActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "生成二维码后的操作提示和后续动作" },
{ name: "data.expireTime", type: "long", description: "过期时间" }
],
"/room/openim/qr/detail": [
{ name: "data.code / inviteId", type: "string/string", description: "当前二维码短码和记录ID" },
{ name: "data.status / statusText", type: "int/string", description: "二维码状态：1生效中，-1已禁用，3已过期" },
{ name: "data.expireTime / createTime", type: "long/long", description: "二维码过期时间和创建时间" },
{ name: "data.detailApi / rowActions", type: "string/array", description: "当前二维码详情入口和后续动作" }
],
"/room/openim/qrs": [
{ name: "data.total", type: "long", description: "二维码总数" },
{ name: "data.items", type: "array", description: "二维码列表" },
{ name: "data.items[].code / inviteId", type: "string/string", description: "二维码短码和记录ID" },
{ name: "data.items[].status / statusText", type: "int/string", description: "二维码状态：1生效中，-1已禁用，3已过期" },
{ name: "data.items[].detailApi / rowActions", type: "string/array", description: "二维码详情入口和可用动作；仅生效中二维码返回 disable" }
],
"/room/openim/qr/disable": [
{ name: "data.code", type: "string", description: "已禁用的二维码短码" },
{ name: "data.status / statusText", type: "int/string", description: "禁用后的二维码状态" },
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint / nextActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "禁用后的操作提示和后续动作" }
],
"/room/openim/qr/resolve": [
{ name: "data.roomId", type: "string", description: "短码对应旧系统群 ID" },
{ name: "data.roomName", type: "string", description: "群名称" },
{ name: "data.roomCard / joinMetas / nextStep", type: "object/object/string", description: "扫码入群页可直接渲染的群卡片、入群按钮和下一步" },
{ name: "data.needVerify", type: "boolean", description: "是否需要入群审核" },
{ name: "data.joined", type: "boolean", description: "当前用户是否已在群内" }
],
"/room/openim/qr/join": [
{ name: "data.joined", type: "boolean", description: "是否已直接入群" },
{ name: "data.needVerify", type: "boolean", description: "是否已提交审核" },
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint / nextActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "入群或提交审核后的前端提示；待审核成功时 detail 落到当前申请，直接入群成功时 detail 落到群详情" },
{ name: "data.requestId", type: "string", description: "入群申请 ID" },
{ name: "data.openIM", type: "object", description: "入群成功后的 OpenIM 群映射" }
],
"/room/openim/join-requests": [
{ name: "data.total", type: "long", description: "申请总数" },
{ name: "data.items", type: "array", description: "入群申请列表" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / data.tableMetas / data.emptyState", type: "object/array/object", description: "入群审核页展示辅助字段" },
{ name: "data.items[].displayTitle / detailApi / rowActions", type: "string/string/array", description: "申请行展示标题、当前申请详情入口和可用操作；仅 status=0 待审核时返回 handle" },
{ name: "data.items[].status", type: "int", description: "0待审核，1已通过，2已拒绝，3已过期" }
],
"/room/openim/join-request/detail": [
{ name: "data.request.requestId / roomId / roomName", type: "string/string/string", description: "当前申请 ID、所属群 ID 和群名称" },
{ name: "data.request.userId / applyReason / inviteCode", type: "int/string/string", description: "申请人、申请原因和来源二维码 code" },
{ name: "data.request.status / handleUserId / handleRemark / handleTime", type: "int/int/string/long", description: "处理状态、处理人、处理备注和处理时间" },
{ name: "data.permissions / rowActions / openIM", type: "object/array/object", description: "当前用户可执行动作和 OpenIM 同步结果；permissions.canHandle 与 rowActions.handle 仅待审核申请返回" }
],
"/room/openim/group-helpers": [
{ name: "data.roomId / roomJid / roomName", type: "string", description: "当前群 ID、JID 和名称" },
{ name: "data.myRole / myRoleText / canManage", type: "int/string/boolean", description: "当前查看人角色和是否可管理群助手" },
{ name: "data.items[].groupHelperId / helperId / detailApi", type: "string/string/string", description: "群助手记录 ID、助手 ID 和当前助手详情入口；detailApi 统一落到 /room/openim/group-helpers/detail" },
{ name: "data.items[].rowActions / actionApis", type: "array/object", description: "按当前查看人权限返回的动作入口；普通成员不再暴露 add/delete/keyword 写操作" },
{ name: "data.items[].keywords[].keyword / value / canManageKeyword / rowActions", type: "string/string/boolean/array", description: "关键词回复内容、是否可管理关键词及实际可执行动作；仅群主/管理员返回 update/delete" },
{ name: "data.permissionMetas / fieldMetas / tableMetas", type: "array/array/array", description: "群助手页面权限、字段和表格展示契约" }
],
"/room/openim/group-helpers/detail": [
{ name: "data.helper / groupHelper", type: "object", description: "当前已安装群助手详情，包含 detailApi、rowActions、keywords、keywordCount 和权限感知动作" },
{ name: "data.helperId / groupHelperId / detailApi", type: "string/string/string", description: "当前助手 ID、群助手记录 ID 和稳定详情入口" },
{ name: "data.keywords / keywordCount / keywordTableMetas", type: "array/int/array", description: "当前助手的自动回复关键字列表、数量和关键字表格展示契约" },
{ name: "data.nextActions / actionApis", type: "array/object", description: "详情页后续动作；成功态 detail 继续落到当前助手，删除助手成功后回到已添加助手列表" }
],
"/room/openim/red-packet": [
{ name: "data.canSend", type: "boolean", description: "是否可以发送红包" },
{ name: "data.roomId / roomJid", type: "string", description: "群 ID 和 JID" },
{ name: "data.role", type: "int", description: "1群主 2管理员 3普通成员" },
{ name: "data.allowedMessageTypes", type: "array", description: "支持的红包类型列表" },
{ name: "data.maxAmount / maxCount", type: "double/int", description: "红包金额上限和个数上限" },
{ name: "data.id", type: "string", description: "红包ID（ObjectId 24位字符串）" },
{ name: "data.type", type: "int", description: "1普通 2拼手气 4固定金额 5专属" },
{ name: "data.money / over", type: "double", description: "红包总金额和剩余金额" },
{ name: "data.count / receiveCount", type: "int", description: "红包总个数和已领取个数" },
{ name: "data.greetings", type: "string", description: "祝福语" },
{ name: "data.sendTime", type: "long", description: "发送时间戳" },
{ name: "data.status", type: "int", description: "1可领 2已领完 -1已退款" },
{ name: "data.userName", type: "string", description: "发送者昵称" },
{ name: "data.isSender / isReceived", type: "boolean", description: "是否发送者/是否已领取" },
{ name: "data.receivers[]", type: "array", description: "已领取用户列表" },
{ name: "data.sdkPayload", type: "object", description: "前端发送 OpenIM 自定义消息的 payload" },
{ name: "sdkPayload.redPacketId", type: "string", description: "红包ID" },
{ name: "sdkPayload.status", type: "int", description: "红包状态，1=可领取，2=已领完" },
{ name: "sdkPayload.type", type: "int", description: "1普通 2拼手气 4固定 5专属" },
{ name: "sdkPayload.money / count", type: "double/int", description: "红包金额/个数" },
{ name: "data.items[]", type: "array", description: "群红包列表" },
{ name: "data.actionApis / data.rowActions / data.nextActions", type: "object/array/array", description: "当前用户实际可执行的动作入口；专属红包仅目标用户继续返回 open" }
]
};
const csvExportResponseFields = [
{ name: "data.fileName", type: "string", description: "前端生成下载文件时使用的 CSV 文件名" },
{ name: "data.encoding", type: "string", description: "固定 UTF-8，前端可按 UTF-8 生成 Blob" },
{ name: "data.total", type: "int", description: "本次导出的记录数；超过 5000 行时接口失败并提示缩小筛选范围" },
{ name: "data.csvText", type: "string", description: "CSV 文本内容，第一行为表头；接口返回 JSON，不直接返回二进制流" },
{ name: "data.exportedAt", type: "long", description: "导出生成时间戳" },
{ name: "data.pageMetas / data.actionApis", type: "object", description: "导出页说明和关联列表接口入口" }
];
[
"/console/platform/operation-logs/export.csv",
"/console/enterprise/operation-logs/export.csv",
"/console/platform/security/login-audit-logs/export.csv",
"/console/enterprise/security/login-audit-logs/export.csv",
"/console/platform/messages/governance/logs/export.csv",
"/console/enterprise/messages/governance/logs/export.csv",
"/console/platform/messages/destroy/logs/export.csv",
"/console/enterprise/messages/destroy/logs/export.csv",
"/console/platform/messages/burn-after-read/logs/export.csv",
"/console/enterprise/messages/burn-after-read/logs/export.csv"
].forEach(path => { responseFieldDocs[path] = csvExportResponseFields; });
const totpResetResponseFields = [
{ name: "data.requestId", type: "string", description: "TOTP 重置申请 ID" },
{ name: "data.status / statusText", type: "string", description: "pending/approved/rejected 及中文状态" },
{ name: "data.successMessage / operationHint", type: "string", description: "申请或审批后的前端提示" },
{ name: "data.rowActions / actionApis", type: "array/object", description: "审批、拒绝、详情和重新绑定入口" }
];
const robotResponseFields = [
{ name: "data.robotId / roomId", type: "string/string", description: "机器人 ID 和群 ID" },
{ name: "data.name / robotType / webhookUrl", type: "string/string/string", description: "机器人名称、类型和 webhook 地址" },
{ name: "data.enabled / statusText", type: "boolean/string", description: "机器人是否启用和状态文案" },
{ name: "data.canManageRobot / permissions", type: "boolean/object", description: "当前查看人是否可管理机器人，以及配置/启停/删除/关键词写操作权限" },
{ name: "data.rowActions / actionApis", type: "array/object", description: "当前查看人实际可执行的动作入口；非创建者默认只返回 detail" }
];
[
"/room/openim/robot/create",
"/room/openim/robot/list",
"/room/openim/robot/detail",
"/room/openim/robot/config",
"/room/openim/robot/disable",
"/room/openim/robot/enable",
"/room/openim/robot/keywords/add",
"/room/openim/robot/keywords/delete",
"/room/openim/robot/keywords/list"
].forEach(path => { responseFieldDocs[path] = robotResponseFields; });
[
"/console/platform/security/totp/reset-request",
"/console/platform/security/totp/reset-requests",
"/console/platform/security/totp/reset-requests/detail",
"/console/platform/security/totp/reset-requests/handle",
"/console/enterprise/security/totp/reset-request",
"/console/enterprise/security/totp/reset-requests",
"/console/enterprise/security/totp/reset-requests/detail",
"/console/enterprise/security/totp/reset-requests/handle"
].forEach(path => { responseFieldDocs[path] = totpResetResponseFields; });
const bodyTemplates = {
"/account/code/send": `{
"areaCode": "+86",
"phoneNumber": "18888888888",
"usedFor": 1
}`,
"/account/code/verify": `{
"areaCode": "+86",
"phoneNumber": "18888888888",
"verifyCode": "666666",
"usedFor": 1
}`,
"/account/login": `{
"areaCode": "+86",
"phoneNumber": "18888888888",
"password": "70d6d9ff1baec4733fc93c9d12257e91",
"deviceID": "web-debug-001"
}`,
"/account/register": `{
"deviceID": "web-debug-001",
"enterpriseCode": "LOCALTEST001",
"user": {
"areaCode": "+86",
"phoneNumber": "18888888888",
"password": "70d6d9ff1baec4733fc93c9d12257e91",
"nickname": "test-user",
"gender": 0,
"faceURL": ""
}
}`
};
const publicPaths = new Set([
"/account/code/send",
"/account/code/verify",
"/account/register",
"/account/login",
"/config",
"/config/openim/status",
"/console/login/context",
"/console/login",
"/console/platform/security/login/precheck",
"/console/enterprise/security/login/precheck",
"/console/security/login/guard-result",
"/enterprise/code/validate"
]);
const frontendApiGroups = [
{
"name": "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序",
"operations": [
{
"id": "sdk--01-env-check",
"path": "sdk://01-env-check",
"method": "sdk",
"tag": "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序",
"summary": "步骤 1 环境检查：调用 GET /config/openim/status，确认 resultCode=1、openimReachable=true，并读取 data.apiURL、data.wsURL、data.platformID 供 SDK 初始化。",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "sdk--02-user-login",
"path": "sdk://02-user-login",
"method": "sdk",
"tag": "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序",
"summary": "步骤 2 用户登录/注册：调用 POST /account/login 或 POST /account/register（注册需 enterpriseCode，无需短信验证码）。保存 data.access_token 调 Java 后端，保存 data.openIM.userID/token/apiURL/wsURL 调 OpenIM SDK。业务 token 与 OpenIM token 不可混用。",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "sdk--03-sdk-init",
"path": "sdk://03-sdk-init",
"method": "sdk",
"tag": "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序",
"summary": "步骤 3 OpenIM SDK 初始化（端上执行，非 HTTP）：使用步骤 1/2 的 apiURL、wsURL、platformID 初始化 SDK，再用 data.openIM.userID 和 data.openIM.token 登录。登录成功后建立 WS，拉取会话和离线消息。",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "sdk--04-token-refresh",
"path": "sdk://04-token-refresh",
"method": "sdk",
"tag": "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序",
"summary": "步骤 4 OpenIM token 刷新：SDK 报 token 失效时，带业务 access_token 调用 GET /user/openim/token，用返回的 data.token 重新 SDK 登录。不要直接用业务 access_token 调 OpenIM。",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "sdk--04b-rtc-token",
"path": "sdk://04b-rtc-token",
"method": "sdk",
"tag": "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序",
"summary": "步骤 4B 单聊语音/视频拨号准备：前端用业务 access_token 调 POST /user/rtc/get_token，并在 URL 查询参数中传 room、identity。返回 data.serverUrl 和 data.token 后，再交给 LiveKit/RTC SDK 入会；不要直接复用 OpenIM token 或历史 Agora 配置。",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "sdk--05-single-send",
"path": "sdk://05-single-send",
"method": "sdk",
"tag": "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序",
"summary": "步骤 5 单聊发消息：先 POST /friend/openim/send-before?peerUserId=...&messageType=...，allowed=true 后再用 OpenIM SDK 发送。宵禁或权限拦截时 allowed=false，前端不得调用 SDK 发送。",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "sdk--06-group-send",
"path": "sdk://06-group-send",
"method": "sdk",
"tag": "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序",
"summary": "步骤 6 群聊发消息：先 POST /room/openim/send-before?roomId=...&messageType=...，canSend=true 且返回 data.openIM.groupID 后再用 SDK 发群消息。@全体、文件、企业开关和宵禁规则在此步拦截。",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "sdk--07-file-send",
"path": "sdk://07-file-send",
"method": "sdk",
"tag": "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序",
"summary": "步骤 7 文件消息：群/单聊 send-before（messageType=file）→ GET /file/upload/context → POST /file/upload 上传 → 用返回 URL/fileId 构造 SDK 文件消息发送。群共享文件另走 /room/openim/share/add 挂接 fileId。",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "sdk--08-merge-forward",
"path": "sdk://08-merge-forward",
"method": "sdk",
"tag": "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序",
"summary": "步骤 8 合并转发：GET /message/merge/context → POST /message/merge/preview（auditIds 来自搜索 items[].id）→ POST /message/merge/forward-before → 前端用返回 mergePayload/sdkPayload 调 OpenIM SDK 发送。后端 sdkSendRequired=true，不代发。",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "sdk--09-search-favorite",
"path": "sdk://09-search-favorite",
"method": "sdk",
"tag": "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序",
"summary": "步骤 9 搜索与收藏：GET /room/openim/messages/search 或 /friend/openim/messages/search 查审计消息 → POST /message/favorites/add 或 /message/favorites/merge 收藏。合并保存另走 /message/merge/save，不影响原消息。",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "sdk--10-console-login",
"path": "sdk://10-console-login",
"method": "sdk",
"tag": "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序",
"summary": "步骤 10 后台页面：GET /console/login/context 解析登录表单 → POST /console/login 获取后台 access_token。高危操作先调 high-risk/confirm-token；菜单权限看 /console/platform/profile 或 /console/enterprise/profile 的 permissionCodes。",
"parameters": []
}
]
},
{
"name": "测试环境总回归",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--config-openim-status-test-env-full-regression",
"path": "/config/openim/status",
"method": "get",
"tag": "测试环境总回归",
"summary": "测试环境基础健康检查。默认测试环境 http://47.238.134.161:8092，返回 resultCode=1 后再继续联调",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--config-dev-admin-token-test-env-full-regression",
"path": "/config/dev/admin-token",
"method": "get",
"tag": "测试环境总回归",
"summary": "测试环境临时获取后台 access_token。默认 userId=10000005，需要 userRoles 中具备 role=5 或 role=6",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "后台管理员用户ID，测试环境默认 10000005"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--openim-swagger-html-test-env-full-regression",
"path": "/openim-swagger.html",
"method": "get",
"tag": "测试环境总回归",
"summary": "前端精选联调文档。总回归 v5/v6/v7 需能搜索到 announcements、permissions/catalog、/console/platform/permissions/catalog、platform_managers:manage、super_admin、curfew、default-permissions/apply、default-permissions/presets、default-permissions/tasks、default-permissions/rollback、rollback_room_default_permissions、admin-devices、login-anomalies、login-anomalies/detail、handle-with-action、recommendedActions、guard-result、securityActions、trust_device、security/notifications、notification-templates、notification-preferences、delivery-logs、deliver-retry、notifications/stats、notifications/trends、security/diagnostics、security/overview、export/notifications.csv、repeatCount、站内通知、frontend-feedback、callback/status、dashboard/trends、users/sessions、creatorUserId、企业专项管理、平台专项管理、sensitive-words、sensitive-hits、announcements/detail、announcements/update、announcements/offline、create-requests、开群申请审批、待处理入群申请群",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "script--check-test-env-full-regression",
"path": "scripts/check-test-env-full-regression.sh",
"method": "get",
"tag": "测试环境总回归",
"summary": "服务器项目目录执行：BASE_URL=http://47.238.134.161:8092 ROOM_ID=6a26c334644656745c347c7f ADMIN_USER_ID=10000005 TEST_ADMIN_USER_ID=10000008 ./scripts/check-test-env-full-regression.sh。脚本串联公共鉴权、后台 OpenIM、后台安全三期/四期/五期/六期/七期、平台权限、系统公告、企业权限模板二期、宵禁策略和群默认权限模板，并提示安全开关复位命令；安全脚本必须顺序执行，平台权限可单独执行 check-platform-permission-apis.sh",
"parameters": [
{"name": "BASE_URL", "in": "env", "required": false, "description": "默认 http://47.238.134.161:8092"},
{"name": "ROOM_ID", "in": "env", "required": false, "description": "测试群ID，默认 6a26c334644656745c347c7f"},
{"name": "ADMIN_USER_ID", "in": "env", "required": false, "description": "后台管理员用户ID，默认 10000005"},
{"name": "TEST_ADMIN_USER_ID", "in": "env", "required": false, "description": "平台权限专项测试管理员，默认 10000008"}
]
},
{
"id": "script--check-console-security-phase7",
"path": "scripts/check-console-security-phase7.sh",
"method": "get",
"tag": "测试环境总回归",
"summary": "后台安全七期站内通知专项：验证默认关闭不生成通知，开启提醒后生成 admin_new_device / admin_device_untrusted 通知，覆盖列表、详情、未读数、已读、处理和企业范围隔离",
"parameters": [
{"name": "BASE_URL", "in": "env", "required": false, "description": "默认 http://127.0.0.1:8092，测试环境使用 http://47.238.134.161:8092"},
{"name": "ADMIN_USER_ID", "in": "env", "required": false, "description": "后台管理员用户ID，默认 10000005"}
]
},
{
"id": "script--check-frontend-feedback-apis",
"path": "scripts/check-frontend-feedback-apis.sh",
"method": "get",
"tag": "测试环境总回归",
"summary": "产品反馈调整 v1 / frontend-feedback 前端契约专项：验证 login/precheck、guard-result、admin-devices、login-anomalies、default-permissions preview/diff/tasks/detail、permissions/catalog 的稳定展示字段",
"parameters": [
{"name": "BASE_URL", "in": "env", "required": false, "description": "默认 http://127.0.0.1:8092，测试环境使用 http://47.238.134.161:8092"},
{"name": "ADMIN_USER_ID", "in": "env", "required": false, "description": "后台管理员用户ID，默认 10000005"},
{"name": "TEST_ADMIN_USER_ID", "in": "env", "required": false, "description": "平台权限测试管理员，默认 10000008"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "平台后台权限",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--console-platform-profile",
"path": "/console/platform/profile",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台后台权限",
"summary": "查询当前平台管理员资料和最终权限。前端用 data.permissions.permissionCodes 控制平台后台菜单和按钮；role=6 永远全权限，role=5 未绑定角色时兼容全权限",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-permissions-catalog",
"path": "/console/platform/permissions/catalog",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台后台权限",
"summary": "查询平台后台固定权限目录。返回 platform_managers:manage、announcements:update、operation_logs:view、menuGroups、highRiskActions 和内置角色 super_admin/operator/auditor/security_admin/content_admin",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-roles",
"path": "/console/platform/roles",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台后台权限",
"summary": "查询平台后台角色模板，包含内置角色和自定义角色；列表项 detailApi 现在统一指向真实详情接口 /console/platform/roles/detail",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-roles-detail",
"path": "/console/platform/roles/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台后台权限",
"summary": "平台后台角色模板详情；返回当前角色模板完整字段与 rowActions/actionApis，供列表 detailApi 与新增/更新/删除成功态 nextActions.detail 统一承接",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roleId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "角色模板ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-roles-add",
"path": "/console/platform/roles/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台后台权限",
"summary": "新增平台后台角色模板。需要 platform_managers:manage；开启高危确认时需 action=add_platform_console_role 的 confirmToken；成功态 nextActions.detail 统一回当前角色模板详情接口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roleName", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "角色名称"},
{"name": "permissionCodes", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "权限 code，多个用英文逗号分隔"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-roles-update",
"path": "/console/platform/roles/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台后台权限",
"summary": "更新平台后台角色模板名称、权限集合或启用状态。内置 super_admin 不可修改；开启高危确认时需 action=update_platform_console_role 的 confirmToken；成功态 nextActions.detail 统一回当前角色模板详情接口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roleId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "角色ID"},
{"name": "roleName", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "角色名称"},
{"name": "permissionCodes", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "权限 code，多个用英文逗号分隔"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-roles-delete",
"path": "/console/platform/roles/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台后台权限",
"summary": "删除平台后台自定义角色模板。内置角色不可删除；角色仍被管理员绑定时会失败；开启高危确认时需 action=delete_platform_console_role 的 confirmToken；成功态 nextActions.detail 统一回当前角色模板详情接口。如需保留角色但停用，请使用 /console/platform/roles/update 的 enabled 字段",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roleId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "角色ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-managers-assign-role",
"path": "/console/platform/managers/assign-role",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台后台权限",
"summary": "给 role=5 平台管理员分配平台角色。role=6 超级管理员不能被降权；开启高危确认时需 action=assign_platform_console_role 的 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "平台管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "roleId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "角色ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-managers-permissions",
"path": "/console/platform/managers/permissions",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台后台权限",
"summary": "查询当前平台管理员或指定平台管理员的最终权限，用于权限排查和前端权限展示",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "平台管理员用户ID；不传则查询当前管理员"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "群默认权限模板",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-default-permissions",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/default-permissions",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板",
"summary": "平台后台查询全局新群默认权限模板。二期字段包含 allowMemberPrivateChat、allowAddFriend、allowAtAll、allowSendRedPacket、allowConference、allowCreateNotice、allowCreateTask；默认只影响后续新建群",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-rooms-default-permissions-update",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/default-permissions/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "群默认权限模板",
"summary": "平台后台更新全局新群默认权限模板。开启 highRiskConfirmEnabled 时需携带 action=update_room_default_permissions 的 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用模板"},
{"name": "showMember", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否显示群成员"},
{"name": "allowSendCard", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许发送名片"},
{"name": "allowInviteFriend", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许邀请好友"},
{"name": "allowUploadFile", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许上传群文件"},
{"name": "allowQuitRoom", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许主动退群"},
{"name": "isNeedVerify", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，入群是否需要审核"},
{"name": "showRead", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否显示已读"},
{"name": "isAttritionNotice", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，群减员是否通知"},
{"name": "allowMemberPrivateChat", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员私聊"},
{"name": "allowAddFriend", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员互加好友"},
{"name": "allowAtAll", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员@全体成员"},
{"name": "allowSendRedPacket", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员发送红包"},
{"name": "allowConference", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员发起会议"},
{"name": "allowCreateNotice", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员创建公告"},
{"name": "allowCreateTask", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员创建任务"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-default-permissions-effective",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/default-permissions/effective",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板",
"summary": "平台后台查询指定企业最终生效的新群默认权限模板。source=enterprise/platform/legacy_config",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业ID，不传时按平台/旧配置计算"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-default-permissions-preview",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/default-permissions/preview",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "平台后台预览最终生效模板、来源、fieldMetas、editableFields 和 unsupportedFields，供前端配置页渲染",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业ID，不传则按平台范围预览"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-default-permissions-presets",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/default-permissions/presets",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "平台后台查询内置预设模板。返回 open_chat、strict_review、file_disabled、read_receipt_enabled、silent_operation；预设只供前端套用，保存仍调用 update",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-default-permissions-diff",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/default-permissions/diff",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "平台后台只读统计历史群与最终模板的差异，不落库",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "限定企业范围"},
{"name": "roomIds", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "逗号分隔群ID"},
{"name": "onlyMissing", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "true 时只统计缺失字段"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-rooms-default-permissions-apply",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/default-permissions/apply",
"method": "post",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "平台后台手动批量应用模板到历史群。dryRun=true 只预览；dryRun=false 落库并返回 taskId；async=true 当前同步完成任务记录；高危开启时需 action=apply_room_default_permissions 的 confirmToken；单次最多 200 个群",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "限定企业范围"},
{"name": "roomIds", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "逗号分隔群ID"},
{"name": "onlyMissing", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "true 时只补缺失字段"},
{"name": "dryRun", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "默认 true，只预览不落库"},
{"name": "async", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "true 时返回任务ID；当前版本同步完成任务记录"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-default-permissions-tasks",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/default-permissions/tasks",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "平台后台查询模板应用任务列表，返回 taskId、status、sampleRooms、successCount/failCount/skippedCount",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "限定企业范围"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-default-permissions-tasks-detail",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/default-permissions/tasks/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "平台后台查询模板应用任务详情，包含 beforeSnapshot/afterSnapshot 供排障和回滚",
"parameters": [
{"name": "taskId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "任务ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-rooms-default-permissions-rollback",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/default-permissions/rollback",
"method": "post",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "平台后台按 taskId 回滚历史群权限应用。高危开启时需 action=rollback_room_default_permissions 的 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "taskId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "任务ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms-default-permissions",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/default-permissions",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板",
"summary": "企业后台查询本企业新群默认权限模板。需要 rooms:view 权限",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-rooms-default-permissions-update",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/default-permissions/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "群默认权限模板",
"summary": "企业后台更新本企业新群默认权限模板。需要 rooms:write 权限，不能通过 companyId 越权",
"parameters": [
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用模板"},
{"name": "showMember", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否显示群成员"},
{"name": "allowSendCard", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许发送名片"},
{"name": "allowInviteFriend", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许邀请好友"},
{"name": "allowUploadFile", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许上传群文件"},
{"name": "allowQuitRoom", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许主动退群"},
{"name": "isNeedVerify", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，入群是否需要审核"},
{"name": "showRead", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否显示已读"},
{"name": "isAttritionNotice", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，群减员是否通知"},
{"name": "allowMemberPrivateChat", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员私聊"},
{"name": "allowAddFriend", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员互加好友"},
{"name": "allowAtAll", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员@全体成员"},
{"name": "allowSendRedPacket", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员发送红包"},
{"name": "allowConference", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员发起会议"},
{"name": "allowCreateNotice", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员创建公告"},
{"name": "allowCreateTask", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0/1，是否允许群成员创建任务"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业后台不允许传其他企业ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms-default-permissions-effective",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/default-permissions/effective",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板",
"summary": "企业后台查询本企业最终生效的新群默认权限模板。前端展示 source 和字段值即可",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms-default-permissions-preview",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/default-permissions/preview",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "企业后台预览本企业最终模板、fieldMetas、editableFields 和 unsupportedFields。需要 rooms:view 权限",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms-default-permissions-presets",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/default-permissions/presets",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "企业后台查询内置预设模板。预设只供前端套用，保存仍调用 update",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms-default-permissions-diff",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/default-permissions/diff",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "企业后台只读统计本企业历史群与模板差异，不允许越权 roomIds",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomIds", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "逗号分隔群ID"},
{"name": "onlyMissing", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "true 时只统计缺失字段"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-rooms-default-permissions-apply",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/default-permissions/apply",
"method": "post",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "企业后台手动批量应用模板到本企业历史群。dryRun=true 只预览；dryRun=false 落库并返回 taskId；高危开启时需 action=apply_room_default_permissions 的 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomIds", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "逗号分隔群ID"},
{"name": "onlyMissing", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "true 时只补缺失字段"},
{"name": "dryRun", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "默认 true，只预览不落库"},
{"name": "async", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "true 时返回任务ID；当前版本同步完成任务记录"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业后台不允许传其他企业ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms-default-permissions-tasks",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/default-permissions/tasks",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "企业后台查询本企业模板应用任务列表，不能查看其他企业任务",
"parameters": [
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms-default-permissions-tasks-detail",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/default-permissions/tasks/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "企业后台查询本企业模板应用任务详情，包含 beforeSnapshot/afterSnapshot",
"parameters": [
{"name": "taskId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "任务ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-rooms-default-permissions-rollback",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/default-permissions/rollback",
"method": "post",
"tag": "群默认权限模板三期",
"summary": "企业后台按 taskId 回滚本企业历史群权限应用。高危开启时需 action=rollback_room_default_permissions 的 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "taskId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "任务ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-add-default-permissions-note",
"path": "/room/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "群默认权限模板",
"summary": "创建群时如果未显式传 showMember、allowUploadFile、allowConference、allowCreateTask 等权限字段，则按企业模板、平台模板、旧 Config 顺序应用默认值；显式参数优先",
"parameters": [
{"name": "name", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "群名称"},
{"name": "showMember", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "显式传入时优先于默认模板"},
{"name": "allowUploadFile", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "显式传入时优先于默认模板"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "后台安全三期",
"operations": [
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-login-precheck",
"path": "/console/platform/security/login/precheck",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全三期",
"summary": "平台后台登录安全预检。登录页可无 token 调用，只返回安全状态，不签发凭证",
"parameters": [
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "后台登录账号/手机号/用户ID"},
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "已知管理员用户ID，可选；用于判断 TOTP 状态"},
