{"name": "ip", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录来源 IP，可选；不传使用请求 IP"},
{"name": "totpCode", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "本次登录 6 位 TOTP 动态码；开启 TOTP 时必填，未开启可不传/留空"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-login-result",
"path": "/console/platform/security/login/result",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全三期",
"summary": "平台后台登录结果记录。真实后台登录入口或前端联调可调用，用于写入失败锁定闭环",
"parameters": [
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "后台登录账号/手机号/用户ID"},
{"name": "success", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否登录成功"},
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "ip", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录来源 IP"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "失败或成功原因，例如 bad_password / success"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-login-precheck",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/login/precheck",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全三期",
"summary": "企业后台登录安全预检。登录页可无 token 调用，只返回安全状态，不签发凭证",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "企业ID"},
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "后台登录账号/手机号/用户ID"},
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "已知企业管理员用户ID，可选；用于判断 TOTP 状态"},
{"name": "ip", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录来源 IP，可选；不传使用请求 IP"},
{"name": "totpCode", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "本次登录 6 位 TOTP 动态码；开启 TOTP 时必填，未开启可不传/留空"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-login-result",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/login/result",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全三期",
"summary": "企业后台登录结果记录。真实后台登录入口或前端联调可调用，用于写入失败锁定闭环",
"parameters": [
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "后台登录账号/手机号/用户ID"},
{"name": "success", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否登录成功"},
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "ip", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录来源 IP"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "失败或成功原因，例如 bad_password / success"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-high-risk-confirm-token-phase3",
"path": "/console/platform/security/high-risk/confirm-token",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全三期",
"summary": "生成一次性高危操作确认 token。开启 highRiskConfirmEnabled 后，群配置、群转让、管理员设置等操作需携带 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "action", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "动作，例如 update_room_config / transfer_room / set_room_admin"},
{"name": "targetType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "目标类型，例如 room / user / company"},
{"name": "targetId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "目标 ID"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "后台安全流程增强",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-config-security-flow",
"path": "/console/platform/security/config",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全流程增强",
"summary": "平台后台安全配置详情。新增 ipWhitelistMetas/ipWhitelistCheck/totpMetas，前端可直接展示 IP 白名单和 TOTP 策略说明",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-login-precheck-security-flow",
"path": "/console/platform/security/login/precheck",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全流程增强",
"summary": "平台后台登录预检。返回 ipWhitelistCheck/ipWhitelistReasonText/totpRequired/totpBound/totpVerified，登录页可解释失败原因",
"parameters": [
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "后台登录账号/手机号/用户ID"},
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "ip", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录来源 IP"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-totp-reset-request",
"path": "/console/platform/security/totp/reset-request",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全流程增强",
"summary": "平台管理员提交 TOTP 重置申请。默认申请当前用户；超级管理员也可传 userId 代申请",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "目标管理员用户ID，不传为当前用户"},
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录账号展示字段"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "申请原因"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-totp-reset-requests",
"path": "/console/platform/security/totp/reset-requests",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全流程增强",
"summary": "平台后台 TOTP 重置申请列表。需要 security:view，可按 userId/status 筛选",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "申请用户ID"},
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "pending/approved/rejected"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-totp-reset-requests-detail",
"path": "/console/platform/security/totp/reset-requests/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全流程增强",
"summary": "平台后台 TOTP 重置申请详情",
"parameters": [{"name": "requestId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "申请ID"}]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-totp-reset-requests-handle",
"path": "/console/platform/security/totp/reset-requests/handle",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全流程增强",
"summary": "平台后台审批 TOTP 重置申请。approved=true 时清空旧 TOTP，用户需要重新绑定",
"parameters": [
{"name": "requestId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "申请ID"},
{"name": "approved", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "true通过，false拒绝"},
{"name": "handleRemark", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "审批备注"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-config-security-flow",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/config",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全流程增强",
"summary": "企业后台安全配置详情。新增 ipWhitelistMetas/ipWhitelistCheck/totpMetas，固定当前企业 scope",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-login-precheck-security-flow",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/login/precheck",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全流程增强",
"summary": "企业后台登录预检。返回 IP 白名单诊断和 TOTP 状态，用于企业登录页失败提示",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "企业ID"},
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "后台登录账号/手机号/用户ID"},
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "ip", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录来源 IP"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-totp-reset-request",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/totp/reset-request",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全流程增强",
"summary": "企业管理员提交 TOTP 重置申请，固定当前企业 scope",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "目标企业管理员用户ID，不传为当前用户"},
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录账号展示字段"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "申请原因"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-totp-reset-requests",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/totp/reset-requests",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全流程增强",
"summary": "企业后台 TOTP 重置申请列表。只能查看当前企业申请",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "申请用户ID"},
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "pending/approved/rejected"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-totp-reset-requests-detail",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/totp/reset-requests/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全流程增强",
"summary": "企业后台 TOTP 重置申请详情，固定当前企业 scope",
"parameters": [{"name": "requestId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "申请ID"}]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-totp-reset-requests-handle",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/totp/reset-requests/handle",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全流程增强",
"summary": "企业后台审批 TOTP 重置申请。通过后清空当前企业内该用户 TOTP",
"parameters": [
{"name": "requestId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "申请ID"},
{"name": "approved", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "true通过，false拒绝"},
{"name": "handleRemark", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "审批备注"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "后台安全四期",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--console-platform-users-login-ip-bindings",
"path": "/console/platform/users/login-ip-bindings",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全四期",
"summary": "平台后台查询用户登录 IP 绑定。无记录或 enabled=false 时不拦截用户登录",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "用户ID，可选"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否只看启用/禁用记录"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-users-login-ip-bindings-update",
"path": "/console/platform/users/login-ip-bindings/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全四期",
"summary": "平台后台更新用户登录 IP 绑定。allowedIps 支持单 IP 和 IPv4 CIDR；开启高危确认时需 action=update_user_login_ip_binding 的 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "用户ID"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用绑定"},
{"name": "allowedIps", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "允许登录 IP，逗号/空格/换行分隔，支持 203.0.113.10 和 198.51.100.0/24"},
{"name": "remark", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "备注"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-login-audit-logs",
"path": "/console/platform/security/login-audit-logs",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全四期",
"summary": "平台后台查询用户登录 IP 审计日志。命中拦截 reason=user_login_ip_not_allowed",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "用户ID"},
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "账号关键字"},
{"name": "ip", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录 IP"},
{"name": "allowed", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否放行"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "例如 user_login_ip_not_allowed"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-users-login-ip-bindings",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users/login-ip-bindings",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全四期",
"summary": "企业后台查询本企业成员登录 IP 绑定。需要 users:view，不能查看其他企业成员",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "本企业成员用户ID，可选"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否只看启用/禁用记录"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-users-login-ip-bindings-update",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users/login-ip-bindings/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全四期",
"summary": "企业后台更新本企业成员登录 IP 绑定。需要 users:write，不能通过 companyId 越权",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "本企业成员用户ID"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用绑定"},
{"name": "allowedIps", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "允许登录 IP，支持单 IP 和 IPv4 CIDR"},
{"name": "remark", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "备注"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业后台不允许传其他企业ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-login-audit-logs",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/login-audit-logs",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全四期",
"summary": "企业后台查询本企业用户登录 IP 审计日志。需要 security:view",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "用户ID"},
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "账号关键字"},
{"name": "ip", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录 IP"},
{"name": "allowed", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否放行"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "例如 user_login_ip_not_allowed"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--account-login-ip-binding-note",
"path": "/account/login",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全四期",
"summary": "用户登录命中 IP 绑定时返回失败，data.allowed=false、reason=user_login_ip_not_allowed、clientIp、allowedIps；无绑定默认不拦截",
"parameters": [
{"name": "X-Forwarded-For", "in": "header", "required": false, "description": "联调可用该 header 模拟客户端 IP"},
{"name": "phoneNumber", "in": "body", "required": true, "description": "手机号"},
{"name": "password", "in": "body", "required": true, "description": "密码 md5"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "后台安全五期",
"operations": [
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-login-precheck-device",
"path": "/console/platform/security/login/precheck",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全五期",
"summary": "平台后台登录预检扩展设备参数。设备绑定开启后，未信任设备返回 allowed=false、reason=admin_device_untrusted、nextStep=trust_device",
"parameters": [
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "后台登录账号/手机号/用户ID"},
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "已知管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "ip", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录来源 IP，不传使用请求 IP"},
{"name": "deviceId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "前端本地生成并持久化的设备ID"},
{"name": "deviceName", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "设备名称，例如 Chrome on Mac"},
{"name": "userAgent", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "浏览器 UA；不传时后端读 User-Agent header"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-login-result-device",
"path": "/console/platform/security/login/result",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全五期",
"summary": "平台后台登录结果记录扩展设备参数。登录成功会 upsert 设备 lastSeen/lastIp，但不会自动 trusted",
"parameters": [
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "后台登录账号"},
{"name": "success", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否登录成功"},
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "deviceId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "设备ID"},
{"name": "deviceName", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "设备名称"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "失败或成功原因"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-admin-devices",
"path": "/console/platform/security/admin-devices",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全五期",
"summary": "平台后台查询管理员设备绑定列表，可按 userId/deviceId/trusted/enabled 筛选",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "deviceId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "设备ID"},
{"name": "trusted", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否信任"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-admin-devices-trust",
"path": "/console/platform/security/admin-devices/trust",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全五期",
"summary": "平台后台信任管理员设备。开启高危确认时需要 action=trust_admin_device、targetType=console_admin_device、targetId={userId}:{deviceId}",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "deviceId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "设备ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-admin-devices-disable",
"path": "/console/platform/security/admin-devices/disable",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全五期",
"summary": "平台后台禁用管理员设备。禁用后预检返回 reason=admin_device_disabled",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "deviceId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "设备ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-admin-devices-delete",
"path": "/console/platform/security/admin-devices/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全五期",
"summary": "平台后台删除管理员设备。删除后如果设备绑定开启，再次预检会作为未信任设备处理",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "deviceId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "设备ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-login-anomalies",
"path": "/console/platform/security/login-anomalies",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全五期",
"summary": "平台后台查询异常登录记录。reason 包括 admin_new_device、admin_ip_changed、login_locked、totp_verify_required、ip_not_in_whitelist",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "账号关键字"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "异常原因"},
{"name": "handled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否已处理"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-login-anomalies-handle",
"path": "/console/platform/security/login-anomalies/handle",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全五期",
"summary": "平台后台标记异常登录已处理，写 console_operation_log",
"parameters": [
{"name": "anomalyId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "异常记录ID"},
{"name": "handleRemark", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "处理备注"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-admin-devices",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/admin-devices",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全五期",
"summary": "企业后台查询本企业管理员设备列表，需要 security:view，不能查看其他企业范围",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "deviceId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "设备ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-admin-devices-trust",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/admin-devices/trust",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全五期",
"summary": "企业后台信任本企业管理员设备，需要 security:update，高危开启时需要 trust_admin_device confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "deviceId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "设备ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-login-anomalies",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/login-anomalies",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全五期",
"summary": "企业后台查询本企业异常登录记录，需要 security:view",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "异常原因，例如 admin_device_untrusted"},
{"name": "handled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否已处理"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "后台安全六期",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--console-login-context",
"path": "/console/login/context",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全六期",
"summary": "后台登录页上下文。前端推荐先调本接口解析平台/企业登录模式；返回 pageMetas、submitMetas、companySearchMetas、companyCandidates、fieldErrors、loginParams，不签发 token",
"parameters": [
{"name": "scope", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "platform / enterprise；传 companyId 或 companyCode 时默认 enterprise"},
{"name": "companyCode", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业号、企业名称或关键字"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-login-context",
"path": "/console/login/context",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全六期",
"summary": "后台登录页上下文 POST 兼容入口。与 GET 返回一致，便于前端表单联调；企业识别失败仍返回 resultCode=1、valid=false、loginDisabled=true",
"parameters": [
{"name": "scope", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "platform / enterprise"},
{"name": "companyCode", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业号、企业名称或关键字"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-login",
"path": "/console/login",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全六期",
"summary": "真实后台登录入口。平台登录不传企业参数；企业登录传 scope=enterprise/companyId。成功保留 access_Token、role、account、adminId、apiKey、nickname，失败路径 data.security.tokenIssued=false 并返回 toastMessage、primaryAction 等前端提示",
"parameters": [
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "后台登录账号/手机号/用户ID"},
{"name": "password", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "密码，兼容当前旧后台登录规则"},
{"name": "areaCode", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "区号，默认兼容 +86"},
{"name": "scope", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "platform / enterprise"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业登录必传；非空时默认 scope=enterprise"},
{"name": "deviceId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "前端本地生成并持久化的设备ID"},
{"name": "deviceName", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "设备名称"},
{"name": "userAgent", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "浏览器 UA；不传时后端读 User-Agent header"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-security-login-guard-result",
"path": "/console/security/login/guard-result",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全六期",
"summary": "后台登录安全结果适配接口。仅用于旧外部登录补写安全闭环；新后台登录页推荐 /console/login/context -> /console/login，不主动调用本接口；返回 guardOnly=true、tokenIssued=false",
"parameters": [
{"name": "scope", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "platform / enterprise"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "scope=enterprise 时必传企业ID"},
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "后台登录账号/手机号/用户ID"},
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "success", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "真实后台登录是否成功"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "success / bad_password / login_locked 等稳定原因"},
{"name": "ip", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录来源 IP，不传使用请求 IP"},
{"name": "deviceId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "前端本地生成并持久化的设备ID"},
{"name": "deviceName", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "设备名称"},
{"name": "userAgent", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "浏览器 UA"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-login-precheck-phase6-contract",
"path": "/console/platform/security/login/precheck",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全六期",
"summary": "平台后台登录安全预检六期契约：返回 allowed、reason、nextStep、device、anomalies[]、securityActions[]、suggestion。nextStep 固定 allow_login / verify_totp / trust_device / contact_admin / wait_unlock",
"parameters": [
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "后台登录账号"},
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "deviceId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "设备ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-login-precheck-phase6-contract",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/login/precheck",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全六期",
"summary": "企业后台登录安全预检六期契约。企业范围必须传 companyId；企业后台只能查看和处理本企业设备与异常记录",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "企业ID"},
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "后台登录账号"},
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "deviceId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "设备ID"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "后台安全七期",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-overview",
"path": "/console/platform/security/overview",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台安全运营首页聚合接口。前端安全首页优先使用，返回 summary、summaryCards、riskItems、trends、topEvents、topDevices、topIps、quickActions、pageMetas 和展示辅助字段",
"parameters": [
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "days", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "统计天数，默认沿用趋势窗口"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-overview",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/overview",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业安全运营首页聚合接口。只返回当前企业 scope 数据，返回 summaryCards、riskItems、quickActions、recent*、diagnosticHints 和页面/筛选/状态元信息",
"parameters": [
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "days", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "统计天数，默认沿用趋势窗口"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-notifications",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notifications",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台安全站内通知列表。触发事件包括 admin_new_device、admin_device_untrusted、admin_device_disabled、admin_ip_changed、login_locked、totp_verify_required、ip_not_in_whitelist；v1 只做站内通知，不接短信邮件",
"parameters": [
{"name": "category", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "默认 security"},
{"name": "eventType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "安全事件类型，例如 admin_new_device"},
{"name": "severity", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "high / medium / low"},
{"name": "read", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否已读"},
{"name": "handled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否已处理"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-notifications-detail",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notifications/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台安全站内通知详情。返回 notificationId、message、suggestion、severityText、actionApi、actionParams、read、handled 等前端展示字段",
"parameters": [
{"name": "notificationId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "通知ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-notifications-unread-count",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notifications/unread-count",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台安全站内通知未读数，用于后台右上角或安全中心入口红点",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-notifications-read",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notifications/read",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台标记单条安全站内通知已读。已读接口幂等，不需要 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "notificationId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "通知ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-notifications-read-all",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notifications/read-all",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台全部安全站内通知已读。只影响当前登录管理员自己的通知",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-notifications-handle",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notifications/handle",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台处理安全站内通知。只把通知 handled=true，不会自动信任或禁用设备；真正设备操作仍走 admin-devices/* 高危接口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "notificationId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "通知ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-notifications",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notifications",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台安全站内通知列表。只返回当前企业、当前管理员可见通知，企业后台不能越权查询其他企业通知",
"parameters": [
{"name": "category", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "默认 security"},
{"name": "eventType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "安全事件类型"},
{"name": "read", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否已读"},
{"name": "handled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否已处理"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-notifications-detail",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notifications/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台安全站内通知详情。actionApi 指向 /console/enterprise/security/admin-devices 或 /console/enterprise/security/login-anomalies",
"parameters": [
{"name": "notificationId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "通知ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-notifications-unread-count",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notifications/unread-count",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台安全站内通知未读数，只统计当前企业当前管理员自己的通知",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-notifications-read",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notifications/read",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台标记单条安全站内通知已读，需要 security:view，不需要 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "notificationId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "通知ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-notifications-read-all",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notifications/read-all",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台全部安全站内通知已读，只影响当前企业当前管理员自己的通知",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-notifications-handle",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notifications/handle",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台处理安全站内通知，需要 security:update；处理通知不绕过设备信任/禁用高危确认机制",
"parameters": [
{"name": "notificationId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "通知ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-notifications-delivery-logs",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notifications/delivery-logs",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台查询安全通知 OpenIM delivery-logs。OpenIM 投递失败不影响站内通知和登录安全主流程，前端可展示 deliveryStatus、deliveryError、deliveryRetryCount",
"parameters": [
{"name": "notificationId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "通知ID"},
{"name": "channel", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "openim"},
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "delivered / failed / skipped"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-notifications-deliver-retry",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notifications/deliver-retry",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台重试 OpenIM 通知投递。只重试增强提醒通道，不影响通知已读/处理状态",
"parameters": [
{"name": "notificationId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "通知ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-notifications-stats",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notifications/stats",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台通知统计，看板字段包含 total、unreadCount、handledCount、highSeverityCount、byEventType、bySeverity、topDevices、avgReadDurationSeconds、avgHandleDurationSeconds",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-notifications-trends",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notifications/trends",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台通知趋势，按天返回 createdCount、readCount、handledCount、highSeverityCount，支持 days=7/14/30",
"parameters": [
{"name": "days", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "统计天数"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-diagnostics",
"path": "/console/platform/security/diagnostics",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台安全一键诊断，返回安全配置、TOTP、最近异常、最近通知、OpenIM 投递状态和 dev token 排障提示",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-export-notifications-csv",
"path": "/console/platform/security/export/notifications.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台导出安全通知 CSV，返回 JSON data.csvText，单次最多 5000 行，可按 eventType、severity、handled、startTime、endTime 筛选",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-notifications-delivery-logs",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notifications/delivery-logs",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台查询本企业当前管理员安全通知 OpenIM delivery-logs，不能越权查看其他企业通知投递日志",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-notifications-deliver-retry",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notifications/deliver-retry",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台重试本企业当前管理员通知的 OpenIM 投递",
"parameters": [
{"name": "notificationId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "通知ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-notifications-stats",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notifications/stats",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台安全通知统计，只统计本企业当前管理员可见通知",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-notifications-trends",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notifications/trends",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台安全通知趋势，只统计本企业当前管理员可见通知",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-diagnostics",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/diagnostics",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台安全一键诊断，返回本企业安全配置、最近异常、最近通知和 OpenIM 投递状态",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-export-notifications-csv",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/export/notifications.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台导出本企业安全通知 CSV，返回 data.csvText，单次最多 5000 行",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-notification-templates",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notification-templates",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台查询安全通知模板。返回 variables、unknownVariables、previewTitle、previewContent、editorMetas、eventGroups、fieldMetas、pageMetas 和 validationSummary，供模板编辑器直接渲染",
"parameters": [
{"name": "locale", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "zh-CN / en-US，默认 zh-CN"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-notification-templates-variables",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notification-templates/variables",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台安全通知模板变量清单。返回变量分组、事件分组、字段编辑提示、默认样例 payload、localeMetas、severityMetas 和 copyableVariables",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-notification-templates-preview",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notification-templates/preview",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台安全通知模板实时预览。只渲染 previewTitle/previewContent，不保存模板，不产生通知；未知变量返回 warnings 和 hasUnknownVariables，不阻止预览",
"parameters": [
{"name": "eventType", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "安全事件类型"},
{"name": "locale", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "zh-CN / en-US"},
{"name": "titleTemplate", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "标题模板"},
{"name": "contentTemplate", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "内容模板"},
{"name": "severity", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "high / medium / low"},
{"name": "actionLabel", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "操作按钮文案"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-notification-templates-update",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notification-templates/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台更新安全通知模板。titleTemplate/contentTemplate 支持 {account}、{userId}、{ip}、{deviceId}、{deviceName}、{eventType} 等变量；更新成功返回 saved=true、warnings、usedVariables、validationSummary",
"parameters": [
{"name": "eventType", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "admin_new_device 等安全事件"},
{"name": "locale", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "zh-CN / en-US"},
{"name": "severity", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "high / medium / low"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-notification-templates-reset",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notification-templates/reset",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台重置安全通知模板。eventType 为空恢复全部事件，locale 为空恢复该事件全部语言；返回 resetMode、removedCount、items、confirmTitle、successMessage",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-notification-preferences",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notification-preferences",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台查询当前管理员安全通知偏好。返回 inAppEnabled、openimEnabled、mutedEventTypes、quietHours 和 quietHoursActive",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-notification-preferences-update",
"path": "/console/platform/security/notification-preferences/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台更新当前管理员通知偏好。quietHours=HH:mm-HH:mm 只静默 OpenIM 投递，不影响站内通知和异常日志",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-login-anomalies-detail",
"path": "/console/platform/security/login-anomalies/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台异常登录详情，聚合异常、关联设备、关联通知、登录锁定状态和 recommendedActions[]",
"parameters": [
{"name": "anomalyId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "异常登录记录ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-login-anomalies-handle-with-action",
"path": "/console/platform/security/login-anomalies/handle-with-action",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "平台后台异常登录组合处置。支持 trust_device、disable_device、unlock_login、review_ip_whitelist、review_totp，高危动作仍需 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "anomalyId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "异常登录记录ID"},
{"name": "action", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "处置动作"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-notification-templates",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notification-templates",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台查询本企业安全通知模板。fallback 为企业自定义 > 平台自定义 > 内置默认；返回 sourceText、customized、inherited、warnings、editorMetas、eventGroups 和页面展示元信息",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-notification-templates-variables",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notification-templates/variables",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业安全通知模板变量清单。返回变量分组、事件分组、字段提示、各事件样例 payload、localeMetas、severityMetas 和 copyableVariables",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-notification-templates-preview",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notification-templates/preview",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业安全通知模板实时预览。只渲染不保存，企业 scope 隔离；返回 saved=false、valid、warnings、usedVariables、previewTitle/previewContent",
"parameters": [
{"name": "eventType", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "安全事件类型"},
{"name": "locale", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "zh-CN / en-US"},
{"name": "titleTemplate", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "标题模板"},
{"name": "contentTemplate", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "内容模板"},
{"name": "severity", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "high / medium / low"},
{"name": "actionLabel", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "操作按钮文案"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-notification-templates-update",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notification-templates/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台更新本企业安全通知模板，需要 security:update；未知变量只提示不阻止保存，成功返回 saved=true、validationSummary、warnings",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-notification-templates-reset",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notification-templates/reset",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台重置本企业安全通知模板，回退平台默认或内置文案；返回 resetMode、affectedEventTypes、affectedLocales、message、successMessage",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-notification-preferences",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notification-preferences",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台查询当前管理员安全通知偏好",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-notification-preferences-update",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/notification-preferences/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台更新当前管理员通知偏好。静默只影响 OpenIM 投递，不影响站内通知落库",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-login-anomalies-detail",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/login-anomalies/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台异常登录详情，只能查看本企业异常，返回 recommendedActions[] 和关联通知/设备",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-login-anomalies-handle-with-action",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/login-anomalies/handle-with-action",
"method": "post",
"tag": "后台安全七期",
"summary": "企业后台异常登录组合处置。企业后台只能处置本企业管理员异常，高危动作仍需 confirmToken",
"parameters": []
}
]
},
{
"name": "宵禁策略",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-curfew-config",
"path": "/console/platform/security/curfew/config",
"method": "get",
"tag": "宵禁策略",
"summary": "平台后台查询平台全局或指定企业宵禁配置。v1 默认关闭，timeRanges 使用 HH:mm-HH:mm，支持跨天",
"parameters": [
{"name": "scope", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "platform / enterprise，默认 platform"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "scope=enterprise 时传企业ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-security-curfew-config-update",
"path": "/console/platform/security/curfew/config/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "宵禁策略",
"summary": "平台后台更新平台全局或指定企业宵禁配置。开启后可拦截登录、OpenIM token 刷新和关键新操作",
"parameters": [
{"name": "scope", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "platform / enterprise，默认 platform"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "scope=enterprise 时必传合法企业ID"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用宵禁"},
{"name": "timeRanges", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "HH:mm-HH:mm，多个用逗号或空格分隔，支持 23:00-06:00 跨天"},
{"name": "timezone", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "默认 Asia/Shanghai"},
{"name": "blockLogin", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否拦截登录入口"},
{"name": "blockOperations", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否拦截已在线用户新操作"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "前端提示文案"},
{"name": "reminderEnabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用宵禁前提醒，默认 false"},
{"name": "reminderMinutesBefore", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "提前提醒分钟数，默认15，最大1440"},
{"name": "reminderMessage", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "宵禁前提醒文案"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-curfew-status",
"path": "/console/platform/security/curfew/status",
"method": "get",
"tag": "宵禁策略",
"summary": "平台后台查询当前宵禁状态。返回 allowed、active、reason、matchedRange、nextAvailableTime，并在宵禁前窗口返回 warningActive/nextCurfewStartTime/warningMessage",
"parameters": [
{"name": "scope", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "platform / enterprise"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业ID"},
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "待判断用户ID"},
{"name": "actionType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "login / operation"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-curfew-config",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/curfew/config",
"method": "get",
"tag": "宵禁策略",
"summary": "企业后台查询本企业宵禁配置。企业后台始终使用当前企业范围，不能传 companyId 越权",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-security-curfew-config-update",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/curfew/config/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "宵禁策略",
"summary": "企业后台更新本企业宵禁配置。需要 security:update 权限",
"parameters": [
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用宵禁"},
{"name": "timeRanges", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "HH:mm-HH:mm，多个用逗号或空格分隔"},
{"name": "timezone", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "默认 Asia/Shanghai"},
{"name": "blockLogin", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否拦截登录入口"},
{"name": "blockOperations", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否拦截已在线用户新操作"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "前端提示文案"},
{"name": "reminderEnabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用宵禁前提醒，默认 false"},
{"name": "reminderMinutesBefore", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "提前提醒分钟数，默认15，最大1440"},
{"name": "reminderMessage", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "宵禁前提醒文案"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-curfew-status",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/curfew/status",
"method": "get",
"tag": "宵禁策略",
"summary": "企业后台查询本企业宵禁状态。返回 allowed=false 时前端展示 message 和 nextAvailableTime；未进入宵禁但即将命中时返回 warningActive/nextCurfewStartTime/warningMessage",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "待判断用户ID"},
{"name": "actionType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "login / operation"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--user-openim-token-curfew-note",
"path": "/user/openim/token",
"method": "get",
"tag": "宵禁策略",
"summary": "宵禁期间刷新 OpenIM token 会返回 data.allowed=false 和 data.curfew，前端不要伪装为刷新成功",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-send-before-curfew-note",
"path": "/room/openim/send-before",
"method": "get",
"tag": "宵禁策略",
"summary": "宵禁期间群消息发送前校验返回 canSend=false，前端不要调用 OpenIM SDK 发送群消息",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "contentText", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "待发送文本"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--friend-openim-send-before-curfew-note",
"path": "/friend/openim/send-before",
"method": "get",
"tag": "宵禁策略",
"summary": "宵禁期间单聊发送前校验返回 allowed=false，前端不要调用 OpenIM SDK 发送单聊消息",
"parameters": [
{"name": "toUserId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "接收方用户ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-qr-join-curfew-note",
"path": "/room/openim/qr/join",
"method": "post",
"tag": "宵禁策略",
"summary": "宵禁期间扫码入群或提交审核返回 allowed=false，前端提示当前时间段禁止加入群",
"parameters": [
{"name": "code", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "二维码短码"},
{"name": "applyReason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "入群申请理由"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "后台日志导出与审计",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--console-platform-operation-logs-export-csv",
"path": "/console/platform/operation-logs/export.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台日志导出与审计",
"summary": "平台操作日志 CSV 导出。返回 JSON，前端读取 data.csvText 生成文件；沿用 operation-logs:view 权限，最多 5000 行",
"parameters": [
{"name": "action", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "操作类型"},
{"name": "targetType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "目标类型"},
{"name": "targetId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "目标ID"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-login-audit-logs-export-csv",
"path": "/console/platform/security/login-audit-logs/export.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台日志导出与审计",
"summary": "平台登录审计 CSV 导出。支持用户、账号、IP、是否允许、原因和时间筛选；沿用 security:view 权限",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "用户ID"},
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "账号关键字"},
{"name": "ip", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录IP"},
{"name": "allowed", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否允许登录"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "拒绝或放行原因"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-security-access-denied-logs-export-csv",
"path": "/console/platform/security/access-denied-logs/export.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台日志导出与审计",
"summary": "平台安全访问拒绝日志 CSV 导出。支持 IP、reason 和时间筛选；reason=curfew 会匹配 curfew_* 拦截原因；沿用 security:view 权限",
"parameters": [
{"name": "ip", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "访问来源 IP"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "拒绝原因，例如 ip_not_in_whitelist / curfew"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-attrition-logs-export-csv",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/attrition/logs/export.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台日志导出与审计",
"summary": "平台群减员执行日志 CSV 导出。用于群操作审计，可按群、触发类型、规则类型、结果和时间筛选；沿用 rooms:view 权限",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群ID"},
{"name": "triggerType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "触发类型"},
{"name": "ruleType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "规则类型"},
{"name": "result", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "执行结果"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-messages-governance-logs-export-csv",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/governance/logs/export.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台日志导出与审计",
"summary": "平台消息治理日志 CSV 导出。用于撤回、治理操作审计；沿用 messages:governance 权限",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群ID"},
{"name": "result", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "治理结果"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-messages-destroy-logs-export-csv",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/destroy/logs/export.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台日志导出与审计",
"summary": "平台消息销毁日志 CSV 导出。用于按群、结果和时间筛选销毁记录；沿用 messages:governance 权限",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群ID"},
{"name": "result", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "销毁结果"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-messages-burn-after-read-logs-export-csv",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/burn-after-read/logs/export.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台日志导出与审计",
"summary": "平台阅后即焚日志 CSV 导出。只导出阅后即焚触发类型的销毁日志；沿用 messages:governance 权限",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群ID"},
{"name": "result", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "处理结果"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-operation-logs-export-csv",
"path": "/console/enterprise/operation-logs/export.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台日志导出与审计",
"summary": "企业操作日志 CSV 导出。固定当前企业 scope，返回 data.csvText；沿用 operation-logs:view 权限",
"parameters": [
{"name": "action", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "操作类型"},
{"name": "targetType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "目标类型"},
{"name": "targetId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "目标ID"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-security-login-audit-logs-export-csv",
"path": "/console/enterprise/security/login-audit-logs/export.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台日志导出与审计",
"summary": "企业登录审计 CSV 导出。固定当前企业 scope；沿用 security:view 权限",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "用户ID"},
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "账号关键字"},
{"name": "ip", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "登录IP"},
{"name": "allowed", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否允许登录"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "拒绝或放行原因"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-messages-governance-logs-export-csv",
"path": "/console/enterprise/messages/governance/logs/export.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台日志导出与审计",
"summary": "企业消息治理日志 CSV 导出。固定当前企业 scope，指定 roomId 时校验群归属；沿用 messages:governance 权限",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业内群ID"},
{"name": "result", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "治理结果"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-messages-destroy-logs-export-csv",
"path": "/console/enterprise/messages/destroy/logs/export.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台日志导出与审计",
"summary": "企业消息销毁日志 CSV 导出。固定当前企业 scope，指定 roomId 时校验群归属；沿用 messages:governance 权限",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业内群ID"},
{"name": "result", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "销毁结果"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-messages-burn-after-read-logs-export-csv",
"path": "/console/enterprise/messages/burn-after-read/logs/export.csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "后台日志导出与审计",
"summary": "企业阅后即焚日志 CSV 导出。固定当前企业 scope；只导出阅后即焚触发类型的销毁日志",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业内群ID"},
{"name": "result", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "处理结果"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "企业后台",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-dashboard",
"path": "/console/enterprise/dashboard",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台仪表盘基础统计",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-profile",
"path": "/console/enterprise/profile",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台当前企业信息。返回 permissionCodes，前端用于控制菜单和按钮权限",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-users",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台成员列表",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "用户ID/昵称/职位关键字"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-users-detail",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台成员详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "用户ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-users-add",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台添加已有用户为企业成员",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "departmentId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "部门ID"
},
{
"name": "userIds",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "用户ID，多个用英文逗号分隔"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-users-update",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台修改成员部门、职位、角色",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "用户ID"
},
{
"name": "departmentId",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "部门ID"
},
{
"name": "position",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "职位"
},
{
"name": "role",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "角色：0普通成员，2企业管理员"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-users-remove",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users/remove",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台移除企业成员",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "departmentId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "部门ID"
},
{
"name": "userIds",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "用户ID，多个用英文逗号分隔"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-users-disable",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users/disable",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台禁用成员基础版；业务状态和 token 清理同步完成，OpenIM 多端强制下线以 openIM.async=true 后台任务提交，避免 OpenIM 不可达时阻塞请求",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "用户ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-users-enable",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users/enable",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台启用成员基础版",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "用户ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-users-force-logout",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users/force-logout",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台强制成员下线；业务 token 清理同步完成，OpenIM 多端强制下线以 openIM.async=true 后台任务提交，避免 OpenIM 不可达时阻塞请求",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "用户ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-users-export-csv",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users/export-csv",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台导出成员CSV",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-users-import-csv",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users/import-csv",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台导入成员CSV基础版",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "csvText",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "CSV文本，表头 userId,departmentId,position,role"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-departments",
"path": "/console/enterprise/departments",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台部门列表",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-departments-add",
"path": "/console/enterprise/departments/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台新增部门",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "parentId",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "父部门ID；为空时默认根部门"
},
{
"name": "departName",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "部门名称"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-departments-update",
"path": "/console/enterprise/departments/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台修改部门",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "departmentId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "部门ID"
},
{
"name": "departName",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "部门名称"
},
{
"name": "parentId",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "父部门ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-departments-delete",
"path": "/console/enterprise/departments/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台删除空部门",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "departmentId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "部门ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-managers",
"path": "/console/enterprise/managers",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台管理员列表",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-managers-set",
"path": "/console/enterprise/managers/set",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台设置企业管理员",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "用户ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-managers-unset",
"path": "/console/enterprise/managers/unset",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台取消企业管理员",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "用户ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-permissions-catalog",
"path": "/console/enterprise/permissions/catalog",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台权限",
"summary": "查询企业后台固定权限目录。返回 announcements:view、announcements:update、operation_logs:view、reports:view、content_admin、menuGroups 和 highRiskActions，前端按后端 code 渲染角色勾选项",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-roles",
"path": "/console/enterprise/roles",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台权限",
"summary": "查询本企业后台角色模板，包含 owner_full、operator、auditor、security_admin、content_admin 等内置角色和自定义角色；列表项 detailApi 现在统一指向真实详情接口 /console/enterprise/roles/detail",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-roles-detail",
"path": "/console/enterprise/roles/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台权限",
"summary": "企业后台角色模板详情；返回当前角色模板完整字段与 rowActions/actionApis，供列表 detailApi 与新增/更新/删除成功态 nextActions.detail 统一承接",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roleId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "角色模板ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-roles-add",
"path": "/console/enterprise/roles/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台权限",
"summary": "新增企业后台角色模板。开启高危二次确认时需携带 confirmToken；成功态 nextActions.detail 统一回当前角色模板详情接口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roleName", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "角色名称"},
{"name": "permissionCodes", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "权限 code，多个用英文逗号分隔"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-roles-update",
"path": "/console/enterprise/roles/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台权限",
"summary": "更新企业后台角色模板名称、权限集合或启用状态。开启高危二次确认时需携带 confirmToken；成功态 nextActions.detail 统一回当前角色模板详情接口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roleId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "角色ID"},
{"name": "roleName", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "角色名称"},
{"name": "permissionCodes", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "权限 code，多个用英文逗号分隔"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-roles-delete",
"path": "/console/enterprise/roles/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台权限",
"summary": "禁用企业后台角色模板。角色仍被管理员绑定时会失败；开启高危二次确认时需携带 confirmToken；成功态 nextActions.detail 统一回当前角色模板详情接口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roleId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "角色ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-roles-enable",
"path": "/console/enterprise/roles/enable",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台权限",
"summary": "启用已停用的企业后台角色模板。仅支持当前企业自定义角色；开启高危二次确认时需携带 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roleId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "角色ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-managers-assign-role",
"path": "/console/enterprise/managers/assign-role",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台权限",
"summary": "给企业管理员分配角色。企业创建者不能被降权；开启高危二次确认时需携带 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "管理员用户ID"},
{"name": "roleId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "角色ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-managers-permissions",
"path": "/console/enterprise/managers/permissions",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台权限",
"summary": "查询当前管理员或指定管理员的最终权限，用于权限排查和前端权限展示",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "管理员用户ID；不传则查询当前管理员"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台本企业群列表基础版。当前按群创建者属于本企业过滤",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "群名称关键字"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-rooms-create-requests-create",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/create-requests/create",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台提交开群申请。applyReason 必填；同一企业存在待审核申请时不可重复提交，提交后等待平台总后台审批",
"parameters": [
{"name": "applyReason", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "申请开群原因，建议前端必填并限制长度"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms-create-requests",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/create-requests",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台开群申请列表。固定当前企业 scope，返回待审核/已通过/已驳回状态和平台处理备注，供企业后台跟踪审批进度",
"parameters": [
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "状态：-1全部，0待审核，1已通过，2已驳回"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量，最大100"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms-detail",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台群详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms-member-detail",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/member/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台群成员详情。围绕当前成员返回成员资料、群上下文和成员治理动作，供成员治理成功后稳定承接到当前成员，而不是退回群详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "成员用户ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-rooms-config-update",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/config/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台修改本企业群基础设置",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "isAttritionNotice",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "isAttritionNotice"
},
{
"name": "attritionInactiveEnabled",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "attritionInactiveEnabled"
},
{
"name": "attritionInactiveDays",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "attritionInactiveDays"
},
{
"name": "attritionOverflowEnabled",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "attritionOverflowEnabled"
},
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "roomName",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "群名称"
},
{
"name": "desc",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "群描述"
},
{
"name": "showMember",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "是否允许普通成员查看群成员：1允许，0不允许"
},
{
"name": "allowUploadFile",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "是否允许普通成员上传群文件：1允许，0不允许"
},
{
"name": "allowInviteFriend",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "是否允许普通成员邀请好友：1允许，0不允许"
},
{
"name": "isNeedVerify",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "入群是否需要验证：1需要，0不需要"
},
{
"name": "limitSendSmg",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每分钟发言限制，-1不限制"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-rooms-dismiss",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/dismiss",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台解散本企业群",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-rooms-transfer",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/transfer",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台转让本企业群主",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "toUserId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "新群主用户ID，必须是本企业且在群内"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-rooms-member-remove",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/member/remove",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台移除群成员",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "成员用户ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-rooms-member-set-admin",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/member/set-admin",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台设置/取消群管理员。成功后 nextActions.detail 会继续落到当前成员详情，而不是群详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "成员用户ID"
},
{
"name": "admin",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "1设置管理员，0取消管理员"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-rooms-member-set-special-role",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/member/set-special-role",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台设置/取消群隐身人或监控人。成功后 nextActions.detail 会继续落到当前成员详情，而不是群详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "目标成员用户ID"
},
{
"name": "role",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "3普通成员，4隐身人，5监控人"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms-special-members",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/special-members",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台查询群隐身人和监控人。返回的成员项现在会补充稳定的 member detail 入口，可继续围绕当前成员治理",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "role",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "0全部，4隐身人，5监控人"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大200"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms-online-members",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/online-members",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台查询群在线成员",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大200"
},
{
"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "成员昵称/备注/用户ID搜索关键字"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-rooms-message-read-detail",
"path": "/console/enterprise/rooms/message/read-detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台查询群消息已读详情能力状态",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "clientMsgID",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "OpenIM clientMsgID"
},
{
"name": "serverMsgID",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "OpenIM serverMsgID"
},
{
"name": "seq",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "OpenIM 群消息 seq"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-messages-audit",
"path": "/console/enterprise/messages/audit",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台消息审计查询",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "群ID"
},
{
"name": "senderUserId",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "发送人用户ID"
},
{
"name": "receiverUserId",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "接收人用户ID"
},
{
"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "消息内容关键字"
},
{
"name": "contentType",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "消息类型"
},
{
"name": "startTime",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "发送开始时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"
},
{
"name": "endTime",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "发送结束时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大100"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-messages-chat-records",
"path": "/console/enterprise/messages/chat-records",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台聊天记录查询。仅返回本企业内部单聊和本企业群聊天记录，数据来自 openim_message_audit；群聊 items 返回 roomName/roomDisplayName 用于结构化展示",
"parameters": [
{"name": "conversationType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "会话类型：single/group，空表示全部"},
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "本企业群ID，群聊筛选"},
{"name": "senderUserId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送人用户ID，需属于本企业范围"},
{"name": "receiverUserId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "接收人用户ID，单聊需属于本企业范围"},
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "消息内容关键字"},
{"name": "contentType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM 消息类型 contentType"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送开始时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送结束时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量，最大100"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-messages-chat-records-delete",
"path": "/console/enterprise/messages/chat-records/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台删除聊天记录审计快照。仅删除后台 openim_message_audit 快照，不删除 OpenIM 端真实消息",
"parameters": [
{"name": "auditId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "聊天记录审计ID，来自 chat-records items[].id"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-config",
"path": "/console/enterprise/config",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台配置查询",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-config-update",
"path": "/console/enterprise/config/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台配置更新",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "allowCreateRoom",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "是否允许创建群"
},
{
"name": "allowUploadFile",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "是否允许上传文件"
},
{
"name": "allowMemberPrivateChat",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "是否允许成员私聊"
},
{
"name": "showRoomMember",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "是否允许普通成员查看群成员"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-operation-logs",
"path": "/console/enterprise/operation-logs",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台操作日志",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "action",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "action"
},
{
"name": "targetType",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "targetType"
},
{
"name": "targetId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "targetId"
},
{
"name": "startTime",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "startTime"
},
{
"name": "endTime",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "endTime"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "pageIndex"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "pageSize"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-reports",
"path": "/console/enterprise/reports",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台本企业举报列表",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "type",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "举报类型：-1全部，0用户，1群，2网页"
},
{
"name": "status",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "处理状态：0全部，1待处理，2已处理，-1已忽略"
},
{
"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "举报ID/用户ID/群ID/链接/说明关键字"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大100"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-reports-detail",
"path": "/console/enterprise/reports/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台本企业举报详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "reportId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "举报ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-reports-handle",
"path": "/console/enterprise/reports/handle",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业后台",
"summary": "企业后台处理本企业举报",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "reportId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "举报ID"
},
{
"name": "handleAction",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "处理动作：resolve/ignore/disable_user/dismiss_room"
},
{
"name": "handleRemark",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "处理备注"
}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "前端基础登录与配置",
"operations": [
{
"id": "post--account-code-send",
"path": "/account/code/send",
"method": "post",
"tag": "前端基础登录与配置",
"summary": "发送账号验证码。当前阶段仅支持手机号，未接短信服务时固定验证码为666666",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "areaCode",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "areaCode"
},
{
"name": "phoneNumber",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "phoneNumber"
},
{
"name": "telephone",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "telephone"
},
{
"name": "usedFor",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "usedFor"
},
{
"name": "invitationCode",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "invitationCode"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--account-code-verify",
"path": "/account/code/verify",
"method": "post",
"tag": "前端基础登录与配置",
"summary": "校验账号验证码。当前阶段仅支持手机号，未接短信服务时固定验证码为666666",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "areaCode",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "areaCode"
},
{
"name": "phoneNumber",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "phoneNumber"
},
{
"name": "telephone",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "telephone"
},
{
"name": "verifyCode",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "verifyCode"
},
{
"name": "usedFor",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "usedFor"
},
{
"name": "invitationCode",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "invitationCode"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--account-register",
"path": "/account/register",
"method": "post",
"tag": "前端基础登录与配置",
"summary": "账号注册（必填企业号）。兼容前端JSON请求，注册无需短信验证码，必须填入有效企业号并自动加入企业",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "enterpriseCode",
"in": "body",
"required": true,
"description": "企业号（必填）。也可使用 companyCode、user.enterpriseCode、user.companyCode 字段。优先从企业号、企业 ID、企业名称解析匹配"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--account-login",
"path": "/account/login",
"method": "post",
"tag": "前端基础登录与配置",
"summary": "账号登录。兼容前端JSON请求，当前阶段使用手机号和密码登录",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--config",
"path": "/config",
"method": "get",
"tag": "前端基础登录与配置",
"summary": "获取应用配置 ",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--config-openim-status",
"path": "/config/openim/status",
"method": "get",
"tag": "前端基础登录与配置",
"summary": "OpenIM 服务状态检查",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--enterprise-code-validate",
"path": "/enterprise/code/validate",
"method": "get",
"tag": "前端基础登录与配置",
"summary": "企业号/邀请码校验基础版。当前支持公司ID或公司名称关键字作为 code",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "code",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "企业号/公司ID/公司名称"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--user-openim-token",
"path": "/user/openim/token",
"method": "get",
"tag": "前端基础登录与配置",
"summary": "刷新或获取当前登录用户的 OpenIM token",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--user-rtc-get-token",
"path": "/user/rtc/get_token",
"method": "post",
"tag": "前端基础登录与配置",
"summary": "语音单呼和视频单呼共用此接口：获取当前登录用户的 LiveKit RTC token。调用方式：POST /user/rtc/get_token?access_token=业务token&room=房间ID&identity=当前用户ID。返回 data.serverUrl 和 data.token 后，前端再交给 LiveKit SDK 入会。Java 后端旧工程需以 query 参数传 room、identity；identity 必须等于当前 access_token 对应 userId。Agora /agora/info 仅保留历史兼容，不再作为新通话主线。",
"parameters": [
{"name": "access_token", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "业务登录 access_token，不是 OpenIM token，也不是历史 Agora token"},
{"name": "room", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "通话房间ID，仅允许 A-Z a-z 0-9 . _ : -，最大 128 字符"},
{"name": "identity", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "当前登录用户ID，必须与 access_token 对应用户一致"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--agora-info",
"path": "/agora/info",
"method": "get",
"tag": "前端基础登录与配置",
"summary": "获取历史 Agora RTC token，仅兼容旧客户端。响应会返回 deprecated=true、replacementApi=/user/rtc/get_token 和 warningMessage，提示尽快切换到 LiveKit 主线。",
"parameters": [
{"name": "channel", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "Agora 房间号；不传时后端自动生成"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "系统公告",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--system-announcements",
"path": "/system/announcements",
"method": "get",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "用户端公告列表。返回平台公告和当前用户所属企业公告，包含 read/readTime",
"parameters": [
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "状态，默认 published"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--system-announcements-detail",
"path": "/system/announcements/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "用户端公告详情。只允许查看当前用户可见公告",
"parameters": [
{"name": "announcementId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "公告ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--system-announcements-unread-count",
"path": "/system/announcements/unread-count",
"method": "get",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "用户端公告未读数量，用于首页或消息中心红点",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--system-announcements-read",
"path": "/system/announcements/read",
"method": "post",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "用户端标记单条公告已读，幂等写入已读状态",
"parameters": [
{"name": "announcementId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "公告ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--system-announcements-read-all",
"path": "/system/announcements/read-all",
"method": "post",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "用户端标记全部当前可见公告已读",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-announcements",
"path": "/console/platform/announcements",
"method": "get",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "平台后台公告列表，可查平台公告，也可按 scope/companyId 查询企业公告",
"parameters": [
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "标题/摘要/内容关键字"},
{"name": "scope", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "platform 或 enterprise"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业ID，查询企业公告时使用"},
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "draft / published / offline"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-announcements-add",
"path": "/console/platform/announcements/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "系统公告",
