"summary": "平台后台新增公告草稿，scope=platform 为平台公告，scope=enterprise 时需传 companyId",
"parameters": [
{"name": "scope", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "platform 或 enterprise"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业公告所属企业ID"},
{"name": "title", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "标题"},
{"name": "content", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "内容，纯文本或简单 HTML 字符串"},
{"name": "summary", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "摘要"},
{"name": "targetType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "all 或 users"},
{"name": "targetUserIds", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "指定用户ID，多个用英文逗号分隔"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-announcements-publish",
"path": "/console/platform/announcements/publish",
"method": "post",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "平台后台发布公告。开启高危确认时需要 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "announcementId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "公告ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-announcements-offline",
"path": "/console/platform/announcements/offline",
"method": "post",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "平台后台下线公告。开启高危确认时需要 confirmToken",
"parameters": [
{"name": "announcementId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "公告ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-announcements",
"path": "/console/enterprise/announcements",
"method": "get",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "企业后台公告列表，仅返回当前企业公告；读取权限使用 announcements:view。响应追加 pageMetas、filterMetas、tableMetas、statusMetas、rowActions 和 emptyState",
"parameters": [
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "标题/摘要/内容关键字"},
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "draft / published / offline"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-announcements-detail",
"path": "/console/enterprise/announcements/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "企业后台公告详情，仅允许查看本企业公告；响应追加 sectionMetas、operationActions、statusText、badgeText 和展示字段",
"parameters": [
{"name": "announcementId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "公告ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-announcements-add",
"path": "/console/enterprise/announcements/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "企业后台新增本企业公告草稿；写权限使用 announcements:update。响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions 和高危确认提示字段",
"parameters": [
{"name": "title", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "标题"},
{"name": "content", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "内容，纯文本或简单 HTML 字符串"},
{"name": "summary", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "摘要"},
{"name": "targetType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "all 或 users"},
{"name": "targetUserIds", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "指定用户ID，多个用英文逗号分隔"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-announcements-update",
"path": "/console/enterprise/announcements/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "企业后台更新本企业公告；写权限使用 announcements:update。响应保留旧字段并追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions、confirm*",
"parameters": [
{"name": "announcementId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "公告ID"},
{"name": "title", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "标题"},
{"name": "content", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "内容"},
{"name": "summary", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "摘要"},
{"name": "targetType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "all 或 users"},
{"name": "targetUserIds", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "指定用户ID，多个用英文逗号分隔"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危操作确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-announcements-publish",
"path": "/console/enterprise/announcements/publish",
"method": "post",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "企业后台发布本企业公告。开启高危确认时需要 confirmToken；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions、confirm*",
"parameters": [
{"name": "announcementId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "公告ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-announcements-offline",
"path": "/console/enterprise/announcements/offline",
"method": "post",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "企业后台下线本企业公告。开启高危确认时需要 confirmToken；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions、confirm*",
"parameters": [
{"name": "announcementId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "公告ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-announcements-delete",
"path": "/console/enterprise/announcements/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "系统公告",
"summary": "企业后台下线并移除本企业公告当前投放。该接口不会物理删除公告数据，而是将状态改为 offline；开启高危确认时需要 confirmToken；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions、confirm*",
"parameters": [
{"name": "announcementId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "公告ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "企业专项管理",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-sensitive-words",
"path": "/console/enterprise/sensitive-words",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业专项管理",
"summary": "企业后台敏感词词库列表，只返回当前企业数据；列表项 detailApi 现在统一指向真实详情接口 /console/enterprise/sensitive-words/detail；响应追加 pageMetas、filterMetas、tableMetas、statusMetas、actionApis、emptyState、displayTitle、rowActions",
"parameters": [
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "敏感词或备注关键字"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-sensitive-words-detail",
"path": "/console/enterprise/sensitive-words/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业专项管理",
"summary": "企业后台敏感词详情；返回当前词库项完整字段与 rowActions/actionApis，供列表 detailApi 与新增/更新成功态 nextActions.detail 统一承接",
"parameters": [
{"name": "id", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "敏感词ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-sensitive-words-add",
"path": "/console/enterprise/sensitive-words/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业专项管理",
"summary": "企业后台新增敏感词；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions 和高危确认提示字段；成功态 nextActions.detail 统一回当前敏感词详情接口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "word", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "敏感词"},
{"name": "matchType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "匹配类型"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用"},
{"name": "remark", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "备注"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-sensitive-words-update",
"path": "/console/enterprise/sensitive-words/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业专项管理",
"summary": "企业后台更新敏感词；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions 和高危确认提示字段；成功态 nextActions.detail 统一回当前敏感词详情接口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "wordId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "敏感词ID"},
{"name": "word", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "敏感词"},
{"name": "matchType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "匹配类型"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用"},
{"name": "remark", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "备注"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-sensitive-words-delete",
"path": "/console/enterprise/sensitive-words/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业专项管理",
"summary": "企业后台删除敏感词；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions 和 confirmAction/confirmTargetType/confirmTargetId/confirmApi",
"parameters": [
{"name": "wordId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "敏感词ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-sensitive-hits",
"path": "/console/enterprise/sensitive-hits",
"method": "get",
"tag": "企业专项管理",
"summary": "企业后台敏感词命中列表，只返回当前企业数据；响应追加 pageMetas、filterMetas、tableMetas、riskLevel/status 文案、messageSummary、detailApi、rowActions",
"parameters": [
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "命中词、消息摘要或用户关键字"},
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "处理状态"},
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群ID"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-sensitive-hits-handle",
"path": "/console/enterprise/sensitive-hits/handle",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业专项管理",
"summary": "企业后台处理敏感词命中记录；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions 和高危确认提示字段",
"parameters": [
{"name": "hitId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "命中记录ID"},
{"name": "handleAction", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "处理动作"},
{"name": "handleRemark", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "处理备注"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-sensitive-hits-rescan",
"path": "/console/enterprise/sensitive-hits/rescan",
"method": "post",
"tag": "企业专项管理",
"summary": "企业后台补扫敏感词命中记录；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions 和任务/结果提示字段",
"parameters": [
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "限定群ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "平台专项管理",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--console-platform-announcements-detail",
"path": "/console/platform/announcements/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台公告详情；响应追加 sectionMetas、operationActions、statusText、badgeText、displayTitle 和 actionApis",
"parameters": [
{"name": "announcementId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "公告ID"},
{"name": "scope", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "platform/enterprise，可选"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业公告所属企业ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-announcements-update",
"path": "/console/platform/announcements/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台更新公告；响应保留旧字段并追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions、displayTitle、rowActions",
"parameters": [
{"name": "announcementId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "公告ID"},
{"name": "scope", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "platform/enterprise，可选"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业公告所属企业ID"},
{"name": "title", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "标题"},
{"name": "content", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "内容"},
{"name": "summary", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "摘要"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-announcements-delete",
"path": "/console/platform/announcements/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台下线并移除公告当前投放。该接口不会物理删除公告数据，而是将状态改为 offline；开启高危确认时需要 confirmToken；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions、confirm*",
"parameters": [
{"name": "announcementId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "公告ID"},
{"name": "scope", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "platform/enterprise，可选"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业公告所属企业ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-sensitive-words",
"path": "/console/platform/sensitive-words",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台敏感词词库列表；列表项 detailApi 现在统一指向真实详情接口 /console/platform/sensitive-words/detail；响应追加 pageMetas、filterMetas、tableMetas、statusMetas、actionApis、emptyState、displayTitle、rowActions",
"parameters": [
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "敏感词关键字"},
{"name": "action", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "record_only/reject/replace"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-sensitive-words-detail",
"path": "/console/platform/sensitive-words/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台敏感词详情；返回当前词库项完整字段与 rowActions/actionApis，供列表 detailApi 与新增/更新成功态 nextActions.detail 统一承接",
"parameters": [
{"name": "id", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "敏感词ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-sensitive-words-add",
"path": "/console/platform/sensitive-words/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台新增敏感词；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions、displayTitle、rowActions；成功态 nextActions.detail 统一回当前敏感词详情接口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "word", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "敏感词"},
{"name": "category", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "分类"},
{"name": "action", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "record_only/reject/replace"},
{"name": "replacement", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "替换文本"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-sensitive-words-update",
"path": "/console/platform/sensitive-words/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台更新敏感词；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions、displayTitle、rowActions；成功态 nextActions.detail 统一回当前敏感词详情接口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "id", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "敏感词ID"},
{"name": "word", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "敏感词"},
{"name": "category", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "分类"},
{"name": "action", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "record_only/reject/replace"},
{"name": "enabled", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否启用"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-sensitive-words-delete",
"path": "/console/platform/sensitive-words/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台删除敏感词；开启高危确认时需要 confirmToken；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions、confirm*",
"parameters": [
{"name": "id", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "敏感词ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-sensitive-hits",
"path": "/console/platform/sensitive-hits",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台敏感词命中列表；响应追加 pageMetas、filterMetas、tableMetas、severityMetas、messageSummary、detailApi、rowActions",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群ID"},
{"name": "senderUserId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送人用户ID"},
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "命中词或消息摘要"},
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "pending/handled/ignored"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-sensitive-hits-handle",
"path": "/console/platform/sensitive-hits/handle",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台处理敏感词命中记录；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions、statusText、rowActions",
"parameters": [
{"name": "hitId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "命中记录ID"},
{"name": "handleAction", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "handled/ignored"},
{"name": "handleRemark", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "处理备注"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-sensitive-hits-rescan",
"path": "/console/platform/sensitive-hits/rescan",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台补扫敏感词命中；响应追加 successMessage、operationHint、nextActions 和 actionApis",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "限定群ID"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-openim-messages-audit-import",
"path": "/console/openim/messages/audit/import",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "后台补录 OpenIM 消息审计索引。本地复验与联调造数使用；写入 openim_message_audit 后可用于搜索、收藏、撤回和销毁验证",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-openim-messages-audit-fixture-destroy",
"path": "/console/openim/messages/audit/fixture/destroy",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "联调夹具：标记指定审计消息为已销毁。仅平台管理员用于测试环境 HTTP-only 回归，验证 includeDestroyed=false 默认隐藏",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "clientMsgID", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM clientMsgID"},
{"name": "serverMsgID", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM serverMsgID"},
{"name": "seq", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM 群消息 seq"},
{"name": "destroyTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "销毁时间，默认当前时间"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "销毁原因，默认 fixture"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-messages-recall",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/recall",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台撤回群消息。需要 messages:governance 权限；真实撤回调用 OpenIM revoke API",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "clientMsgID", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM clientMsgID"},
{"name": "serverMsgID", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM serverMsgID"},
{"name": "seq", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM 群消息 seq"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "撤回原因"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-messages-destroy-run",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/destroy/run",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台按群配置补跑消息过期销毁。高危操作可要求 confirmToken；销毁成功会调用 OpenIM delete API",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-messages-destroy-range",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/destroy/range",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台按时间范围销毁群审计消息。用于治理补跑；OpenIM 不可达时记录 destroy log 失败结果",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送开始时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送结束时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-messages-governance-logs",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/governance/logs",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台消息治理日志（撤回等）。沿用 messages:governance 权限",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群ID"},
{"name": "result", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "success/failed"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-messages-destroy-logs",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/destroy/logs",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台消息销毁日志。包含过期销毁、阅后即焚等触发类型",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群ID"},
{"name": "result", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "success/failed/skipped"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-messages-burn-after-read-read-mark",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/burn-after-read/read-mark",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台补录群消息已读状态，供阅后即焚候选计算。仅支持群消息",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "clientMsgID", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM clientMsgID"},
{"name": "readUserIds", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "已读用户ID，逗号分隔"},
{"name": "allRead", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否全部已读"},
{"name": "allReadTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "全部已读时间戳"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-messages-burn-after-read-run",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/burn-after-read/run",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台手动补跑阅后即焚。群需开启 burnAfterReadEnabled；候选消息需 allRead 且超过 burnAfterReadSeconds",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "confirmToken", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "高危确认 token"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-messages-burn-after-read-logs",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/burn-after-read/logs",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台专项管理",
"summary": "平台后台阅后即焚日志。只包含 burn_after_read 触发类型",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群ID"},
{"name": "result", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "处理结果"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束时间戳"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "平台总后台",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--console-platform-dashboard",
"path": "/console/platform/dashboard",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台仪表盘基础统计",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-create-requests",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/create-requests",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台开群申请审批列表。用于处理企业提交的开群申请；与\"待处理入群申请群\"区分，后者是入群审核，不是开群审批",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业ID，按申请企业筛选"},
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "状态：-1全部，0待审核，1已通过，2已驳回"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量，最大100"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-rooms-create-requests-handle",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/create-requests/handle",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台审批开群申请。approved=true 为通过，approved=false 为驳回；通过后会同步打开企业 allowCreateRoom 开关",
"parameters": [
{"name": "requestId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "申请单ID"},
{"name": "approved", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否通过，默认 true"},
{"name": "handleRemark", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "审批备注，驳回时建议填写原因"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-users",
"path": "/console/platform/users",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台用户列表",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "用户ID/昵称/手机号关键字"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大100"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-users-detail",
"path": "/console/platform/users/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台用户详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "用户ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-users-disable",
"path": "/console/platform/users/disable",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台禁用用户；业务状态和 token 清理同步完成，OpenIM 多端强制下线以 openIM.async=true 后台任务提交",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "userId"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-users-enable",
"path": "/console/platform/users/enable",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台启用用户",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "userId"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-users-force-logout",
"path": "/console/platform/users/force-logout",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台强制用户下线；业务 token 清理同步完成，OpenIM 多端强制下线以 openIM.async=true 后台任务提交",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "userId"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-users-sessions",
"path": "/console/platform/users/sessions",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台 Token/多端会话看板",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "用户ID，可选"
},
{
"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "关键词（用户ID/昵称/手机号/设备ID）"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大100"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-companies",
"path": "/console/platform/companies",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台企业列表",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "企业名称关键字"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大100"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-companies-detail",
"path": "/console/platform/companies/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台企业详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "companyId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "companyId"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-companies-config",
"path": "/console/platform/companies/config",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台企业功能配置查询",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "companyId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "companyId"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-companies-config-update",
"path": "/console/platform/companies/config/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台企业功能配置更新",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "companyId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "企业ID"
},
{
"name": "allowCreateRoom",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "是否允许创建群"
},
{
"name": "allowUploadFile",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "是否允许上传文件"
},
{
"name": "allowMemberPrivateChat",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "是否允许成员私聊"
},
{
"name": "showRoomMember",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "是否允许普通成员查看群成员"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台群列表",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "群ID/群名称/群主ID关键字"
},
{
"name": "creatorUserId",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "创建者(群主)用户ID"
},
{
"name": "roomType",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "群类型(category)"
},
{
"name": "createStart",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "创建时间开始（秒或毫秒时间戳）"
},
{
"name": "createEnd",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "创建时间结束（秒或毫秒时间戳）"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大100"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-detail",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台群详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "roomId"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-member-detail",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/member/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台群成员详情。围绕当前成员返回成员资料、群上下文和成员治理动作，供成员治理成功后稳定承接到当前成员，而不是退回群详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "成员用户ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-rooms-config-update",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/config/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台修改群基础设置",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "roomId"
},
{
"name": "roomName",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "roomName"
},
{
"name": "desc",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "desc"
},
{
"name": "showMember",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "showMember"
},
{
"name": "allowUploadFile",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "allowUploadFile"
},
{
"name": "allowInviteFriend",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "allowInviteFriend"
},
{
"name": "isNeedVerify",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "isNeedVerify"
},
{
"name": "limitSendSmg",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "limitSendSmg"
},
{
"name": "isAttritionNotice",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "isAttritionNotice"
},
{
"name": "attritionInactiveEnabled",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "attritionInactiveEnabled"
},
{
"name": "attritionInactiveDays",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "attritionInactiveDays"
},
{
"name": "attritionOverflowEnabled",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "attritionOverflowEnabled"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-rooms-dismiss",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/dismiss",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台解散群",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "roomId"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-rooms-transfer",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/transfer",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台转让群主",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "roomId"
},
{
"name": "toUserId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "toUserId"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-rooms-member-remove",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/member/remove",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台移除群成员",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "roomId"
},
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "userId"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-rooms-member-set-admin",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/member/set-admin",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台设置/取消群管理员。成功后 nextActions.detail 会继续落到当前成员详情，而不是群详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "roomId"
},
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "userId"
},
{
"name": "admin",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "admin"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-rooms-member-set-special-role",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/member/set-special-role",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台设置/取消群隐身人或监控人。成功后 nextActions.detail 会继续落到当前成员详情，而不是群详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "目标成员用户ID"
},
{
"name": "role",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "3普通成员，4隐身人，5监控人"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-special-members",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/special-members",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台查询群隐身人和监控人。返回的成员项现在会补充稳定的 member detail 入口，可继续围绕当前成员治理",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "role",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "0全部，4隐身人，5监控人"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大200"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-online-members",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/online-members",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台查询群在线成员",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大200"
},
{
"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "成员昵称/备注/用户ID搜索关键字"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-rooms-message-read-detail",
"path": "/console/platform/rooms/message/read-detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台查询群消息已读详情能力状态",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "clientMsgID",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "OpenIM clientMsgID"
},
{
"name": "serverMsgID",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "OpenIM serverMsgID"
},
{
"name": "seq",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "OpenIM 群消息 seq"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-messages-audit",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/audit",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台消息审计查询",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "群ID"
},
{
"name": "senderUserId",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "发送人用户ID"
},
{
"name": "receiverUserId",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "接收人用户ID"
},
{
"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "消息内容关键字"
},
{
"name": "contentType",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "消息类型"
},
{
"name": "startTime",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "发送开始时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"
},
{
"name": "endTime",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "发送结束时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大100"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-messages-chat-records",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/chat-records",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台聊天记录查询。可查询全平台单聊和群聊聊天记录，数据来自 openim_message_audit；群聊 items 返回 roomName/roomDisplayName 用于结构化展示",
"parameters": [
{"name": "conversationType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "会话类型：single/group，空表示全部"},
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群ID，群聊筛选"},
{"name": "senderUserId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送人用户ID"},
{"name": "receiverUserId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "接收人用户ID，单聊筛选"},
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "消息内容关键字"},
{"name": "contentType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM 消息类型 contentType"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送开始时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送结束时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量，最大100"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-messages-chat-records-delete",
"path": "/console/platform/messages/chat-records/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台删除聊天记录审计快照。仅删除后台 openim_message_audit 快照，不删除 OpenIM 端真实消息",
"parameters": [
{"name": "auditId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "聊天记录审计ID，来自 chat-records items[].id"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-operation-logs",
"path": "/console/platform/operation-logs",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台操作日志",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "action",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "action"
},
{
"name": "targetType",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "targetType"
},
{
"name": "targetId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "targetId"
},
{
"name": "startTime",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "startTime"
},
{
"name": "endTime",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "endTime"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "pageIndex"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "pageSize"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-reports",
"path": "/console/platform/reports",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台举报列表",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "type",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "举报类型：-1全部，0用户，1群，2网页"
},
{
"name": "status",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "处理状态：0全部，1待处理，2已处理，-1已忽略"
},
{
"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "举报ID/用户ID/群ID/链接/说明关键字"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大100"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-reports-detail",
"path": "/console/platform/reports/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台举报详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "reportId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "举报ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-reports-handle",
"path": "/console/platform/reports/handle",
"method": "post",
"tag": "平台总后台",
"summary": "平台总后台处理举报",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "reportId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "举报ID"
},
{
"name": "handleAction",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "处理动作：resolve/ignore/disable_user/dismiss_room"
},
{
"name": "handleRemark",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "处理备注"
}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--friend-openim-send-before",
"path": "/friend/openim/send-before",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "单聊消息发送前业务校验。通过后前端使用 OpenIM SDK 发送消息",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "toUserId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "接收方用户ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--friend-openim-messages-search",
"path": "/friend/openim/messages/search",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-消息搜索与治理",
"summary": "用户端单聊聊天记录搜索。数据来自已落库 OpenIM 消息审计，不调用端上历史",
"parameters": [
{"name": "peerUserId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "对端用户ID"},
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "消息文本、文件名或消息ID关键字"},
{"name": "contentType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM contentType"},
{"name": "fileExt", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "文件扩展名，如 pdf/png/txt"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送开始时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送结束时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "includeDestroyed", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否包含已销毁消息，默认 false"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量，最大100"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--friends-list",
"path": "/friends/list",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "好友列表。返回旧好友字段并追加通讯录展示元信息",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "旧参数，后端以当前登录用户为准"},
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "关键词，兼容旧参数"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--friends-page",
"path": "/friends/page",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "好友分页搜索。保留 PageVO 字段，pageData 追加行展示字段",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧参数，后端以当前登录用户为准"},
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "关键词"},
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "关系状态：2 好友，1 关注，0 陌生人"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从 0 开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--friends-get",
"path": "/friends/get",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "好友关系详情。用于好友详情页和单聊资料页",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "旧参数，后端以当前登录用户为准"},
{"name": "toUserId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "目标用户ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--friends-newFriend-list",
"path": "/friends/newFriend/list",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "新朋友申请列表。返回旧申请字段并追加展示字段",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧参数，后端以当前登录用户为准"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从 0 开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--friends-newFriendListWeb",
"path": "/friends/newFriendListWeb",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "Web 新朋友分页列表。保留 PageVO 字段并追加展示元信息",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧参数，后端以当前登录用户为准"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从 0 开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--friends-newFriend-last",
"path": "/friends/newFriend/last",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "查询与指定用户的新朋友最新记录",
"parameters": [
{"name": "toUserId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "目标用户ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--friends-attention-list",
"path": "/friends/attention/list",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "关注列表。返回旧好友字段并追加展示字段",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "旧参数，后端以当前登录用户为准"},
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "关系状态，默认好友"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--friends-blacklist",
"path": "/friends/blacklist",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "黑名单列表。用于黑名单页面和发送失败后的检查入口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从 0 开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--friends-queryBlacklistWeb",
"path": "/friends/queryBlacklistWeb",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "Web 黑名单分页列表。保留 PageVO 字段并追加展示字段",
"parameters": [
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从 0 开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--friends-friendsAndAttention",
"path": "/friends/friendsAndAttention",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "获取好友或黑名单用户 ID 集合，供离线同步和本地通讯录更新使用",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧参数，后端以当前登录用户为准"},
{"name": "type", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "friendList 或 blackList"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--friends-add",
"path": "/friends/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "添加好友。响应追加 successMessage/operationHint/nextActions",
"parameters": [
{"name": "toUserId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "目标用户ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--friends-remark",
"path": "/friends/remark",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "修改好友备注和描述",
"parameters": [
{"name": "toUserId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "目标用户ID"},
{"name": "remarkName", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "备注名"},
{"name": "describe", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "描述"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--friends-update-offline-no-push",
"path": "/friends/update/OfflineNoPushMsg",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "好友消息免打扰、阅后即焚、聊天置顶设置",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧参数，后端以当前登录用户为准"},
{"name": "toUserId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "目标用户ID"},
{"name": "offlineNoPushMsg", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "0 关闭，1 开启"},
{"name": "type", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0 免打扰，1 阅后即焚，2 置顶"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--friends-blacklist-add",
"path": "/friends/blacklist/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "加入黑名单",
"parameters": [
{"name": "toUserId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "目标用户ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--friends-blacklist-delete",
"path": "/friends/blacklist/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "取消拉黑",
"parameters": [
{"name": "toUserId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "目标用户ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--friends-delete",
"path": "/friends/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "删除好友",
"parameters": [
{"name": "toUserId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "目标用户ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--friendGroup-list",
"path": "/friendGroup/list",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "好友分组列表。分组项追加展示标题、人数摘要和行操作",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--friendGroup-add",
"path": "/friendGroup/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "新增好友分组",
"parameters": [
{"name": "groupName", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "分组名称"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--friendGroup-update",
"path": "/friendGroup/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "重命名好友分组",
"parameters": [
{"name": "groupId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "分组ID"},
{"name": "groupName", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "分组名称"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--friendGroup-delete",
"path": "/friendGroup/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "删除好友分组",
"parameters": [
{"name": "groupId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "分组ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--friendGroup-updateFriend",
"path": "/friendGroup/updateFriend",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "调整单个好友所属分组",
"parameters": [
{"name": "toUserId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "目标用户ID"},
{"name": "groupIdStr", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "多个分组ID用逗号分隔"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--friendGroup-updateGroupUserList",
"path": "/friendGroup/updateGroupUserList",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "批量更新分组好友列表",
"parameters": [
{"name": "groupId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "分组ID"},
{"name": "userIdListStr", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "好友用户ID，多个用逗号分隔"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--user-get",
"path": "/user/get",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "用户资料查询。用于搜索用户和好友详情资料卡",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "用户ID或通讯号；为空时查询自己"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--user-avatar-get",
"path": "/user/avatar/get",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "获取用户头像URL。返回可直接访问的头像地址",
"parameters": [
{"name": "userId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "用户ID；为空时获取当前登录用户头像"},
{"name": "update", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否添加时间戳避免缓存，0-否，1-是，默认0"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--user-getByAccount",
"path": "/user/getByAccount",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "按通讯号查询用户资料",
"parameters": [
{"name": "account", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "用户通讯号"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--user-offlineOperation",
"path": "/user/offlineOperation",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"summary": "获取好友和群组相关离线操作记录，供客户端本地状态同步",
"parameters": [
{"name": "offlineTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "上次同步时间戳，默认 0"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "账号与企业资料",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--enterprise-code-validate",
"path": "/enterprise/code/validate",
"method": "get",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "企业号校验。支持企业ID、企业名称关键字、企业号 companyCode 和有效企业邀请码",
"parameters": [
{"name": "code", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "企业ID、企业名称关键字、企业号或邀请码"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--enterprise-code-validate",
"path": "/enterprise/code/validate",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "企业号校验 POST 兼容入口。返回结构同 GET /enterprise/code/validate",
"parameters": [
{"name": "code", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "企业ID、企业名称关键字、企业号或邀请码"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-companies-create",
"path": "/console/platform/companies/create",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "平台创建企业并生成唯一企业号。companyCode 可不传，默认生成 C + 8 位大写字母数字",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyName", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "企业名称"},
{"name": "companyCode", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "自定义企业号，4-32 位字母、数字和短横线，全局唯一"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-companies-profile-update",
"path": "/console/platform/companies/profile/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "平台更新企业资料和企业号。支持企业名称、企业号、LOGO、联系人和简介",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "企业ID"},
{"name": "companyName", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业名称"},
{"name": "companyCode", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业号，全局唯一"},
{"name": "logoFileId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "优先使用 /file/upload 返回的 fileId"},
{"name": "logoUrl", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业 LOGO URL"},
{"name": "contactName", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "联系人"},
{"name": "contactPhone", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "联系电话"},
{"name": "contactEmail", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "联系邮箱"},
{"name": "description", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业简介"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-companies-logo-update",
"path": "/console/platform/companies/logo/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "平台更新企业 LOGO。保存 logoFileId/logoUrl，不新增二进制上传入口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "企业ID"},
{"name": "logoFileId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "文件服务 fileId"},
{"name": "logoUrl", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "可直接展示的 LOGO URL"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-platform-companies-invite-codes",
"path": "/console/platform/companies/invite-codes",
"method": "get",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "平台企业邀请码列表。可按企业和状态筛选",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业ID"},
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "active/disabled 或 1/-1"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量，最大100"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-companies-invite-codes-create",
"path": "/console/platform/companies/invite-codes/create",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "平台创建企业邀请码。默认 7 天过期、最多使用 100 次",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "企业ID"},
{"name": "expireDays", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "有效天数，默认7，最大365"},
{"name": "maxUseCount", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "最大使用次数，默认100"},
{"name": "remark", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "备注"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-companies-invite-codes-disable",
"path": "/console/platform/companies/invite-codes/disable",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "平台禁用企业邀请码",
"parameters": [
{"name": "code", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "邀请码"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业ID，可选校验 scope"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-platform-companies-invite-codes-enable",
"path": "/console/platform/companies/invite-codes/enable",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "平台启用企业邀请码。仅允许恢复未过期且未用尽的邀请码",
"parameters": [
{"name": "code", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "邀请码"},
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业ID，可选校验 scope"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-invite-codes",
"path": "/console/enterprise/invite-codes",
"method": "get",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "企业后台邀请码列表。固定当前登录管理员企业 scope",
"parameters": [
{"name": "status", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "active/disabled 或 1/-1"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量，最大100"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-invite-codes-create",
"path": "/console/enterprise/invite-codes/create",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "企业后台创建当前企业邀请码",
"parameters": [
{"name": "expireDays", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "有效天数，默认7，最大365"},
{"name": "maxUseCount", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "最大使用次数，默认100"},
{"name": "remark", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "备注"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-invite-codes-disable",
"path": "/console/enterprise/invite-codes/disable",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "企业后台禁用当前企业邀请码，不能操作其他企业邀请码",
"parameters": [
{"name": "code", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "邀请码"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-invite-codes-enable",
"path": "/console/enterprise/invite-codes/enable",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "企业后台启用当前企业邀请码。仅允许恢复未过期且未用尽的邀请码",
"parameters": [
{"name": "code", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "邀请码"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--user-profile-metas",
"path": "/user/profile/metas",
"method": "get",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "用户资料编辑元信息。返回字段提示、绑定状态和可见企业扩展字段",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--user-profile-update",
"path": "/user/profile/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "偏特更新用户资料。只传需要修改的字段，不传的字段保持不变。customFieldsJson 为 JSON object 字符串",
"parameters": [
{"name": "nickname", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "昵称"},
{"name": "description", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "个人签名"},
{"name": "email", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "邮箱"},
{"name": "avatar", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "头像 URL"},
{"name": "customFieldsJson", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "企业扩展字段值 JSON object"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--user-profile-phone-bind",
"path": "/user/profile/phone/bind",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "绑定手机号。测试验证码沿用 666666 策略",
"parameters": [
{"name": "areaCode", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "区号，默认86"},
{"name": "phoneNumber", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "手机号"},
{"name": "code", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "验证码，测试环境 666666"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--user-profile-email-bind",
"path": "/user/profile/email/bind",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "绑定邮箱。测试验证码沿用 666666 策略",
"parameters": [
{"name": "email", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "邮箱"},
{"name": "code", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "验证码，测试环境 666666"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--console-enterprise-users-custom-fields",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users/custom-fields",
"method": "get",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "企业后台用户资料自定义字段配置查询",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--console-enterprise-users-custom-fields-update",
"path": "/console/enterprise/users/custom-fields/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "账号与企业资料",
"summary": "企业后台保存用户资料自定义字段配置。字段类型支持 text/number/date/select/boolean",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fieldsJson", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "字段配置 JSON array"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "用户端-文件与上传",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--file-upload-context",
"path": "/file/upload/context",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "上传上下文。前端上传前读取大小限制、支持类型、预览能力、群共享联动入口和可展示拒绝原因",
"parameters": [
{"name": "scene", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "上传场景：common/image/room_share"},
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群共享上传时传旧系统群ID；会校验群成员和企业文件开关"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--file-upload-context",
"path": "/file/upload/context",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "上传上下文 POST 兼容入口。返回结构同 GET /file/upload/context",
"parameters": [
{"name": "scene", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "上传场景：common/image/room_share"},
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群共享上传时传旧系统群ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--file-storage-overview",
"path": "/file/storage/overview",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "当前用户文件空间概览。返回已用容量、剩余容量、最近上传、群共享引用数和清理建议",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--file-storage-enterprise-overview",
"path": "/file/storage/enterprise-overview",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "企业文件空间概览。平台管理员可查任意企业，企业管理员仅可查本企业，返回企业容量、排行和最近上传",
"parameters": [
{"name": "companyId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "企业ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--file-storage-room-overview",
"path": "/file/storage/room-overview",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "群文件空间概览。平台管理员或群成员可查，返回群容量、上传用户排行和最近共享文件",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--file-resources",
"path": "/file/resources",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "当前用户上传文件列表。只返回自己的文件，支持场景、群、扩展名、删除状态和时间过滤；已删除文件项改为列表承接并继续暴露引用与恢复动作",
"parameters": [
{"name": "scene", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "上传场景：common/image/room_share"},
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "按群ID过滤"},
{"name": "ext", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "扩展名，如 txt/png/pdf"},
{"name": "deleted", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "-1全部，0可用，1已删除；默认0"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开始秒级时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "结束秒级时间戳"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量，最大100"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--file-resources-detail",
"path": "/file/resources/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "当前用户文件详情。返回签名入口、预览能力、引用状态和可删除原因",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "文件ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--file-resources-references",
"path": "/file/resources/references",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "当前用户文件引用关系。首期只统计群共享文件引用",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "文件ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--file-upload",
"path": "/file/upload",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "multipart/form-data 上传文件。成功返回 fileId、限时下载/预览 URL、文件大小、contentType、md5 和签名信息",
"parameters": [
{"name": "file", "in": "formData", "required": true, "description": "multipart 文件字段"},
{"name": "scene", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "上传场景：common/image/room_share"},
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群共享上传时传旧系统群ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--file-sign",
"path": "/file/sign",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "按 fileId 重新生成限时下载或预览签名 URL",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "文件ID"},
{"name": "mode", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "download 或 preview，默认 download"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--file-download",
"path": "/file/download",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "签名下载文件。不需要 access_token，需企业 allowUploadFile 权限 + 群文件校验群成员资格",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "文件ID"},
{"name": "expiresAt", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "签名过期秒级时间戳"},
{"name": "signature", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "签名值"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--file-preview",
"path": "/file/preview",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "签名预览文件。需企业 allowUploadFile + 群成员校验，仅图片/文本/PDF 等可内联类型可用",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "文件ID"},
{"name": "expiresAt", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "签名过期秒级时间戳"},
{"name": "signature", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "签名值"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--file-delete",
"path": "/file/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "逻辑删除自己上传且未被业务引用的文件。删除成功后回到文件列表承接，并继续暴露查看引用与恢复动作",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "文件ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--file-restore",
"path": "/file/restore",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "恢复当前用户已逻辑删除且尚未物理清理的文件。恢复成功后继续围绕当前文件详情承接",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "文件ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--file-reference-status",
"path": "/file/reference/status",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "查询文件引用失效状态。消息撤回或销毁后，关联文件的引用会被标记为失效",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "文件ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--file-reference-invalidate",
"path": "/file/reference/invalidate",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "标记文件引用为失效（撤回/销毁后调用）。失效后若无群共享引用则允许删除文件",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "文件ID"},
{"name": "reason", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "失效原因：message_withdraw / message_destroy"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--file-cleanup-run",
"path": "/file/cleanup/run",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "手动清理已逻辑删除且超过保留期的本地文件。仅平台管理员或测试管理员 token 可用",
"parameters": [
{"name": "retentionDays", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "保留天数，默认配置值7天"},
{"name": "limit", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "单次最多扫描数量，默认100，最大500"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--file-cleanup-logs",
"path": "/file/cleanup/logs",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "文件清理日志列表。仅平台管理员可用，返回手动清理任务历史、释放空间和详情入口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量，最大100"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--file-cleanup-logs-detail",
"path": "/file/cleanup/logs/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "文件清理日志详情。返回清理任务逐文件结果",
"parameters": [
{"name": "cleanupId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "清理任务ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--file-cleanup-config",
"path": "/file/cleanup/config",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "读取文件清理策略配置。保留天数、自动清理开关和单次清理上限",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "post--file-cleanup-config-update",
"path": "/file/cleanup/config/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "更新文件清理策略配置。仅平台管理员",
"parameters": [
{"name": "retentionDays", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "保留天数，1-365"},
{"name": "autoCleanupEnabled", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "是否开启自动清理"},
{"name": "maxFilesPerRun", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "单次最大文件数，10-5000"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--file-cleanup-preview",
"path": "/file/cleanup/preview",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "清理预览，不执行实际删除。查看符合清理条件的文件列表",
"parameters": [
{"name": "retentionDays", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "保留天数，默认读取配置"},
{"name": "limit", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "单次最多预览数量，默认100，最大500"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--file-cleanup-fixture-expire",
"path": "/file/cleanup/fixture/expire",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "联调夹具：老化已逻辑删除文件以验证清理。仅平台管理员用于测试环境 HTTP-only 回归",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "已逻辑删除且尚未物理清理的文件ID"},
{"name": "deleteTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "目标删除时间，默认1"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--file-compress-sync",
"path": "/file/compress",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "同步压缩图片。支持 local 和 minio 模式，使用 ImageMagick 压缩至指定最大宽度（默认 1920px），质量 85%",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "已上传的图片文件ID"},
{"name": "maxWidth", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "最大宽度像素，默认1920"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--file-compress-async",
"path": "/file/compress/async",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "异步压缩图片。立即返回 accepted=true，后台线程池执行压缩，压缩后更新 compressed/compressedSize 状态",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "已上传的图片文件ID"},
{"name": "maxWidth", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "最大宽度像素，默认1920"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--file-convert-sync",
"path": "/file/convert",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "同步转码视频为 H.264 MP4。支持 local 和 minio 模式，使用 ffmpeg 转码，ext 更新为 mp4",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "已上传的视频文件ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--file-convert-async",
"path": "/file/convert/async",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "异步转码视频为 H.264 MP4。立即返回 accepted=true，后台线程池执行，转码后更新 converted/ext/storagePath",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "已上传的视频文件ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--file-thumbnail",
"path": "/file/thumbnail",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "生成/重新生成文件缩略图。支持图片和 PDF，异步生成 320x320 正方形 JPEG 缩略图，可通过 /file/thumbnail/{fileId} 访问",
"parameters": [
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "已上传的文件ID（图片或PDF）"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-share-add-fileId",
"path": "/room/openim/share/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "群共享文件联动入口。推荐传 fileId 自动回填 url/name/size/type；旧 url/name/size/type 调用仍兼容",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "fileId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "上传接口返回的文件ID"},
{"name": "url", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "旧外链共享兼容字段"},
{"name": "name", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "旧外链共享兼容字段"},
{"name": "size", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "旧外链共享兼容字段"},
{"name": "type", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "旧外链共享兼容字段"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-shares-file-fields",
"path": "/room/openim/shares",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "群共享文件列表。共享项追加 fileId/downloadUrl/previewUrl/previewSupported/fileSource/fileStatus",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从 0 开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-share-detail-file-fields",
"path": "/room/openim/share/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "群共享文件详情。统一返回当前共享文件的下载、预览和移除能力",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "shareId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "共享文件ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-send-before-file",
"path": "/room/openim/send-before",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-文件与上传",
"summary": "文件消息发送前校验。上传前建议先以 messageType=file 调用，避免上传后才被群权限或企业开关拒绝",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "messageType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "固定传 file"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--room-openim-send-before",
"path": "/room/openim/send-before",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "群消息发送前校验",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "messageType",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "消息类型，file 表示文件类消息"
},
{
"name": "atAll",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "是否 @全体成员，0否1是"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-mapping",
"path": "/room/openim/mapping",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询旧系统群与 OpenIM 群映射",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-status",
"path": "/room/openim/status",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询旧系统群 OpenIM 同步状态",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-batch-status",
"path": "/room/openim/batch-status",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "批量查询旧系统群 OpenIM 同步状态",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomIds",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID，多个用英文逗号分隔"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-detail",
"path": "/room/openim/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "群详情聚合查询",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-members",
"path": "/room/openim/members",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询群成员列表",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大100"
},
{
"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "成员昵称搜索关键字"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-member-detail",
"path": "/room/openim/member/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询群成员详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "目标成员用户ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-notices",
"path": "/room/openim/notices",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询群公告列表",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大100"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-notice-detail",
"path": "/room/openim/notice/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询群公告详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "noticeId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "公告ID，必须传当前群已存在公告的 MongoDB ObjectId"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-shares",
"path": "/room/openim/shares",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询群共享文件列表",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大100"
},
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "上传人用户ID，0表示全部"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-member-remark-update",
"path": "/room/openim/member/remark/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "修改群成员备注",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "targetUserId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "目标成员用户ID"
},
{
"name": "remarkName",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "备注名，传空字符串清空"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-member-set-offline-no-push",
"path": "/room/openim/member/set-offline-no-push",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "设置当前用户群免打扰",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "offlineNoPushMsg",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "0关闭，1开启"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-member-set-top",
"path": "/room/openim/member/set-top",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "设置当前用户群置顶",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "top",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "0关闭，1开启"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-member-clear-message",
"path": "/room/openim/member/clear-message",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "清空当前用户群消息游标",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-message-recall",
"path": "/room/openim/message/recall",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-消息搜索与治理",
"summary": "用户端群消息撤回。普通成员只能撤回自己 2 分钟内消息，群主/管理员可撤回本群任意消息",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "clientMsgID", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM clientMsgID"},
{"name": "serverMsgID", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM serverMsgID"},
{"name": "seq", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM 群消息 seq"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-notice-add",
"path": "/room/openim/notice/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "新增群公告并同步 OpenIM（仅群主或管理员）",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "noticeContent",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "公告内容。仅群主或管理员可调用"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-notice-update",
"path": "/room/openim/notice/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "编辑已有群公告并同步 OpenIM（仅群主或管理员）",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "noticeId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "公告ID，必须传已有公告的 MongoDB ObjectId"
},
{
"name": "noticeContent",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "公告内容。仅群主或管理员可调用"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-notice-delete",
"path": "/room/openim/notice/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "删除群公告并同步 OpenIM（仅群主或管理员）",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "noticeId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "公告ID。仅群主或管理员可调用"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-share-add",
"path": "/room/openim/share/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "新增群共享文件",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "type",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "文件类型"
},
{
"name": "size",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "文件大小，单位字节"
},
{
"name": "url",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "文件地址"
},
{
"name": "name",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "文件名"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-share-delete",
"path": "/room/openim/share/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "移除群共享文件（仅移除当前群共享记录，不删除文件资源）",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "shareId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "共享文件ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-share-detail",
"path": "/room/openim/share/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询群共享文件详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "shareId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "共享文件ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-copy-room",
"path": "/room/openim/copy-room",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "一键复制新群并同步 OpenIM",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "源群ID"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-qr-create",
"path": "/room/openim/qr/create",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "生成群二维码短码",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "expireHours",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "有效期小时数，默认168，最大720"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-qrs",
"path": "/room/openim/qrs",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询群二维码列表",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "status",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "状态：99全部，1生效中，-1已禁用，3已过期"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大100"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-qr-detail",
"path": "/room/openim/qr/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询群二维码详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "code",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "二维码短码"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-qr-disable",
"path": "/room/openim/qr/disable",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "禁用群二维码",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "code",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "二维码短码"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-qr-resolve",
"path": "/room/openim/qr/resolve",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "解析群二维码短码",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "code",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "二维码短码"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-qr-join",
"path": "/room/openim/qr/join",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "扫码入群或提交入群审核",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "code",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "二维码短码"
},
{
"name": "applyReason",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "入群申请理由"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-join-requests",
"path": "/room/openim/join-requests",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询入群审核申请列表",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "status",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "状态：-1全部，0待审核，1已通过，2已拒绝，3已过期"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大100"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-join-request-detail",
"path": "/room/openim/join-request/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询入群审核申请详情",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "requestId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "申请ID，必须传当前群审核记录的 ObjectId"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-join-requests-handle",
"path": "/room/openim/join-requests/handle",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "处理入群审核申请",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "requestId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "申请ID"
},
{
"name": "action",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "approve通过，reject拒绝"
},
{
"name": "remark",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "处理备注"
}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-member-set-special-role",
"path": "/room/openim/member/set-special-role",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "设置群隐身人或监控人",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "userId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "目标成员用户ID"
},
{
"name": "role",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "3普通成员，4隐身人，5监控人"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-special-members",
"path": "/room/openim/special-members",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询群隐身人和监控人列表",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "role",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "0全部，4隐身人，5监控人"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大200"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-online-members",
"path": "/room/openim/online-members",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群聊与群管理",
"summary": "查询群在线成员列表",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "pageIndex",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "页码，从0开始"
},
{
"name": "pageSize",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "每页数量，最大200"
},
{
