"name": "keyword",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "成员昵称/备注/用户ID搜索关键字"
}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-messages-search",
"path": "/room/openim/messages/search",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-消息搜索与治理",
"summary": "用户端群聊聊天记录搜索。仅允许群成员搜索当前群，发送人可见性沿用群成员规则",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "消息文本、文件名或消息ID关键字"},
{"name": "senderUserId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送人用户ID；不可见成员不会返回"},
{"name": "contentType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM contentType"},
{"name": "fileExt", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "文件扩展名，如 pdf/png/txt"},
{"name": "startTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送开始时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "endTime", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "发送结束时间，秒/毫秒时间戳"},
{"name": "includeDestroyed", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "是否包含已销毁消息，默认 false"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量，最大100"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-message-read-detail",
"path": "/room/openim/message/read-detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-消息搜索与治理",
"summary": "查询群消息已读详情能力状态",
"parameters": [
{
"name": "roomId",
"in": "query",
"required": true,
"description": "旧系统群ID"
},
{
"name": "clientMsgID",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "OpenIM clientMsgID"
},
{
"name": "serverMsgID",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "OpenIM serverMsgID"
},
{
"name": "seq",
"in": "query",
"required": false,
"description": "OpenIM 群消息 seq"
}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "用户端-消息收藏",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--message-favorites-context",
"path": "/message/favorites/context",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-消息收藏",
"summary": "用户端消息收藏上下文，返回收藏能力、合并上限、字段提示和相关入口",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--message-favorites",
"path": "/message/favorites",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-消息收藏",
"summary": "用户端消息收藏列表，支持单条消息收藏和合并收藏筛选",
"parameters": [
{"name": "favoriteType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "收藏类型：single_message/merge"},
{"name": "conversationType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "会话类型：single/group"},
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "标题、摘要或备注关键字"},
{"name": "tag", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "标签"},
{"name": "deleted", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0可用，1已删除，-1全部"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量，最大100"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--message-favorites-detail",
"path": "/message/favorites/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-消息收藏",
"summary": "用户端消息收藏详情，返回消息快照和操作入口",
"parameters": [{"name": "favoriteId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "收藏ID"}]
},
{
"id": "post--message-favorites-add",
"path": "/message/favorites/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-消息收藏",
"summary": "收藏单条消息。auditId 推荐来自聊天记录搜索 items[].id",
"parameters": [
{"name": "auditId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "消息审计ID，推荐来自搜索结果 items[].id"},
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "群消息旧系统群ID，兼容消息身份定位"},
{"name": "clientMsgID", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM clientMsgID"},
{"name": "serverMsgID", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM serverMsgID"},
{"name": "seq", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "OpenIM 消息 seq"},
{"name": "note", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "收藏备注"},
{"name": "tags", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "标签，多个用英文逗号分隔"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--message-favorites-merge",
"path": "/message/favorites/merge",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-消息收藏",
"summary": "合并收藏多条消息，auditIds 来自聊天记录搜索 items[].id，最多20条",
"parameters": [
{"name": "auditIds", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "多个消息审计ID，用英文逗号分隔"},
{"name": "title", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "合并收藏标题"},
{"name": "note", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "收藏备注"},
{"name": "tags", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "标签，多个用英文逗号分隔"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--message-favorites-update",
"path": "/message/favorites/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-消息收藏",
"summary": "更新消息收藏标题、备注或标签",
"parameters": [
{"name": "favoriteId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "收藏ID"},
{"name": "title", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "收藏标题"},
{"name": "note", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "收藏备注"},
{"name": "tags", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "标签，多个用英文逗号分隔"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--message-favorites-delete",
"path": "/message/favorites/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-消息收藏",
"summary": "删除消息收藏，只删除当前用户收藏记录，不影响原消息和审计记录；成功后 nextActions.detail 回收藏列表，不再指向已删除详情",
"parameters": [{"name": "favoriteId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "收藏ID"}]
},
{
"id": "post--message-favorites-restore",
"path": "/message/favorites/restore",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-消息收藏",
"summary": "恢复消息收藏，只恢复当前用户已软删除的收藏记录；成功后 nextActions.detail 继续回当前收藏详情",
"parameters": [{"name": "favoriteId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "收藏ID"}]
}
]
}
,
{
"name": "用户端-合并消息",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--message-merge-context",
"path": "/message/merge/context",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-合并消息",
"summary": "用户端合并消息上下文，返回合并转发、保存能力和字段提示",
"parameters": []
},
{
"id": "get--message-merge-preview",
"path": "/message/merge/preview",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-合并消息",
"summary": "合并消息预览。auditIds 来自聊天记录搜索 items[].id，后端不发送 OpenIM 消息",
"parameters": [
{"name": "auditIds", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "多个消息审计ID，用英文逗号分隔，最多50条"},
{"name": "title", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "合并消息标题"},
{"name": "note", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "备注，只保存到后端提示"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--message-merge-forward-before",
"path": "/message/merge/forward-before",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-合并消息",
"summary": "合并转发前生成 OpenIM SDK payload。真实发送仍由前端 SDK 完成",
"parameters": [
{"name": "auditIds", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "多个消息审计ID，用英文逗号分隔"},
{"name": "title", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "合并消息标题"},
{"name": "targetType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "转发目标类型：single/group"},
{"name": "targetId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "转发目标 OpenIM userID 或 groupID"},
{"name": "note", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "备注"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--message-merge-save",
"path": "/message/merge/save",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-合并消息",
"summary": "保存合并消息快照。只保存当前用户可见审计消息，不发送 OpenIM 消息",
"parameters": [
{"name": "auditIds", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "多个消息审计ID，用英文逗号分隔"},
{"name": "title", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "合并消息标题"},
{"name": "note", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "备注"},
{"name": "tags", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "标签，多个用英文逗号分隔"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--message-merge-saved",
"path": "/message/merge/saved",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-合并消息",
"summary": "已保存合并消息列表",
"parameters": [
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "标题、摘要或备注关键字"},
{"name": "deleted", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "0可用，1已删除，-1全部"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量，最大100"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--message-merge-detail",
"path": "/message/merge/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-合并消息",
"summary": "已保存合并消息详情",
"parameters": [{"name": "mergeId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "合并消息ID"}]
},
{
"id": "post--message-merge-delete",
"path": "/message/merge/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-合并消息",
"summary": "删除已保存合并消息，只删除保存记录，不影响原消息和审计记录；成功后 nextActions.detail 回已保存合并消息列表，不再指向已删除详情",
"parameters": [{"name": "mergeId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "合并消息ID"}]
},
{
"id": "post--message-merge-restore",
"path": "/message/merge/restore",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-合并消息",
"summary": "恢复已保存合并消息，只恢复当前用户已软删除的保存记录；成功后 nextActions.detail 继续回当前合并消息详情",
"parameters": [{"name": "mergeId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "合并消息ID"}]
}
]
},
{
"name": "用户端-红包",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--room-openim-red-packet-send-before",
"path": "/room/openim/red-packet/send-before",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-红包",
"summary": "红包发送前校验。返回群权限、企业开关、支持的红包类型",
"parameters": [{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"}]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-red-packet-send",
"path": "/room/openim/red-packet/send",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-红包",
"summary": "发送红包。成功返回 sdkPayload 供前端发送 OpenIM 自定义消息",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "type", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "红包类型：1普通 2拼手气 4固定金额 5专属"},
{"name": "count", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "红包个数"},
{"name": "money", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "红包总金额"},
{"name": "greetings", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "祝福语"},
{"name": "toUserId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "专属红包目标用户ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-red-packet-open",
"path": "/room/openim/red-packet/open",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-红包",
"summary": "抢红包。返回领取金额",
"parameters": [{"name": "id", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "红包ID（ObjectId）"}]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-red-packet-detail",
"path": "/room/openim/red-packet/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-红包",
"summary": "红包详情。返回红包信息、已领取用户列表",
"parameters": [{"name": "id", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "红包ID（ObjectId）"}]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-red-packet-list",
"path": "/room/openim/red-packet/list",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-红包",
"summary": "群红包列表",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "用户端-群助手",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--room-openim-group-helpers-context",
"path": "/room/openim/group-helpers/context",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群助手",
"summary": "群助手页面上下文。返回群信息、当前用户角色、是否可管理助手",
"parameters": [{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"}]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-group-helpers-available",
"path": "/room/openim/group-helpers/available",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群助手",
"summary": "查询当前群可添加的开放平台助手列表",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "openAppId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "开放应用ID，不传表示全部"},
{"name": "pageIndex", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "页码，从0开始"},
{"name": "pageSize", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "每页数量，最大100"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-group-helpers",
"path": "/room/openim/group-helpers",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群助手",
"summary": "查询当前群已安装的群助手列表",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "helperId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "助手ID，不传表示全部"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-group-helpers-detail",
"path": "/room/openim/group-helpers/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-群助手",
"summary": "查询当前群已安装群助手详情。列表项 detailApi 与关键词写成功后的 detail 统一落到这里",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "helperId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "助手ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-group-helpers-add",
"path": "/room/openim/group-helpers/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群助手",
"summary": "添加群助手。只有群主或管理员可操作；成功后 nextActions.detail 继续落到当前助手详情",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "helperId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "助手ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-group-helpers-delete",
"path": "/room/openim/group-helpers/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群助手",
"summary": "移除群助手。只有群主或管理员可操作；成功后 nextActions.detail 回到当前群已添加助手列表，不再指向已删除实体",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "groupHelperId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "群助手记录ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-group-helpers-keywords-add",
"path": "/room/openim/group-helpers/keywords/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群助手",
"summary": "添加关键词自动回复。只有群主或管理员可操作；成功后 nextActions.detail 继续落到当前助手详情",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "groupHelperId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "群助手记录ID"},
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "关键词"},
{"name": "value", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "回复内容"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-group-helpers-keywords-update",
"path": "/room/openim/group-helpers/keywords/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群助手",
"summary": "修改关键词自动回复。只有群主或管理员可操作；成功后 nextActions.detail 继续落到当前助手详情",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "groupHelperId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "群助手记录ID"},
{"name": "keyWordId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "关键词ID"},
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "新关键词"},
{"name": "value", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "新回复内容"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-group-helpers-keywords-delete",
"path": "/room/openim/group-helpers/keywords/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-群助手",
"summary": "删除关键词自动回复。只有群主或管理员可操作；成功后 nextActions.detail 继续落到当前助手详情",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "groupHelperId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "群助手记录ID"},
{"name": "keyWordId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "关键词ID"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "用户端-机器人",
"operations": [
{
"id": "post--room-openim-robot-create",
"path": "/room/openim/robot/create",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-机器人",
"summary": "创建群机器人。只有群主可操作",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"},
{"name": "name", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "机器人名称"},
{"name": "avatar", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "机器人头像URL"},
{"name": "welcomeMsg", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "欢迎语，创建后可发送到群"},
{"name": "channelID", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "频道ID（预留）"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-robot-delete",
"path": "/room/openim/robot/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-机器人",
"summary": "删除机器人。只有创建者可操作",
"parameters": [
{"name": "robotId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "机器人ID"},
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-robot-disable",
"path": "/room/openim/robot/disable",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-机器人",
"summary": "停用机器人。只有创建者可操作，停用后不再自动回复",
"parameters": [
{"name": "robotId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "机器人ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-robot-enable",
"path": "/room/openim/robot/enable",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-机器人",
"summary": "启用机器人。只有创建者可操作，恢复后继续按原配置自动回复",
"parameters": [
{"name": "robotId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "机器人ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-robot-detail",
"path": "/room/openim/robot/detail",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-机器人",
"summary": "机器人详情，含当前查看人可执行的动作和权限标记",
"parameters": [
{"name": "robotId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "机器人ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-robot-list",
"path": "/room/openim/robot/list",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-机器人",
"summary": "群的机器人列表。动作入口会按当前查看人权限和机器人启停状态收口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "旧系统群ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-robot-keywords-add",
"path": "/room/openim/robot/keywords/add",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-机器人",
"summary": "添加关键词回复。只有创建者可操作",
"parameters": [
{"name": "robotId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "机器人ID"},
{"name": "keyword", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "关键词"},
{"name": "value", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "回复内容"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-robot-keywords-delete",
"path": "/room/openim/robot/keywords/delete",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-机器人",
"summary": "删除关键词回复。只有创建者可操作",
"parameters": [
{"name": "robotId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "机器人ID"},
{"name": "keywordId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "关键词ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--room-openim-robot-keywords-list",
"path": "/room/openim/robot/keywords/list",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-机器人",
"summary": "关键词回复列表。非创建者仅用于查看当前机器人详情，不暴露关键词写操作入口",
"parameters": [
{"name": "robotId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "机器人ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--room-openim-robot-config",
"path": "/room/openim/robot/config",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-机器人",
"summary": "配置机器人(类型/Webhook URL)。只有创建者可操作",
"parameters": [
{"name": "robotId", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "机器人ID"},
{"name": "robotType", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "keyword|webhook"},
{"name": "webhookUrl", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "第三方webhook地址"}
]
}
]
},
{
"name": "用户端-消息通知",
"operations": [
{
"id": "get--user-notification-settings",
"path": "/user/notification/settings",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-消息通知",
"summary": "用户端消息通知设置。不传roomId返回完整默认集 + 全局设置，传roomId按单群覆盖优先、全局兜底、默认补齐返回最终结果",
"parameters": [
{"name": "roomId", "in": "query", "required": false, "description": "可选，单群覆盖设置时传入群ID"}
]
},
{
"id": "post--user-notification-settings-update",
"path": "/user/notification/settings/update",
"method": "post",
"tag": "用户端-消息通知",
"summary": "批量更新消息通知设置。items为JSON数组：[{type,scope,roomId,allowNotification}]；写入后由 settings 统一返回完整默认集 + 覆盖结果",
"parameters": [
{"name": "items", "in": "query", "required": true, "description": "JSON数组，每项含type/scope/roomId/allowNotification"}
]
},
{
"id": "get--user-notification-settings-defaults",
"path": "/user/notification/settings/defaults",
"method": "get",
"tag": "用户端-消息通知",
"summary": "消息通知默认设置（全部开启），前端初始化或重置时使用；真实页面读取以 /user/notification/settings 的完整合并结果为准",
"parameters": []
}
]
}
];
function escapeHtml(value) {
return String(value == null ? "" : value)
.replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
.replace(/</g, "&lt;")
.replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
.replace(/"/g, "&quot;");
}
function escapeId(value) {
return String(value == null ? "" : value).replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]+/g, "-");
}

function opAnchorId(op) {
return `op-${escapeId(op.id || `${op.method}-${op.path}`)}`;
}

function renderNav(groups) {
document.getElementById("nav").innerHTML = groups.map((group, groupIndex) => {
const collapsedClass = groupIndex > 1 ? " collapsed" : "";
const operationsHtml = group.operations.map(op =>
`<a class="nav-sub-link" href="#${escapeHtml(opAnchorId(op))}">
<code>${escapeHtml((op.method || "").toUpperCase())}</code> ${escapeHtml(op.path || "")}
</a>`
).join("");
return `<div class="nav-group${collapsedClass}">
<button type="button" class="nav-group-toggle">
<span><span class="arrow">▾</span>${escapeHtml(group.name)} (${group.operations.length})</span>
</button>
<div class="nav-sub">${operationsHtml}</div>
</div>`;
}).join("");
}

function renderParams(parameters) {
if (!parameters.length) return "";
return `<table>
<thead><tr><th>参数</th><th>位置</th><th>必填</th><th>说明</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>${parameters.map(param => `<tr>
<td><code>${escapeHtml(param.name)}</code></td>
<td>${escapeHtml(param.in || param.paramType || "")}</td>
<td>${param.required ? "是" : "否"}</td>
<td>${escapeHtml(param.description || "")}</td>
</tr>`).join("")}</tbody>
</table>`;
}

function responseFieldsFor(path) {
return genericResponseFields.concat(responseFieldDocs[path] || []);
}

function renderResponseFields(path) {
const fields = responseFieldsFor(path);
return `<div class="response-fields">
<div class="block-title">返回字段说明</div>
<table>
<thead><tr><th>字段</th><th>类型</th><th>说明</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>${fields.map(field => `<tr>
<td><code>${escapeHtml(field.name)}</code></td>
<td>${escapeHtml(field.type || "")}</td>
<td>${escapeHtml(field.description || "")}</td>
</tr>`).join("")}</tbody>
</table>
</div>`;
}

function sampleValue(param) {
const name = (param.name || "").toLowerCase();
if (name === "areacode") return "+86";
if (name === "verifycode") return "666666";
if (name === "pagesize") return "20";
if (name === "pageindex") return "0";
if (name === "days") return "7";
if (name === "metric") return "all";
if (name === "status") return "-1";
if (name === "atall") return "0";
if (name === "messageType".toLowerCase()) return "text";
if (name.indexOf("password") >= 0) return "70d6d9ff1baec4733fc93c9d12257e91";
if (name.indexOf("phone") >= 0 || name === "telephone") return "18888888888";
return "";
}

function requestParams(op) {
return (op.parameters || []).filter(param => {
if (param.name === "access_token") return false;
return ["query", "formData", "path", "body"].includes(param.in || param.paramType);
});
}

function renderTryIt(op) {
if (["sdk", "http"].includes(op.method.toLowerCase())) return "";
const params = requestParams(op);
const bodyParam = params.find(param => (param.in || param.paramType) === "body");
const hasBodyTemplate = Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(bodyTemplates, op.path);
const rows = params.filter(param => (param.in || param.paramType) !== "body").map(param => {
const key = `${op.id}__${param.name}`;
const placeholder = param.required ? "必填" : "可选";
return `<div class="try-row">
<label for="${escapeHtml(key)}"><code>${escapeHtml(param.name)}</code> ${param.required ? "*" : ""}<br><span class="try-hint">${escapeHtml(param.description || param.in || "")}</span></label>
<input class="try-input" id="${escapeHtml(key)}" data-op-id="${escapeHtml(op.id)}" data-param-name="${escapeHtml(param.name)}" data-param-in="${escapeHtml(param.in || param.paramType || "query")}" placeholder="${escapeHtml(placeholder)}" value="${escapeHtml(sampleValue(param))}">
</div>`;
}).join("");
const bodyValue = hasBodyTemplate ? bodyTemplates[op.path] : (bodyParam ? `{

}` : "");
const bodyRow = (bodyParam || hasBodyTemplate) ? `<div class="try-row">
<label for="${escapeHtml(op.id)}__body"><code>JSON Body</code><br><span class="try-hint">${escapeHtml((bodyParam && bodyParam.description) || "请求体")}</span></label>
<textarea class="try-textarea" id="${escapeHtml(op.id)}__body" data-op-id="${escapeHtml(op.id)}" data-param-in="body">${escapeHtml(bodyValue)}</textarea>
</div>` : "";
return `<div class="try-box">
<div class="block-title">在线调试</div>
<div class="try-body">
${rows || '<div class="try-hint">该接口没有 Swagger 参数定义，可直接发送请求。</div>'}
${bodyRow}
<div class="try-actions">
<button class="try-button" type="button" onclick="sendTryRequest('${escapeHtml(op.id)}')">发送请求</button>
<button class="try-button secondary" type="button" onclick="fillTokenFromLastResponse('${escapeHtml(op.id)}')">从返回写入 token</button>
<span class="try-hint">调试请求会发往当前页面同源地址；左侧 access_token 会自动追加到非公开接口。</span>
</div>
<div class="try-result" id="result-${escapeHtml(op.id)}" style="display:none"></div>
</div>
</div>`;
}

function renderOperation(op) {
state.operationsById[op.id] = op;
const isSdkGuide = (op.method || "").toLowerCase() === "sdk";
const method = escapeHtml(isSdkGuide ? "FLOW" : op.method.toUpperCase());
const typeClass = isSdkGuide ? "sdk" : escapeHtml(op.method.toLowerCase());
const tryIt = isSdkGuide ? "" : renderTryIt(op);
return `<article class="op ${typeClass}" id="${escapeHtml(opAnchorId(op))}">
<div class="op-head">
<div class="method">${method}</div>
<div class="path">${escapeHtml(op.path)}</div>
</div>
<div class="summary">${escapeHtml(op.summary || "无说明")}${renderParams(op.parameters)}</div>
${isSdkGuide ? "" : renderResponseFields(op.path)}
${tryIt}
</article>`;
}

function setResult(opId, html) {
const el = document.getElementById(`result-${opId}`);
if (!el) return;
el.style.display = "block";
el.innerHTML = html;
}

function prettyJson(value) {
try {
if (typeof value === "string") {
return JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(value), null, 2);
}
return JSON.stringify(value, null, 2);
} catch (e) {
return String(value == null ? "" : value);
}
}

function readInputs(op) {
const query = new URLSearchParams();
let body = null;
document.querySelectorAll(`[data-op-id="${op.id}"]`).forEach(input => {
const paramIn = input.getAttribute("data-param-in");
const name = input.getAttribute("data-param-name");
const value = input.value == null ? "" : input.value.trim();
if (!value) return;
if (paramIn === "body") {
body = value;
return;
}
if (paramIn === "path") return;
query.append(name, value);
});
const token = document.getElementById("globalAccessToken").value.trim();
if (token && !publicPaths.has(op.path) && !query.has("access_token")) {
query.append("access_token", token);
}
return { query, body };
}

function buildRequestUrl(op, query) {
let path = op.path;
document.querySelectorAll(`[data-op-id="${op.id}"][data-param-in="path"]`).forEach(input => {
const name = input.getAttribute("data-param-name");
path = path.replace(`{${name}}`, encodeURIComponent(input.value.trim()));
});
const qs = query.toString();
return qs ? `${path}?${qs}` : path;
}

async function sendTryRequest(opId) {
const op = state.operationsById[opId];
if (!op) return;
const { query, body } = readInputs(op);
const url = buildRequestUrl(op, query);
const options = { method: op.method.toUpperCase(), headers: {} };
if (body && op.method.toLowerCase() !== "get") {
options.headers["Content-Type"] = "application/json";
options.body = body;
}
setResult(opId, `<div class="try-url">请求中：<code>${escapeHtml(options.method)} ${escapeHtml(url)}</code></div><pre>Loading...</pre>`);
const startedAt = Date.now();
try {
const response = await fetch(url, options);
const text = await response.text();
const elapsed = Date.now() - startedAt;
const payload = prettyJson(text);
setResult(opId, `<div class="try-url">${escapeHtml(options.method)} <code>${escapeHtml(url)}</code><br>HTTP ${response.status}，耗时 ${elapsed}ms</div><pre>${escapeHtml(payload)}</pre>`);
} catch (error) {
setResult(opId, `<div class="try-url">${escapeHtml(options.method)} <code>${escapeHtml(url)}</code></div><pre>${escapeHtml(error.message)}</pre>`);
}
}

function fillTokenFromLastResponse(opId) {
const result = document.getElementById(`result-${opId}`);
if (!result) return;
const text = result.querySelector("pre") ? result.querySelector("pre").textContent : "";
try {
const json = JSON.parse(text);
const data = json.data || {};
const token = data.access_token || data.access_Token || data.accessToken;
if (token) {
document.getElementById("globalAccessToken").value = token;
} else {
alert("当前返回里没有找到 access_token / access_Token");
}
} catch (e) {
alert("当前返回不是 JSON，无法提取 token");
}
}

const frontendDocGroupOrder = [
"OpenIM SDK 联调顺序",
"前端基础登录与配置",
"用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"账号与企业资料",
"用户端-文件与上传",
"用户端-消息搜索与治理",
"用户端-消息收藏",
"用户端-合并消息",
"用户端-群聊与群管理",
"用户端-群助手",
"用户端-红包",
"用户端-机器人",
"用户端-消息通知",
"后台登录与安全",
"后台安全流程增强",
"后台日志导出与审计",
"系统公告",
"企业后台",
"企业专项管理",
"平台专项管理",
"平台总后台"
];
const primaryFrontendTags = new Set([
"前端基础登录与配置",
"用户端-单聊与通讯录",
"账号与企业资料",
"用户端-文件与上传",
"用户端-消息搜索与治理",
"用户端-消息收藏",
"用户端-群聊与群管理",
"用户端-群助手",
"用户端-红包",
"用户端-机器人",
"用户端-消息通知",
"系统公告",
"后台安全流程增强",
"后台日志导出与审计",
"企业后台",
"企业专项管理",
"平台专项管理",
"平台总后台"
]);
const hiddenFrontendPaths = new Set([
"/openim-swagger.html",
"/config/dev/admin-token",
"/room/openim/failed",
"/room/openim/resync",
"/room/openim/resync-batch"
]);

function shouldHideInFrontendDoc(op) {
const path = (op && op.path) || "";
return !path || hiddenFrontendPaths.has(path) || path.indexOf("scripts/") === 0;
}

function frontendDocGroupName(op) {
const path = (op && op.path) || "";
if (!path) return "";
if (path.indexOf("sdk://") === 0) {
return "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序";
}
if (
path.indexOf("/account/") === 0 ||
path === "/config" ||
path.indexOf("/config/") === 0 ||
path === "/user/openim/token"
) {
return "前端基础登录与配置";
}
if (
path === "/enterprise/code/validate" ||
path.indexOf("/console/platform/companies/create") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/platform/companies/profile/update") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/platform/companies/logo/update") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/platform/companies/invite-codes") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/invite-codes") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/users/custom-fields") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/user/profile/") === 0
) {
return "账号与企业资料";
}
if (
path === "/friend/openim/messages/search" ||
path === "/room/openim/messages/search" ||
path === "/room/openim/message/recall" ||
path === "/room/openim/message/read-detail"
) {
return "用户端-消息搜索与治理";
}
if (path.indexOf("/message/favorites") === 0) {
return "用户端-消息收藏";
}
if (path.indexOf("/message/merge") === 0) {
return "用户端-合并消息";
}
if (
path.indexOf("/friend/openim/") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/friends/") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/friendGroup/") === 0 ||
path === "/user/get" ||
path === "/user/getByAccount" ||
path === "/user/offlineOperation"
) {
return "用户端-单聊与通讯录";
}
if (path.indexOf("/file/") === 0) return "用户端-文件与上传";
if (path.indexOf("/room/openim/red-packet") === 0) return "用户端-红包";
if (path.indexOf("/room/openim/group-helpers") === 0) return "用户端-群助手";
if (path.indexOf("/room/openim/robot") === 0) return "用户端-机器人";
if (path.indexOf("/user/notification") === 0) return "用户端-消息通知";
if (path === "/room/add" || path.indexOf("/room/openim/") === 0) return "用户端-群聊与群管理";
if (
path === "/console/platform/operation-logs/export.csv" ||
path === "/console/enterprise/operation-logs/export.csv" ||
path === "/console/platform/security/login-audit-logs/export.csv" ||
path === "/console/platform/security/access-denied-logs/export.csv" ||
path === "/console/platform/rooms/attrition/logs/export.csv" ||
path === "/console/enterprise/security/login-audit-logs/export.csv" ||
path === "/console/platform/messages/governance/logs/export.csv" ||
path === "/console/enterprise/messages/governance/logs/export.csv" ||
path === "/console/platform/messages/destroy/logs/export.csv" ||
path === "/console/enterprise/messages/destroy/logs/export.csv" ||
path === "/console/platform/messages/burn-after-read/logs/export.csv" ||
path === "/console/enterprise/messages/burn-after-read/logs/export.csv"
) {
return "后台日志导出与审计";
}
if (path.indexOf("/system/announcements") === 0) {
return "系统公告";
}
if (
path === "/console/platform/security/config" ||
path === "/console/enterprise/security/config" ||
path === "/console/platform/security/login/precheck" ||
path === "/console/enterprise/security/login/precheck" ||
path.indexOf("/console/platform/security/totp/reset-") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/security/totp/reset-") === 0
) {
return "后台安全流程增强";
}
if (
path === "/console/login" ||
path === "/console/login/context" ||
path === "/console/security/login/guard-result" ||
path.indexOf("/console/platform/security/") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/security/") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/platform/users/login-ip-bindings") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/users/login-ip-bindings") === 0
) {
return "后台登录与安全";
}
if (
path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/announcements") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/messages/audit") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/messages/chat-records") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/sensitive-") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/permissions/catalog") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/roles") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/managers") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/rooms/default-permissions") === 0
) {
return "企业专项管理";
}
if (
path.indexOf("/console/platform/announcements") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/platform/messages/") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/openim/messages/audit") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/platform/sensitive-") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/platform/permissions/catalog") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/platform/roles") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/platform/managers") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/platform/rooms/default-permissions") === 0
) {
return "平台专项管理";
}
// "企业后台"合并收纳 /console/web/ 路径（涵盖公司、部门、员工等旧版控制器）和部分非 enterprise/platform 的 /console/ 旧管理路径
if (
path.indexOf("/console/web/") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/add/") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/department") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/delete/") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/update/") === 0 ||
path.indexOf("/console/employee") === 0
) {
return "企业后台";
}
if (path.indexOf("/console/enterprise/") === 0) return "企业后台";
if (path.indexOf("/console/platform/") === 0) return "平台总后台";
return "";
}

function methodWeight(method) {
const lowerMethod = (method || "").toLowerCase();
if (lowerMethod === "get") return 1;
if (lowerMethod === "post") return 2;
if (lowerMethod === "sdk") return 3;
return 9;
}

function frontendDocOpScore(op) {
const parameters = op.parameters || [];
return (
(primaryFrontendTags.has(op.sourceTag || op.tag) ? 1000 : 0) +
parameters.length * 20 +
Math.min((op.summary || "").length, 400)
);
}

function chooseFrontendDocOperation(existing, candidate) {
if (!existing) return candidate;
const existingScore = frontendDocOpScore(existing);
const candidateScore = frontendDocOpScore(candidate);
if (candidateScore !== existingScore) {
return candidateScore > existingScore ? candidate : existing;
}
return (candidate.summary || "").length > (existing.summary || "").length ? candidate : existing;
}

function buildFrontendDocGroups(groups) {
const deduped = new Map();
(groups || []).forEach(group => {
(group.operations || []).forEach(op => {
if (!op || shouldHideInFrontendDoc(op)) return;
const groupName = frontendDocGroupName(op);
if (!groupName) return;
const normalizedOp = Object.assign({}, op, {
tag: groupName,
sourceTag: op.tag
});
const key = `${(normalizedOp.method || "").toLowerCase()} ${normalizedOp.path}`;
deduped.set(key, chooseFrontendDocOperation(deduped.get(key), normalizedOp));
});
});

const grouped = new Map(frontendDocGroupOrder.map(name => [name, []]));
Array.from(deduped.values()).forEach(op => {
if (!grouped.has(op.tag)) grouped.set(op.tag, []);
grouped.get(op.tag).push(op);
});

return frontendDocGroupOrder
.map(name => ({
name,
operations: (grouped.get(name) || []).sort((a, b) => {
const pathCompare = (a.path || "").localeCompare(b.path || "");
if (pathCompare !== 0) return pathCompare;
return methodWeight(a.method) - methodWeight(b.method);
})
}))
.filter(group => group.operations.length);
}

function operationMatchesKeyword(op, keyword) {
if (!keyword) return true;
return `${op.path} ${op.method} ${op.tag} ${op.summary} ${op.parameters.map(p => `${p.name} ${p.description}`).join(" ")}`.toLowerCase().includes(keyword);
}

function visibleGroups(groups, keyword) {
return groups
.map(group => ({
name: group.name,
operations: group.operations.filter(op => operationMatchesKeyword(op, keyword))
}))
.filter(group => group.operations.length);
}

function render(groups, keyword) {
const lowerKeyword = (keyword || "").trim().toLowerCase();
const displayGroups = visibleGroups(groups, lowerKeyword);
renderNav(displayGroups);
state.operationsById = {};
const html = displayGroups.map(group => {
const operations = group.operations;
if (!operations.length) return "";
return `<section id="${escapeHtml(group.name)}">
<h2>${escapeHtml(group.name)}</h2>
${group.name === "OpenIM SDK 联调顺序" ? '<div class="note"><p><strong>API 路由区分（重要）</strong></p><table style="margin:8px 0;font-size:13px"><tr><th style="text-align:left;padding:4px 8px">服务</th><th style="text-align:left;padding:4px 8px">端口</th><th style="text-align:left;padding:4px 8px">职责</th></tr><tr><td style="padding:4px 8px"><strong>Java 业务后端</strong></td><td style="padding:4px 8px"><code>8092</code></td><td style="padding:4px 8px">登录注册、企业号、群管理、文件上传/下载/预览、消息治理、后台管理 —— 本页除了紫色 FLOW 条目外<strong>全部 HTTP 接口都走这里</strong>，请求需在 URL 查询参数中带 <code>?access_token=...</code>（不加 Bearer 前缀）</td></tr><tr><td style="padding:4px 8px"><strong>OpenIM Server</strong></td><td style="padding:4px 8px"><code>10001</code> (API) / <code>10002</code> (管理)</td><td style="padding:4px 8px">IM 核心能力（发消息、建群、加好友、会话管理等）—— 由端上 <strong>OpenIM SDK 内部调用</strong>，前端 App/Web 不直接发 HTTP 请求到这些端口</td></tr></table><p>联调原则：<strong>先 Java 后端鉴权与业务校验，再 OpenIM SDK 发消息</strong>。HTTP 接口见下方各精选分区；紫色 FLOW 条目为端上 SDK 步骤，不能当作 HTTP 请求发送。合并转发、文件上传、搜索收藏等低频能力也在此给出串联顺序。</p></div>' : ""}
${group.name === "用户端-单聊与通讯录" ? '<div class="note">用户端单聊与通讯录分区优先保留真实页面联调接口：单聊发送前校验、好友列表、好友详情、新朋友、关注、黑名单、好友分组、用户资料搜索和离线操作记录。公众号后台、支付、运维、旧兼容接口不进入本精选分区。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "用户端-文件与上传" ? '<div class="note">用户端文件上传推荐流程：先调用 <code>/room/openim/send-before?messageType=file</code> 和 <code>/file/upload/context</code> 做上传前判断并读取用户/企业/群容量，再用 <code>/file/upload</code> 上传；图片上传后自动异步压缩并生成 320x320 缩略图；文件管理页使用 <code>/file/storage/overview</code>、<code>/file/storage/enterprise-overview</code>、<code>/file/storage/room-overview</code>、<code>/file/resources</code>、<code>/file/resources/detail</code> 和 <code>/file/resources/references</code>；群共享文件推荐传 <code>fileId</code> 调用 <code>/room/openim/share/add</code>，删除文件前先看引用，已被群共享引用的文件需要先删共享记录；文件删除为软删除，如需恢复可在物理清理前调用 <code>/file/restore</code>；消息撤回/销毁后的 <code>referenceInvalid=true</code> 只表示消息文件引用已失效，若无群共享引用则允许删除；平台管理员可用 <code>/file/cleanup/config</code> 配置清理策略、<code>/file/cleanup/preview</code> 预览、<code>/file/cleanup/run</code> 执行、<code>/file/cleanup/logs</code> 查看清理结果；测试环境 HTTP-only 回归可用 <code>/file/cleanup/fixture/expire</code> 老化已逻辑删除文件后再跑清理。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "用户端-消息搜索与治理" ? '<div class="note">聊天记录搜索只查询后端已落库的 <code>openim_message_audit</code> 审计数据，不调用 OpenIM SDK 端上历史；默认 <code>includeDestroyed=false</code> 不返回已销毁消息。群已读详情当前仍以 <code>supported=false</code> 返回能力状态，只追加审计回调可确认的 <code>auditReadState</code>，不要伪造成完整已读成员明细。用户端撤回走 <code>/room/openim/message/recall</code>，普通成员仅 2 分钟内可撤回自己的消息；真实 OpenIM 撤回由后端调用，失败时返回 <code>auditStatus=recall_failed</code>。本地复验脚本：<code>scripts/check-message-governance-local.sh</code>。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "用户端-消息收藏" ? '<div class="note">消息收藏只保存当前登录用户可见的 <code>openim_message_audit</code> 审计消息快照；前端推荐先通过单聊/群聊搜索拿到 <code>items[].id</code>，再调用 <code>/message/favorites/add</code> 或 <code>/message/favorites/merge</code>。删除收藏不会删除原消息、审计记录或 OpenIM 端消息，而是软删除；如需恢复，调用 <code>/message/favorites/restore</code> 即可重新出现在当前用户收藏列表。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "用户端-合并消息" ? '<div class="note">合并消息分区只负责基于当前用户可见的 <code>openim_message_audit</code> 审计消息生成预览、保存记录和 <code>mergePayload</code>；真实发送必须由前端调用 OpenIM SDK 完成，后端不会代发合并消息。删除保存记录为软删除，如需恢复，调用 <code>/message/merge/restore</code> 即可重新出现在当前用户保存列表。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "账号与企业资料" ? '<div class="note">账号与企业资料分区覆盖企业号校验、企业资料、企业 LOGO、企业邀请码、用户资料绑定和企业自定义字段。邀请码当前只做注册/入企前校验和展示辅助，不绕过原注册、成员添加、后台登录和权限流程。邀请码管理联调约定：正常投放中的邀请码可调用 disable 停用；若是误停用且邀请码仍未过期、未用尽，可调用 enable 恢复启用；已过期或使用次数已用尽的邀请码不能恢复。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "后台日志导出与审计" ? '<div class="note">后台日志导出接口返回 JSON，不直接下载二进制文件；前端读取 <code>data.csvText</code> 生成 CSV，文件名使用 <code>data.fileName</code>，编码固定 <code>UTF-8</code>。导出沿用对应列表权限和 scope 隔离，单次超过 5000 行会失败并提示缩小筛选条件。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "用户端-群聊与群管理" ? '<div class="note">用户端群聊分区优先保留真实页面联调接口：群详情、成员、公告、共享文件、个人群设置、二维码入群、入群审核、特殊成员、在线成员和发送前校验。群成员联调约定：成员列表使用 <code>GET /room/openim/members?roomId=</code>，查看当前成员统一使用 <code>GET /room/openim/member/detail?roomId=&userId=</code>；成员列表和详情都会继续返回 <code>detail</code>，有权限备注当前成员时才继续暴露 <code>remark</code>，成员备注更新成功后详情入口会继续落到当前成员，而不是退回成员列表；设置隐身人/监控人成功后，详情入口同样继续落到当前成员，而不是群详情。群公告联调约定：只有群主或管理员可新增、编辑、删除公告；新建时调用 <code>POST /room/openim/notice/add</code>，只传 <code>roomId + noticeContent</code>，由服务端生成并返回 <code>noticeId</code>；编辑时调用 <code>POST /room/openim/notice/update</code>，必须传已有公告的 MongoDB <code>ObjectId</code>，不要由客户端传 UUID；查看当前公告时统一使用 <code>GET /room/openim/notice/detail?roomId=&noticeId=</code>，删除成功后详情入口会回退到当前群公告列表；普通成员在列表和详情里不再继续暴露 <code>update/delete</code>。群共享文件联调约定：查看列表使用 <code>GET /room/openim/shares?roomId=</code>，查看当前共享文件统一使用 <code>GET /room/openim/share/detail?roomId=&shareId=</code>；只有群主/管理员或当前共享文件上传者本人会继续暴露 <code>delete</code>，其它成员应继续查看详情而不是直接删除。入群审核联调约定：管理员查看列表使用 <code>GET /room/openim/join-requests?roomId=</code>，查看当前申请统一使用 <code>GET /room/openim/join-request/detail?requestId=</code>，处理申请使用 <code>POST /room/openim/join-requests/handle</code>；只有 <code>status=0</code> 的待审核申请会继续暴露 <code>handle</code>，已通过、已拒绝和已过期申请应继续查看详情而不是再次处理；处理成功后的详情入口会继续落到当前申请，而不是退回审核列表。群二维码联调约定：管理员先调 <code>POST /room/openim/qr/create</code> 生成，再用 <code>GET /room/openim/qrs</code> 查看当前群所有二维码；只有生效中二维码继续暴露 <code>disable</code>，已禁用或已过期二维码应继续查看详情而不是再次禁用；不再投放的二维码调用 <code>POST /room/openim/qr/disable</code> 主动失效，禁用后 <code>/room/openim/qr/resolve</code> 和 <code>/room/openim/qr/join</code> 都会返回失效错误；如果扫码入群进入待审核分支，<code>POST /room/openim/qr/join</code> 成功后的详情入口会继续落到当前入群申请，而不是群详情。补偿同步和失败映射等运维入口不进入本精选分区，可在原生 <code>/swagger-ui.html</code> 或 <code>/v2/api-docs</code> 中查询。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "用户端-群助手" ? '<div class="note">群助手分区收口群内助手管理接口：添加/移除助手、关键词自动回复增删改查。助手基于旧版群助手体系（OpenApp），在群内安装后可通过关键词匹配自动发送预设回复内容。联调约定：普通成员查看群助手和关键词时默认只围绕列表/详情继续查看，不再暴露添加、移除或关键词写操作入口；只有群主或管理员继续返回 add/delete/keywordAdd/keywordUpdate/keywordDelete，以及关键词行内的 update/delete。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "用户端-红包" ? '<div class="note">红包分区收口基于 OpenIM 群的红包功能：发送前校验、发红包、抢红包、红包详情和群红包列表。金额使用虚拟余额（MongoDB user_balance 集合），不涉及真实支付。前端在 send 成功后通过返回的 sdkPayload 发送 OpenIM 自定义消息，sdkPayload.status 初始为 1。红包领完后后端自动通过 OpenIM admin token 向群内发送"[用户名]的红包已被领完"系统消息；前端可据此刷新红包卡片为已领完状态。联调约定：专属红包只有目标用户才继续暴露 `open`，非目标用户在列表、详情和后续动作中都应只继续查看详情，不再先发现可抢入口再被接口拒绝。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "用户端-机器人" ? '<div class="note">机器人分区收口群内机器人管理接口：创建/删除机器人、启用/停用机器人、关键词自动回复增删查、robotType/webhookUrl 配置。机器人作为群内虚拟用户，当群消息通过 OpenIM 回调到达后端时，自动匹配关键词并通过 OpenIM API 以机器人身份发送回复消息。robotType=webhook 时，后端将群消息 POST 到 webhookUrl（body: {"message":"消息文本","robotName":"机器人名称","timestamp":…}），webhook 返回 {"reply":"回复文本"} 即可自动发送到群内。仅群主可创建，仅创建者可管理；非创建者查看机器人时默认只返回 detail，不再暴露配置、启停、删除或关键词写操作入口。启用中的机器人只继续暴露 disable，停用中的机器人只继续暴露 enable。机器人基于 OpenIM admin token 发送群消息，不会实际占用群成员名额。</div>' : ""} +
${group.name === "用户端-消息通知" ? '<div class="note">消息通知分区收口用户端群消息通知精细控制：支持群公告通知(room_notice)、@我通知(at_me)、红包消息通知(red_packet)、机器人回复通知(robot_reply) 四种类型。采用"全局默认 + 单群覆盖"两级粒度，默认全部开启，用户可按类型全局关闭或在单个群维度覆盖。send-before 接口在 atAll=1 或 messageType=red_packet/robot 时自动返回 notificationType 字段，前端可根据用户通知开关决定是否本地推送。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "后台登录与安全" ? '<div class="note">后台登录页联调推荐流程是 <code>/console/login/context</code> 解析登录上下文，再调用真实 <code>/console/login</code>；<code>/console/security/login/guard-result</code> 仅为旧外部登录补写入口，不建议新页面主动调用。本组同时收口设备信任、登录 IP 绑定、异常登录、安全通知、宵禁、安全运营首页、模板编辑器和高危确认 token。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "宵禁策略" ? '<div class="note">宵禁策略支持拦截和提前提醒两层语义：<code>enabled/timeRanges</code> 控制真实拦截；<code>reminderEnabled/reminderMinutesBefore/reminderMessage</code> 只影响前端提示。状态、OpenIM token 和发送前校验会追加 <code>warningActive/warning/curfewWarning</code>，前端可在进入宵禁前展示倒计时，不应提前阻断业务。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "后台安全流程增强" ? '<div class="note">后台安全流程增强分区聚焦 TOTP 重置申请/审批和 IP 白名单诊断展示：安全配置返回 <code>ipWhitelistMetas/ipWhitelistCheck/totpMetas</code>，登录预检返回 <code>ipWhitelistCheck/ipWhitelistReasonText</code>，TOTP 重置采用申请、列表、详情、审批闭环；审批通过后清空旧 TOTP，用户需要重新绑定。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "系统公告" ? '<div class="note">系统公告 v1 采用用户端拉取和未读状态实现；后台公告管理接口请优先查看企业专项管理或平台专项管理分区。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "企业后台" ? '<div class="note">企业后台接口由后端根据登录态自动识别企业范围，前端不要把 <code>companyId</code> 当作越权入口；菜单和按钮可结合 <code>/console/enterprise/profile</code>、<code>/console/enterprise/permissions/catalog</code> 与角色接口一起联调。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "企业专项管理" ? '<div class="note">企业专项管理收口企业公告、消息审计、敏感词治理、权限角色/管理员和新群默认权限模板；本区只放当前真实可调路径，企业 scope 由登录态隔离，高危操作仍走 <code>/console/enterprise/security/high-risk/confirm-token</code>。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "平台专项管理" ? '<div class="note">平台专项管理收口公告、消息审计、敏感词治理、权限角色/管理员和新群默认权限模板；消息治理含撤回、过期销毁、阅后即焚补跑与日志查询，需 <code>messages:governance</code> 权限。销毁/阅后即焚会调用 OpenIM API，本地造数可用 <code>/console/openim/messages/audit/import</code>；测试环境 HTTP-only 回归可用 <code>/console/openim/messages/audit/fixture/destroy</code> 标记销毁夹具，验证搜索默认隐藏已销毁消息；OpenIM 侧不存在对应消息时日志可能记为 failed，但业务规则与接口契约仍可通过本地脚本验证。高危操作仍走 <code>/console/platform/security/high-risk/confirm-token</code>。</div>' : ""}
${group.name === "平台总后台" ? '<div class="note">平台总后台接口需要平台管理员登录态，数据范围是全局；菜单和按钮建议结合 <code>/console/platform/profile</code> 返回的 <code>data.permissions.permissionCodes</code> 与平台角色接口一起联调。</div>' : ""}
${operations.map(renderOperation).join("")}
</section>`;
}).join("");
document.getElementById("content").innerHTML = html || '<div class="empty">没有匹配的接口。</div>';
}

state.groups = buildFrontendDocGroups(frontendApiGroups);
render(state.groups, "");

document.getElementById("nav").addEventListener("click", event => {
const toggle = event.target.closest(".nav-group-toggle");
if (!toggle) return;
const groupEl = toggle.closest(".nav-group");
if (!groupEl) return;
groupEl.classList.toggle("collapsed");
});

document.getElementById("search").addEventListener("input", event => {
render(state.groups, event.target.value);
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
